prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 video prompt THE SANDCASTLE Cinematic hyperlapse, 16:9, 15 seconds, photorealistic, beach golden-hour lighting, overhead and low-angle shots. [0:00–0:04] A man arrives at an empty beach at sunrise with a bucket, shovel, and inexplicable determination. Hyperlapse begins: he digs, packs, sculpts. The sun arcs overhead. What starts as a simple mound becomes a foundation. Then walls. Then towers. He's not building a sandcastle — he's building a sand FORTRESS. [0:04–0:08] The structure grows to absurd scale — six feet tall, twelve feet wide. Flying buttresses. A working drawbridge (made of popsicle sticks). A moat filled with actual seawater via a hand-dug canal. He sculpts individual sand bricks. He adds windows. He adds a flag (a napkin on a straw). Other beachgoers gather and watch in awe. He ignores them completely. [0:08–0:12] The final details. He carves a miniature throne room visible through the gate. He sculpts tiny sand soldiers on the battlements. He adds a sand dragon coiled around the tallest tower. He places seashells as decorative stonework. A crowd of 30 people is now watching, filming on their phones. He stands, surveys his masterpiece, sunburnt and exhausted. It's genuinely magnificent. He nods. Turns to the crowd. Takes a bow. [0:12–0:15] A seagull lands on the tallest tower. He shoos it. It doesn't move. He shoos harder. The seagull looks at him. Looks at the castle. Kicks the tower. The tower crumbles. The crumble triggers a chain reaction — the entire fortress collapses in a spectacular slow-motion avalanche of sand. EVERYTHING gone in four seconds. The crowd gasps. He stands in the rubble. The seagull flies away with the napkin flag. He watches it go. Sits down in the ruins. Picks up his bucket. "Same time tomorrow." Fade to black. Sound: waves/shovel digging → sand packing rhythm → crowd murmur building → camera shutter clicks → bow/crowd applause → seagull screech → sand crumbling (avalanche) → crowd "OHHH" → seagull wings → "same time tomorrow" → waves → silence.

Seedance 2.0 video prompt

THE SANDCASTLE 

Cinematic hyperlapse, 16:9, 15 seconds, photorealistic, beach golden-hour lighting, overhead and low-angle shots.

[0:00–0:04] A man arrives at an empty beach at sunrise with a bucket, shovel, and inexplicable determination. Hyperlapse begins: he digs, packs, sculpts. The sun arcs overhead. What starts as a simple mound becomes a foundation. Then walls. Then towers. He's not building a sandcastle — he's building a sand FORTRESS.

[0:04–0:08] The structure grows to absurd scale — six feet tall, twelve feet wide. Flying buttresses. A working drawbridge (made of popsicle sticks). A moat filled with actual seawater via a hand-dug canal. He sculpts individual sand bricks. He adds windows. He adds a flag (a napkin on a straw). Other beachgoers gather and watch in awe. He ignores them completely.

[0:08–0:12] The final details. He carves a miniature throne room visible through the gate. He sculpts tiny sand soldiers on the battlements. He adds a sand dragon coiled around the tallest tower. He places seashells as decorative stonework. A crowd of 30 people is now watching, filming on their phones. He stands, surveys his masterpiece, sunburnt and exhausted. It's genuinely magnificent. He nods. Turns to the crowd. Takes a bow.

[0:12–0:15] A seagull lands on the tallest tower. He shoos it. It doesn't move. He shoos harder. The seagull looks at him. Looks at the castle. Kicks the tower. The tower crumbles. The crumble triggers a chain reaction — the entire fortress collapses in a spectacular slow-motion avalanche of sand. EVERYTHING gone in four seconds. The crowd gasps. He stands in the rubble. The seagull flies away with the napkin flag. He watches it go. Sits down in the ruins. Picks up his bucket. "Same time tomorrow." Fade to black.

Sound: waves/shovel digging → sand packing rhythm → crowd murmur building → camera shutter clicks → bow/crowd applause → seagull screech → sand crumbling (avalanche) → crowd "OHHH" → seagull wings → "same time tomorrow" → waves → silence.

prompts.text: PORTION 1 (0 :00–0:04) The First Glance Visual Prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic video, golden hour lighting, modern university campus, soft warm tones, shallow depth of field. Ai Girllie (24, elegant, subtle futuristic vibe) walks past a glass building. John (26, photographer, casual aesthetic) lifts his camera, pauses as he notices her. Slow-motion eye contact. Leaves falling gently. Voiceover (soft, emotional): "Sometimes... love begins before words ever exist." PORTION 2 (0 :04–0:08) Growing Connection Visual Prompt: Smooth cinematic montage. Cozy café, warm ambient lighting. Ai Girllie smiling softly. John shows her photos on his camera. Close-up of fingers brushing unintentionally. Natural chemistry, shallow depth, cinematic bokeh. Voiceover: "In quiet moments... two strangers start feeling like home." PORTION 3 (0 :08–0:12) The Conflict Visual Prompt: Rainy night scene, dramatic lighting. Ai Girllie under an umbrella, emotional but composed. John stands across the street, blurred by rain. Phone screen close-up: multiple missed calls. Slow-motion rain creating emotional distance. Voiceover: "But love isn’t simple... sometimes the world pulls hearts apart." PORTION 4 (0 :12–0:16) The Choice Visual Prompt: Soft sunrise, pastel sky, hopeful tone. Ai Girllie turns as John runs toward her, slightly out of breath. He stops. Silence. Eye contact. She smiles gently, a tear forms. Warm light flare fills the frame

prompts.text: First-person GoPro POV mounted on a snowboarder’s helmet at the top of a steep alpine ridge. The edges of the snowboard and gloved hands briefly visible at the bottom of frame. Cold wind rushing past, breath visible in short bursts. The camera tilts downward — a massive untouched powder slope drops away into a narrow valley. At the 2-second mark the rider pushes off. Immediate acceleration — snow spraying outward from the board edges. The terrain rushes toward the camera as the rider carves through deep powder. Velocity ramp: approaching a cliff edge — the drop slows dramatically — snow particles suspended mid-air as the board leaves the edge. Full airborne moment — silence except wind. Then impact — the board lands hard, snow exploding upward. The rider stabilizes and continues carving at high speed through trees. Final beat: near miss with a tree — rapid turn, snow spray across the lens. Ultra-real snow physics, helmet cam shake, wind audio, cinematic mountain realism, 4K. Made in @pixio_ai

prompts.text: Romantic drama. A handsome young gentleman and an elegant lady stand facing each other in the center of the room, tension thick in the air. The camera moves in with a slow, smooth medium shot as he looks straight into her eyes, breathing unsteadily and murmurs: “I wanted to tell you...”, he hesitates for a beat, fingers tightening around her hand, then suddenly snaps, half‐laughing at himself: “Oh, to hell with it,” and pulls her sharply into a passionate kiss. Cut to a close‐up: for a few seconds she responds to the kiss, hands clutching at his shoulders, eyes closed, overwhelmed — then her body slowly stiffens, she starts to pull away, breathing in short, broken breaths; she turns her head aside and, voice trembling but not loud, whispers: “Let me go.” He refuses to release her, one arm firm around her waist, the other holding her hand, pressing her closer, burying his face in her hair as he exhales against her ear, hoarse and desperate: “Don’t run from me.” Camera shifts into a tight close‐up on her face in profile: her eyes shining with unshed tears, a mix of pain, love and resolve. She gently but decisively pushes him away with both hands against his chest — one sharp, dignified gesture — breaks free and takes a half step back, then looks at him with a calm, steady gaze and says in a low, controlled voice, like a quiet verdict: “Too late.” There is no shout, only quiet heartbreak. She turns and walks away, her pace composed but quick, keeping her posture like a lady holding herself together. Final high‐angle wide shot: she moves across the glowing room toward the dark doorway, skirts softly flowing; for a brief side close‐up we see a single tear rolling slowly down her cheek, then we return to the wide shot as she disappears into shadow without looking back, while he remains alone in the center of the vast, golden room, shoulders slightly slumped, his figure small against the grand space, radiating a feeling of silent, devastating loss — no subtitles #OpenArt #SeedanceShowdown #TeamCPP
prompts.display_text: Romantic drama. A handsome young gentleman and an elegant lady stand facing each other in the center of the room, tension thick in the air. The camera moves in with a slow, smooth medium shot as he looks straight into her eyes, breathing unsteadily and murmurs: “I wanted to tell you...”, he hesitates for a beat, fingers tightening around her hand, then suddenly snaps, half‐laughing at himself: “Oh, to hell with it,” and pulls her sharply into a passionate kiss. Cut to a close‐up: for a few seconds she responds to the kiss, hands clutching at his shoulders, eyes closed, overwhelmed — then her body slowly stiffens, she starts to pull away, breathing in short, broken breaths; she turns her head aside and, voice trembling but not loud, whispers: “Let me go.” He refuses to release her, one arm firm around her waist, the other holding her hand, pressing her closer, burying his face in her hair as he exhales against her ear, hoarse and desperate: “Don’t run from me.” Camera shifts into a tight close‐up on her face in profile: her eyes shining with unshed tears, a mix of pain, love and resolve. She gently but decisively pushes him away with both hands against his chest — one sharp, dignified gesture — breaks free and takes a half step back, then looks at him with a calm, steady gaze and says in a low, controlled voice, like a quiet verdict: “Too late.” There is no shout, only quiet heartbreak. She turns and walks away, her pace composed but quick, keeping her posture like a lady holding herself together. prompts.text: Prompt Studio: Out of Control, with Seedance 2.0 in @dreamina_ai , text to video Upscaled with @topazlabs Astra Starlight Precise 2.5 to 4k High-speed urban environment under extreme pressure. Hyper-realistic, grounded physics. The tone shifts from human tension to machine-level precision. Shot on 35mm anamorphic lens, f/2.8. Natural motion blur, realistic exposure, high dynamic range. Golden hour light cutting through dust, glass particles, and atmospheric haze. Subject: A skilled driver under intense stress. Fully human at the start, breathing, micro-errors, instability. Gradually transitions into passive role as control shifts to a system beyond them. Audio: starts organic (breath, friction, engine strain) → evolves into tight, mechanical, synchronized sound → ends in overwhelming environmental impact. 0–2s: Interior close-up. Hands gripping controls (steering wheel / throttle / harness). Micro-corrections, slight oversteer, imperfect rhythm. Breath audible. Stress visible. 2–4s: Rapid cuts: exterior tracking shot (speed established), side angle (environment rushing past), forward POV (danger ahead forming). Everything is still human-driven, slightly unstable. 4–6s: Wide shot, impossible situation ahead: blocked path, collapsing structure, incoming collision, or narrowing space. No clear solution. 6–8s: Back inside, the subject braces. Then controls shift subtly on their own. Movement becomes smoother... too smooth. Sound tightens. Breathing drops out of focus. 8–11s: Camera language changes: ultra-stable tracking shots, perfect alignment through space, impossible micro-adjustments at high speed. Multiple angles: top-down threading through obstacles, side pass with millimeter clearance, forward POV locking onto optimal path. The subject is no longer driving, just holding on. 11–13s: The system commits to a maneuver no human would attempt: threading through collapsing debris / crossing moving objects / cutting through a closing gap at full speed. Time feels compressed and precise. 13–15s: Massive physical consequence: debris explosion, chain reaction collisions, shockwave through environment. But the subject emerges through it cleanly. Final shot: interior close-up, subject still frozen, realizing they were not in control. Sound fades from mechanical precision back to raw breathing. Ultra-photorealistic 8K, cinematic HDR lighting, perfect motion continuity, physically accurate mass interaction, multi-angle coherence, no artifacts, grounded realism.

prompts.text: “Create a glamorous photoshoot in the style of Victoria's Secret. A young woman attached in the uploaded reference image ( Keep the face of the person 100% accurate from the reference image ) stands almost sideways, slightly bent forward, during the final preparation for the show. Makeup artists apply lipstick to her (only her hands are visible in the frame). She is wearing a corset decorated with beaded embroidery and crystals with a short fluffy skirt, as well as large feather wings. The image has a "backstage" effect. The background is a darkly lit room, probably under the podium. The main emphasis is on the girl's face and the details of her costume. Emphasize the expressiveness of the gaze and the luxurious look of the outfit. The photo is lit by a flash from the camera, which emphasizes the shine of the beads and crystals on the corset, as well as the girl's shiny skin. Victoria's Secret style: sensuality, luxury, glamour. Very detailed. Important: do not change the face.” Seedance2 Prompt: “【15-second Seedance 2.0】Victoria’s Secret Runway·Angel Entrance Character Lock: Young girl Idol Image 1 0-3s (Shot 1: Starting in the Dark) Scene: Deep composition, the teenage idol walks out from the depths of the pitch-black backstage, only her silhouette visible. She adjusts the straps of her massive feather wings, takes a deep breath, chest rising and falling. The crystals on her tight corset flash briefly under the emergency light. Camera: Steadicam following from behind, slight handheld shake, creating a documentary-style follow-shot feel. Lighting: Only a warm overhead work light illuminates the tips of her hair and the edges of the wings, her body hidden in darkness. 3-7s (Shot 2: Stepping Toward the Light) Scene: She begins to walk, accelerating from a slow pace to runway rhythm. The fluffy short skirt bounces with each step. The wings stir up fine dust, forming a stream of golden particles in the side backlight. Her face emerges from the shadows, eyes locked forward, the corners of her mouth rising into a confident Victoria’s Secret-style smile. Camera: Sideways tracking shot, keeping her in the golden ratio position of the frame as the background gradually brightens. Effects: Subtle physical trembling of the wing feathers, crisp hint of crystal beads colliding with each other. 7-12s (Shot 3: Flash Explosion) Scene: Dense camera flashes suddenly erupt ahead (simulating red carpet/photography area). She is instantly frozen by countless flashes. The crystal corset reflects starburst explosion effects, her skin showing glossy highlight texture. She lightly strokes the wing frame with one hand, the other hand swinging naturally, her gait seductive yet powerful. Camera: Slow-motion interspersed, capturing her continuous poses between flashes, occasionally pushing in slightly on her face. Lighting: High-contrast flash portrait style, each flash causing overexposed edges, creating a stop-motion animation-like rhythm. 12-15s (Shot 4: Stepping Into the Light) Scene: She steps into the pure white strong light at the stage entrance, her figure about to be swallowed by the light. She glances back at the camera (breaking the fourth wall). Glitter fragments hang on her eyelashes, feathers semi-transparent under the intense light. The background is the blurred cheering shadows of the audience seats. Camera: Rapid backward retreat, pulling from close-up to full shot. Her back view walking toward the light becomes smaller and smaller. Ending: The final shutter sound freezes on her glance-back moment, then the screen fades to white.”

prompts.text: Prompt for Seedance 2.0: A super macro close-up reveals the outsole of a high-performance running shoe pressed tightly against its dark surface. The camera slowly zooms in, sweeping across the rubber texture to reveal microscopic details—grip patterns, dust particles, and minute wear marks. Everything is still, yet it holds infinite possibilities. A faint, heartbeat-like low-pitched pulse begins. The shoe compresses slightly, and in that instant, the camera penetrates the sole (almost impossible in reality), reaching its internal structure. Inside, the layered cushioning system gradually expands in cross-section—foam units, air chambers, carbon plates, and support structures float in mid-air like a precision engineering feat. As the rhythm intensifies, each layer activates in turn: The foam compresses and rebounds with realistic elasticity; The air chambers pulse outward like shock absorbers; The carbon plates bend and rebound, storing energy. The camera follows this flow of energy, from heel to toe, moving forward as the force continues to transfer, revealing shimmering, dynamic lines that run throughout the entire structure. The movement accelerates, transforming into a powerful forward sprint, the camera bursting forth from the shoe's mesh upper. The shoe is now fully revealed, a runner stepping forward in it. The camera locks onto a lateral tracking lens, closely following the runner's forward sprint. Each landing triggers a visible energy pulse, flowing through the sole, enhancing performance and responsiveness. The upper stretches, the laces vibrate, and the shoe's lines are sleek and clean. The final moment: The runner takes a step, and in mid-air, the shoe perfectly separates from the foot, frozen in place. The camera slowly pans around, showcasing the shoe's silhouette, material transitions, and intricate design. The shoe lands softly, revealing the final product. The camera transitions from an 85mm macro lens to a 35mm tracking lens, the ultra-shallow depth of field gradually shifting to dynamic clarity, high-contrast lighting. Sound effects: deep impact sounds, elastic rebound sounds, rapid impact sounds, subtle material tension sounds, and the final landing sound.

prompts.text: Another test with Seedance V2 Text to video with Omni extend on Dreamina. The people who love the details will find out all the problems, but remember, I did all of this from my phone without any extra tools. My observation: having image and audio references can solve the generic output. Seedance V2 lack emotional intelligence, agent's and human guide can solve this problem. handheld-stabilized romantic coverage, soft push-ins, natural close-ups, polished K-drama pacing" }, "scene_anchor": { "location": "night park date with food stalls, game booths, soft decorative lights, light crowd in background", "time": "warm summer night" }, "characters": { "male_lead": { "age": "young adult", "appearance": "handsome Korean idol-type man, clean elegant features, styled dark hair, calm masculine presence, deep voice, casual premium date outfit" }, "female_lead": { "age": "young adult", "appearance": "South African idol-type woman with Tyla-inspired beauty, warm bronze skin, expressive eyes, soft glamorous makeup, long styled hair, elegant trendy night-date outfit" } }, "visual_rules": { "relationship": "they are already a couple, relaxed, affectionate, chemistry", "avoid": "melodramatic shouting, slapstick comedy, random crowd focus, broken hand anatomy, over-fast cutting" }, "shot_timeline": [ { "time": "0-4s", "shot": "medium tracking shot as they walk side by side through the night park under glowing lights, brushing shoulders, smiling at each other" }, { "time": "4-8s", "shot": "quick romantic inserts: they try street snacks, share one drink, laugh while comparing flavors, he watches her reaction with fondness" }, { "time": "8-12s", "shot": "playful game booth sequence, she wins a small prize, he reacts with mock defeat, she teases him, close-up on their faces and hands" }, { "time": "12-15s", "shot": "they slow down near a quieter bench area, lingering close-up, her smile softens, he looks at her with deep affection, emotional prompts.text: INTENT: Create a high-converting, natural-feeling UGC ad for instant coffee. The character shares a relatable morning struggle and organically introduces the product as a simple, satisfying solution. Tone is warm, honest, conversational — not salesy. Focus on emotional payoff over features. FORMAT: Ultra-realistic cinematic UGC video, 15–18 seconds, 24fps, vertical 9:16 Natural daylight, Mumbai apartment setting, soft lifestyle aesthetic CHARACTER: A young Indian woman in her late 20s–early 30s, relaxed, at-home look, seated by a window. Comfortable, relatable, no heavy makeup, natural smile. SCENE FLOW (CONTINUOUS — NO HARD CUTS IN SCRIPT PHASE): DIALOGUE (timed natural pacing ~16s): (soft exhale, slight smile) “Okay... I used to think I needed one of those fancy coffee machines to feel awake in the morning.” (light chuckle, shakes head slightly) “But honestly, most days I just don’t have the time... and I’d either skip it, or end up with something really average.” (slight pause, looks at cup, tone shifts — more certain) “Then I tried this... and it just made things easier.” (natural hand gesture, casual tone) “It’s literally a spoon, hot water... and somehow it still tastes like proper coffee.” (smiles, relaxed payoff) “Now it’s the one thing I actually look forward to before starting my day.” PERFORMANCE NOTES: Dialogue must feel unscripted, slightly imperfect, natural pauses allowed No overacting, no “ad voice” Subtle micro-expressions: smile, small head nods, eye movement toward cup Keep rhythm conversational, not rushed AUDIO: Clean voice, close mic feel Soft ambient room tone (light city + distant birds) No background music overpowering voice Optional very light warm instrumental at <15% volume VISUAL RULES: Natural handheld feel or soft tripod (UGC authenticity) Shallow depth of field, subject in focus, background softly blurred Warm color grading, slightly golden morning tones No on-screen text No hard product push yet (product reveal comes in scene breakdown phase)

Try this prompt:

INTENT:
Create a high-converting, natural-feeling UGC ad for instant coffee. The character shares a relatable morning struggle and organically introduces the product as a simple, satisfying solution. Tone is warm, honest, conversational — not salesy. Focus on emotional payoff over features.

FORMAT:
Ultra-realistic cinematic UGC video, 15–18 seconds, 24fps, vertical 9:16
Natural daylight, Mumbai apartment setting, soft lifestyle aesthetic

CHARACTER:
A young Indian woman in her late 20s–early 30s, relaxed, at-home look, seated by a window. Comfortable, relatable, no heavy makeup, natural smile.

SCENE FLOW (CONTINUOUS — NO HARD CUTS IN SCRIPT PHASE):
DIALOGUE (timed natural pacing ~16s):

(soft exhale, slight smile)
“Okay… I used to think I needed one of those fancy coffee machines to feel awake in the morning.”

(light chuckle, shakes head slightly)
“But honestly, most days I just don’t have the time… and I’d either skip it, or end up with something really average.”

(slight pause, looks at cup, tone shifts — more certain)
“Then I tried this… and it just made things easier.”

(natural hand gesture, casual tone)
“It’s literally a spoon, hot water… and somehow it still tastes like proper coffee.”

(smiles, relaxed payoff)
“Now it’s the one thing I actually look forward to before starting my day.”

PERFORMANCE NOTES:
Dialogue must feel unscripted, slightly imperfect, natural pauses allowed
No overacting, no “ad voice”
Subtle micro-expressions: smile, small head nods, eye movement toward cup
Keep rhythm conversational, not rushed

AUDIO:
Clean voice, close mic feel
Soft ambient room tone (light city + distant birds)
No background music overpowering voice

Optional very light warm instrumental at <15% volume

VISUAL RULES:
Natural handheld feel or soft tripod (UGC authenticity)
Shallow depth of field, subject in focus, background softly blurred
Warm color grading, slightly golden morning tones

No on-screen text
No hard product push yet (product reveal comes in scene breakdown phase)

prompts.text: 0:00-0:02: Close-up of her face as she regains balance, then a quick wide shot. She looks up at a dark hatch. 0:02-0:05: Rapid jump-cuts: she crouches, then leaps with a powerful burst of energy through the ceiling opening. First-person view looking up, followed by a side view of her soaring through the gap. 0:05-0:07: She lands on a rainy skyscraper roof, the city neon reflecting in puddles. Cut to the vampire below, his face twisted in a grin, saying: "Where are you going, baby?" as he instantly begins to follow. 0:07-0:08 Extreme wide shot as she leaps across a narrow gap between buildings. 0:08-0:09 The pale vampire with fangs sprint-climbs a parallel wall with supernatural speed. 0:09-0:10 Cyborg woman: Parkour vault over an industrial HVAC unit, blue sparks arm scraping the surface. 0:10-0:11 Side-view tracking shot as the vampire performs a massive leap over a glowing neon billboard. 0:11-0:12 Low-angle reverse shot from her POV looking back: the vampire gains ground. 0:12-0:13 Dutch angle shot showing both running past the camera. 0:13-0:14 Handheld camera shot from the vampire's POV. 0:14-0:15 Final shot: she dive off a roof. Anatomical Integrity Rule: Strictly maintain all human-cyborg body proportions. Zero tolerance for limb stretching, facial melting, or anatomical mutations during extreme jumps and fast movements. Gritty cyberpunk, rainy night, cinematic motion blur, 8k. #OpenArt #SeedanceShowdown #TeamCPP

prompts.text: Using the uploaded reference image as the subject: (0–2.5s) A frantic, vibrating handheld tracking shot follows her as she sprints across a shattered bridge, wearing a pink hoodie. The footage speed-ramps from fast-forward into ultra slow motion. Behind her, a colossal leviathan—formed from bioluminescent water and jagged ice scales—surges forward. The camera violently jerks downward as she dodges flying rebar and chunks of concrete. (2.5–4s) The camera whip-pans 180 degrees, briefly overshooting her face before snapping into sharp focus. She skids, black sneakers carving trenches into wet asphalt. Speed ramps back to real-time chaos. She squares her stance—glowing crimson energy blasts erupt from her palms. Raindrops vaporize around her fists. (4–6s) The water leviathan unleashes a spiraling hydro-cannon. In extreme slow motion, the crimson laser collides with the roaring torrent. The camera flinches sideways. A sizzling shockwave erupts—scalding steam and boiling water splatter across the frame. The bridge fractures under the recoil. (6–8.5s) Speed ramps into a brutal back-and-forth barrage. The camera shakes in hurricane-force winds. The leviathan lashes out with a water tendril—she ducks, but a glancing blow spins her, visible agony on her face. The camera nearly loses track. She recovers, igniting hard-light energy wings. Her hoodie sleeves char black. (8.5–12s) The camera pushes through dense fog. She tucks her wings and launches straight into the leviathan’s chest. Time locks into slow motion at impact. A concentrated crimson hyper-laser channels through her right fist, driving into the creature’s glowing core. A concussive sonic boom warps the air—the leviathan detonates. (12–15s) The camera scrambles from the ground, tilting. The shockwave has flattened the monsoon rain. Millions of glowing bioluminescent droplets fall like embers. She lands on a floating slab of concrete—knees buckle, then lock upright. Her chest heaves. The scorched pink hoodie smolders.

prompts.text: How do Grok Imagine and Seedance 2 Fast handle Close-ups? Note: Grok Imagine goes for a more cinematic opening, whilst Seedance 2 captures emotions and vibe much better. Prompt (10 second version): A weathered Norse chieftain's scarred face fills the frame, eyes scanning beyond camera as his longship cuts through emerald waters toward sun-bleached shores. [0-3s]: Extreme close-up, UE5 nanite-detail on cracked skin and amber iris reflections, sweat beads in super crisp 35mm heavy grain texture. [3-7s]: Medium close-up tracking shot stepping onto golden Serkland dunes, metal greaves sinking into super-detailed individual sand grains, heat distortion waves, fingers brushing against blowing silk veils in high contrast harsh sunlight. [7-10s]: Intimate extreme close-up removing iron helmet, wind catching matted hair against backdrop of domed minarets, eyes squinting against foreign sun then widening with acceptance. Ray-traced caustics on skin, Lumen global illumination on sandstone, subsurface scattering, dramatic high contrast shadows, anamorphic lens characteristics. avoid jitter, bent limbs, distorted faces, blurry motion, watermark, low-poly textures, oversaturation

prompts.text: 16:9, 15-second ultra cinematic photoreal sequence, seamless 3-shot progression, no subtitles, no logos. Inside a vast abandoned opera house flooded with two inches of mirror-still water at blue hour, a lone ballerina in a black silk dress stands center stage. Shot 1: extreme macro from beneath the water as her pointe shoe touches down, sending silver droplets and concentric ripples across the surface; realistic refraction, delicate silk fibers, visible breath in the cold air. Shot 2: the camera rises through the water and performs a smooth 180-degree orbit around her as she spins; each footstep ignites bioluminescent constellations beneath the water, reflections perfectly synchronized, chandeliers above flicker awake one by one, dust floating in volumetric light. Shot 3: on the final accelerating spin, the chandeliers burst into hundreds of glowing crystal birds spiraling upward; the camera rockets backward through the broken roof to reveal the entire opera house floating alone in the center of a dark mirror-ocean at sunrise, clouds opening, golden rays piercing the mist, her tiny silhouette still spinning in the glowing stage at the center. Hyper-real water physics, natural skin texture, elegant cloth motion, subtle film grain, breathtaking scale, physically believable magic, premium cinematic lighting, emotionally overwhelming. Audio: begin with distant room tone, dripping water, and a faint inhale; precise splashes synced to each step; low orchestral swell building with the spin; crystal wing flutter overhead; final reverb dissolving into ocean silence.

prompts.text: Ark Short Trailer video prompt Cinematic short film, visual effects composition. 15-second epic trailer, 10 shots. [0–1.5s] TITLE CARD: "BEFORE THE RAIN" — white text on black. Drone descent — golden hour, impossibly vast wooden ark on cracked dry plain. One weathered, bearded man drives a peg into the hull. His family works alone. No one else believes. [1.5–4s] THE GATHERING. Crane descent into tracking follow. Two lions lead a column of animals stretching to the horizon — elephants, giraffes, wolves beside deer, eagles overhead. Every species walking in impossible peace. Dust from a thousand hooves. White doves land on Noah's outstretched arm. VO: "They called him mad." [4–5.5s] Rapid macro inserts: elephant foot stepping on wooden ramp, foxes curling in a hay stall, Noah's bloody-knuckled hand slamming the door bolt shut. [5.5–8s] TITLE CARD: "THE SKY WEPT FOR FORTY DAYS." Time-lapse — sky turns from amber to bruised purple-black. Clouds spiral. Lightning strikes. Rain begins — not drops, sheets. Walls of water. Camera starts UNDERWATER — submerged trees, buildings. Cranes up, breaks surface. The ark FLOATS. The world is ocean. Waves the size of cathedrals. Lightning strobes. [8–10s] Interior ark, firelight. Noah against the hull. Animal sounds everywhere. Water rushes past hull slats. He prays. [10–13s] VO: "And on the hundred and fiftieth day..." ECU — white dove returns with olive branch. First break in clouds. Golden god ray pierces the deck like a spotlight from heaven. [13–15s] The ark on a mountaintop. Water receding. Ramp lowers. Animals POUR OUT — birds explode in murmuration, elephants lumber, deer sprint. Noah silhouetted against sunrise. Camera rises. A rainbow stretches horizon to horizon. TITLE: "THE ARK." Ultra-realistic.

prompts.text: @Image1 is the main character — maintain consistent facial features and body type throughout. Appears only once per frame, no duplicates. Cinematic time-freeze short film, 15 seconds, ultra-realistic, Arri Alexa Mini shooting texture, 50mm lens, natural daylight hard shadows, shallow depth of field. [0:00–0:03] Busy Alpine village street — wooden chalet shopfronts, cobblestone ground, dramatic mountain peaks visible at the end of the lane, clear blue sky. Steadicam front-facing medium shot tracking: the main character — a young man with dark hair, black-framed glasses, light stubble, silver chain necklace, wearing a loose printed short-sleeve shirt — walks confidently through the tourist crowd. Hikers with backpacks, shop signs, a postcard rack outside a souvenir store. A pigeon cuts across the sky above him. He raises both hands, interlaces his fingers, and snaps. [0:03–0:06] A powerful white spherical shockwave bursts outward from his hands, carrying visible air distortion and light refraction, spreading in all directions. Pedestrians freeze mid-stride. The pigeon locks mid-flight overhead. Most strikingly — a street juggler beside the postcard shop freezes with three apples suspended mid-arc in the air above him, hanging perfectly still against the blue sky. Postcards fly off the rack and hang frozen in the air. Absolute silence falls over the village. [0:06–0:09] Only his footsteps echo off the cobblestones. He strolls casually along the frozen street, glancing around with calm satisfaction. He passes the frozen pigeon overhead, pays it no mind. He slows as he approaches the postcard rack — reaches up and plucks one of the floating, suspended postcards out of mid-air, turns it over in his hand, looks at it briefly with a raised eyebrow. Sets it back. Keeps walking. [0:09–0:11] He stops directly in front of the frozen juggler — three apples hanging perfectly mid-arc above the man's outstretched hands. He tilts his head, studies the composition. A slow smile. He looks at the camera, gives a small nod, and whispers "perfect." [0:11–0:15] He turns back to face the street, interlaces his hands and snaps again — a second shockwave, stronger, bursts outward in reverse. Everything unfreezes instantly: the juggler catches his apples and continues seamlessly, postcards flutter back to the rack, the pigeon flaps away, hikers resume mid-conversation. City noise and mountain ambience rush back in. He calmly turns and walks toward the camera. Camera slowly rises and pulls back — his silhouette moves down the Alpine lane between the chalets. Fade to black. Sound design: Alpine village ambience → double snap → shockwave rumble radiating outward → absolute silence → lone footsteps on cobblestone → whispered "perfect" → second snap → reverse shockwave burst → village sounds and mountain wind naturally restored.

Warm interior glow vs cool deep blue skyline, cinematic lighting, soft motion, 8K detail. 0–3s Close-up of warm Edison bulbs → quick pan over wooden counter (mug, books, plants). 3–6s Camera glides toward large window, interior reflections fading as city comes into view. 6–10s Wide shot of skyline featuring Kuwait Towers glowing gold, surrounded by high-rises. 10–13s Lower angle reveals highway with smooth orange light trails, subtle parallax. 13–15s Soft zoom toward city through window, calm cozy mood → fade to black. #PolloAI #PolloMakeItMove

prompts.text: Tried text to video anime scene. Ultra-fast-paced 15 second vertical anime action scene in vibrant modern anime style like Ufotable or MAPPA, high-contrast colors, bold line art, dramatic shading, motion blur on fast moves, dynamic camera angles, and impact flashes. Nighttime rainy cyberpunk rooftop cityscape with glowing neon signs and flying cars in the distant background. A cool female anime protagonist (mid-20s, long flowing silver hair with blue streaks whipping wildly, sharp determined eyes glowing faintly, sleek black-and-cyan tactical jacket with glowing accents over short skirt and boots) faces off against a masked shadowy assassin with red energy blades. 0-4s: Explosive start — wide tracking shot as she dashes forward at super speed, scarf and hair trailing with heavy motion blur, drawing dual glowing cyan energy katanas in a flash. Rain streaks fly sideways. Assassin leaps from above with red slash trails. 4-9s: Intense close-quarters clash — rapid cuts between low-angle spins, high-speed sword parries creating bright spark explosions and shockwaves that ripple raindrops, acrobatic flips off the rooftop edge, hair and clothes snapping dramatically. She dodges a red energy wave that slices a neon sign in half (slow-mo impact frame on the cut), then counters with a spinning heel kick that sends the assassin skidding across wet concrete. 9-15s: Epic finale buildup — she charges with a powerful yell, hair glowing brighter, unleashing a massive cyan crescent slash wave toward camera in ultra-fast motion. Assassin blocks but gets launched backward off the roof into the neon abyss below with particle trails. Final dramatic wide pull-back as she lands in a cool pose, breathing heavily, hair settling, city lights reflecting in puddles. Hyper-detailed hair and fabric physics with silky flow, satisfying particle sparks and energy effects, extreme motion blur on attacks, cinematic anime color grading with lens flares, fast energetic J-pop/rock beat sync with whooshes and sword clashes, 8K quality, flawless character consistency, perfect for viral high-energy loops or AMV-style clips

prompts.text: CAMERA: Full POV mount locked to the rider's eye line, as if the viewer IS the person on the coaster. No rider visible. No inset. The harness bars and the tops of hands gripping the lap bar may appear at the very bottom edge of frame for physicality and scale. SCENE: Lock the camera to a rigid first-person eye-line mount and never break the shot. Capture raw live ride footage with physical camera behavior and real-time force as one uninterrupted in-camera recording. Start in immediate action in a wide open fantasy sky zone as the coaster is already racing along an exposed cliffside rail toward a giant broken stone ring suspended between floating cliffs, then slam straight into a hard open-air drop. Rails, drops, loop, creatures, and scale read clearly from the rider's direct forward eye line. Wind blast, g-force compression, speed shake, vibration, and rattling hit the lens physically on every drop, bank, loop, corkscrew, and near miss so the viewer feels bodily inside the ride. Keep one continuous looped route as the coaster tears through the drop, hard bank, full vertical loop, and corkscrew, races past floating cliffs, broken arches, giant statues, storm light, dragon shadows, pterosaur-like creatures, and horned dinosaurs far below the rails, then hits a near miss as a huge dragon crosses directly over the track and throws firelight across the metal bars and the viewer's hands. Finish by climbing and curving back into the same open sky zone and same giant broken stone ring from the opening so the ending feels like the route is looping back to its own start point. MOOD: Breathless awe, danger, relentless speed. COLOR LOGIC: Naturalistic Film Print Emulation STYLE: Cinematic realism, immersive first-person action spectacle, epic fantasy pursuit

prompts.text: Use @ Reference Image as the main character, keeping facial features and body proportions consistent throughout. He is a 30-year-old man. Cinematic time-freeze short film, 15 seconds, ultra-realistic, shot on Arri Alexa Mini, 35mm lens, moody sports bar interior lighting with neon accents, volumetric haze, dynamic hard shadows, shallow depth of field. [0:00–0:03] A packed, dimly lit sports bar, time flowing normally. Steadicam frontal medium shot tracking him walking confidently through absolute chaos. On the blurred TVs in the background, the Yankees have just clinched the World Series. The crowd is erupting in pure euphoria. As he walks, he raises his right hand and snaps. [0:03–0:06] At the snap, a subtle spherical shockwave bursts from his fingertips with air distortion and light refraction, expanding outward. Everything freezes mid-explosion. Thick arcs of golden beer suspend in the air, with individual glistening droplets visible. Popcorn kernels float motionless. People are frozen mid-cheer and mid-air in leaping embraces. Volumetric neon light catches the suspended dust and liquid. Absolute silence. [0:06–0:09] Only he moves. His footsteps echo slightly. The camera moves backward as he walks through the frozen celebration, observing calmly. He casually ducks under an arc of frozen, splashing beer. He notices a cluster of floating popcorn, reaches out, and plucks a single kernel from the air. [0:09–0:11] He stops in front of a frozen man wearing a Yankees jersey, his face locked in an ecstatic, tearful scream, arms raised for a high-five. The main character tilts his head, gently adjusts the brim of the frozen man's Yankees cap, nods slightly, and softly says: “perfect.” [0:11–0:15] He turns, tosses the popcorn kernel into his mouth, and crunches it. He faces the camera, smirks, and snaps again. A stronger reverse shockwave restores motion. The beer completes its splash, the cheering roar instantly returns, and fans land their jumps. He walks away as the camera pushes through the wildly celebrating crowd. Fade to black. Sound: deafening bar roar/celebration → snap → deep shockwave/bass drop → absolute silence → footsteps → sharp popcorn crunch → “perfect” → snap → reverse shockwave → deafening celebration returns.

prompts.text: Setting: Venice Beach boardwalk, bright sunny day, clear blue sky, palm trees, sandy beach, ocean background, colorful shops, concrete and wooden planks, casual crowd. Characters: Man with dreadlocks, black jacket with gold accents. Brown dachshund walking on all four legs. Camera: Low-angle tracking shot, dynamic movement, close-ups on tricks, wide shots for surreal scale. Style: Realistic AI rendering, cinematic, high-quality, physically impossible made believable. Action: Man steps onto dachshund's back, balances — dog casually walks forward carrying him. [cheerful beach ambiance + crowd murmurs] Man glides forward, legs steady, arms out for balance, smooth trot beneath him. [light breeze + distant ocean waves] Dachshund walks along concrete ledge, man still balanced on top. [sharp ambient sound + crowd gasps] Dachshund trots up and over a small ramp, legs pumping naturally, carrying man over the peak. [whooshing motion + excited crowd cheers] Dachshund walks onto wooden planks, turns toward camera, man balanced on top — confident stance. [upbeat beach music] Man steps off, points at camera, walks forward. Dachshund sits, looks at camera proudly. [playful energy + crowd applause] Theme: Surreal comedy, impossible physics, AI-generated absurdity, beach boardwalk antics.

prompts.text: Prompt - 15s Cowboy 1v1 Gunfight Scene Setting: Dusty frontier town street, noon sun, empty road, wooden saloon behind them. Scene 1 (0 to 2s) Establishing Tension Camera: Wide cinematic shot, low angle from ground level. Dust blows across the street. Two cowboys stand facing each other about 20 feet apart. The sun sits directly overhead. A wooden sign creaks outside a saloon. Face / Body: Both men stand stiff. Eyes locked. Sound: Wind. Spur jingle. Distant horse. Scene 2 (2 to 4s) Eyes of Cowboy A Camera: Extreme close up of Cowboy A’s eyes. His eyes narrow slightly. A bead of sweat rolls down his temple. Face Reaction: Jaw tight. Breathing slow and controlled. Sound: Heartbeat slowly rising. Scene 3 (4 to 6s) Eyes of Cowboy B Camera: Tight close up of Cowboy B’s face from a slight side angle. Sunlight hits his eyes. He squints slightly. Face Reaction: A subtle smirk, confidence. His tongue wets his dry lips. Sound: Wind gust. Scene 4 (6 to 8s) Hands Near the Gun Camera: Extreme close up of holsters from waist level. Both hands hover inches above their revolvers. Fingers twitch. Dust moves around their boots. Sound: Leather creaking. Spur jingle. Scene 5 (8 to 10s) Micro Reactions Camera: Rapid cuts between faces. • Cowboy A blinking once • Cowboy B’s eyes widening slightly • Cowboy A’s thumb flexing The tension peaks. Scene 6 (10 to 12s) The Draw Camera: Medium side tracking shot. Both men draw in the same instant. Cowboy A fires first. Sound: A single explosive gunshot. Birds burst from a nearby rooftop. Scene 7 (12 to 15s) The Result Camera: Slow push in on Cowboy B. His expression shifts from confidence to shock. He looks down at his chest. Then collapses slowly into the dust. Cut to Cowboy A standing still, revolver smoking. Face Reaction: He exhales. Eyes still focused. Sound: Gunshot echo fading. Wind returns. generate the perfect image for each scene

prompts.text: Ultra-cinematic 15-second motorbike sequence at night through a wet urban city, reflective asphalt and neon-lit environment. 0–2s: Wide establishing shot — a sleek motorbike enters frame at high speed, headlights cutting through light fog, reflections stretching across the road. 2–4s: Low tracking shot beside the bike — wheels spinning rapidly, water spraying outward, engine vibration visible in subtle frame shake. 4–6s: Rear tracking shot — the rider leans forward aggressively, accelerating, taillight glowing against the dark street. 6–8s: Side angle — the bike leans deeply into a sharp corner, knee close to the ground, reflections sliding across wet pavement. 8–10s: Front tracking shot — bike moving toward camera, rider steady and focused, headlights flaring into lens. 10–12s: Dynamic tracking — the bike weaves smoothly between cars, tight spacing, near-contact moments with side mirrors. 12–13.5s: Close-up — wheel and suspension compressing slightly over uneven road, water splashing in slow detail. 13.5–15s: Final hero shot — long straight road, bike accelerating away from camera, taillight shrinking into the distance. Camera: smooth cinematic tracking, low angles, no handheld chaos, controlled motion. Environment: dense city street, wet reflective ground, light fog, moving traffic. Lighting: neon reflections, streetlights, strong highlights on bike surfaces. Style: ultra-cinematic realism, clean motion, high-speed elegance, grounded physics, no text, no overlays, stable proportions without stretch. Made in @runwayml

prompts.text: 15-Second Single Shot Video Prompt Style & Quality: Ultra-realistic cinematic video, 8K resolution, HDR lighting, shot on a 35mm lens. Smooth steady camera tracking, shallow depth of field, high detail, slightly futuristic tone with soft glow effects. Prompt (Single Continuous Frame) A wide industrial highway scene at sunset, filled with heavy pollution. Large factories in the background continuously releasing thick dark smoke into the air. The atmosphere is hazy, orange-gray, and dense. A sleek, futuristic car drives smoothly forward in a straight line through the frame. The camera tracks alongside the car in a slow, steady motion for the entire 15 seconds (no cuts). As the car moves, the smoke from the factories and surrounding air is visibly pulled toward the front of the car, as if the car is inhaling pollution. The airflow is cinematic and fluid, showing dark smoke streams being absorbed into the vehicle. At the same time, from the car’s exhaust, instead of smoke, vibrant green vines, blooming flowers, and small trees continuously grow and spread across the road behind it. The transformation happens in real-time the gray, lifeless ground turns into lush greenery as the car passes. The environment gradually shifts within the same frame: one side remains polluted, while the area behind the car becomes clean, colorful, and full of life. Final seconds: the car keeps moving forward, with a clear visual contrast polluted world ahead, green world behind all within the same uninterrupted cinematic shot.

Prompt:  A calm, modern hospital room. A patient is lying on a bed while a professional, kind doctor stands beside him, gently checking his pulse and speaking softly.
The camera slowly tracks from the side in a single continuous motion for the full 15 seconds.
As the doctor leans slightly closer to examine the patient, the patient looks at the doctor and becomes emotionally captivated. His facial expression gradually shifts from weak and tired to calm, slightly smiling, and lost in admiration.
To visually show his feelings (without unrealistic exaggeration), the background subtly transforms:
the hospital environment softly blurs, and a warm, dreamy glow appears around the doctor. Light particles and soft-focus bokeh gently emerge, symbolizing the patient drifting into his thoughts.
The patient is no longer focused on his illness instead, he is quietly staring at the doctor, completely absorbed in the moment. His breathing becomes calm, and his expression shows peace and affection.
The doctor remains professional and unaware, continuing the check-up naturally.
Final seconds:
The camera continues its smooth motion as the dreamy overlay slightly fades, leaving a subtle emotional contrast a patient who has momentarily forgotten his pain, lost in thought.
Important Direction (to avoid mistakes)
The patient remains lying on the bed (not standing or moving unrealistically)
The doctor behaves professionally (no exaggerated or inappropriate actions)
The emotional effect is shown through lighting, focus, and atmosphere not unrealistic physical actions
No reversed roles or unnatural expressions
Keep the tone soft, respectful, and cinematic (not comedic or exaggerated)
Mood / Feel
Soft, emotional, subtle admiration, calm, slightly dreamy but grounded in reality.

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 on @yapper_so Prompt; A cinematic, ultra-realistic 4K–8K vertical video (9:16) of a young woman standing outdoors in front of a dense wall of vibrant pink bougainvillea flowers, captured in soft natural daylight with shallow depth of field and creamy background bokeh. The environment is calm, with a slight natural breeze gently moving her hair and the flowers. The woman matches the exact facial features and proportions of the reference image (identical face structure, jawline, nose, lips, eyes, and eyebrows), ensuring full facial consistency across all frames. She is wearing the same outfit as the reference image: an elegant, modest, and attractive pastel-toned fitted blouse paired with high-waisted tailored trousers or a flowy skirt in a complementary neutral shade. The fabric reacts naturally to movement, with realistic folds and light interaction. Action & Motion: The video begins with her looking slightly downward, holding a small cluster of bougainvillea flowers. She slowly lifts her gaze toward the camera with a soft, calm expression. She gently brushes her hair back with one hand, then shifts her weight naturally, turning slightly to one side. She takes a small step forward, subtly rotating her shoulders, giving a graceful posing sequence. She briefly looks away, then back into the camera with a faint, natural smile. Movements are slow, fluid, and elegant like a fashion editorial shoot. prompts.text: Scene 1 Action: Black ink-like filaments erupt from the floor, weaving around a woman's ankles as she stands paralyzed. Camera: Low-angle static medium shot, shifting into a slow vertigo effect (dolly zoom) as the threads rise. Lighting: High-contrast Chiaroscuro with cold teal rim lighting and deep, void-like shadows. Sound: Viscous squelching, wet rhythmic pulsing, and the sharp crackle of static electricity. Dialogue: 'It’s choosing me.' Scene 2 Action: The woman’s skin ripples as black fluid veins crawl up her neck; her eyes cloud over with dark, oily ink. Camera: Extreme close-up using a macro lens, slow pan following the movement of the subcutaneous filaments. Lighting: Harsh top-down flickering fluorescent light, creating a clinical, brutalist atmosphere. Sound: Low-frequency sub-bass hum, wet tearing textures, and rapid, shallow breathing. Scene 3 Action: She arches back unnaturally as tendrils explode from her spine, weaving into a sculptural, abstract crown. Camera: High-angle wide shot, slow tracking orbit around the subject to emphasize the spatial distortion. Lighting: Cold industrial backlighting, silhouettes sharpened by thick atmospheric mist and volumetric rays. Sound: Metallic grinding, the sound of heavy liquid dripping upward hitting the ceiling. Scene 4 Action: The transformation completes; the woman merges into a mass of writhing threads, staring directly into the lens. Camera: Handheld shaky cam, rapid zoom-in on her face followed by an abrupt tilt-down to the floor. Lighting: Strobe effect with high-fashion graphic precision, casting razor-edged shadows against the teal walls. Sound: Sharp, high-pitched digital distortion and the sudden, heavy thud of a body hitting the floor. Dialogue: 'Don't look.'

prompts.text: Scene 1 Action: The creature from ref image steps through a shimmering, distorted dimensional portal into a dark, modern bedroom. Camera: Low-angle tracking shot following the creature's boots as it emerges from the rift. Lighting: High-contrast chiaroscuro with flickering cerulean light from the portal and deep cinematic shadows. Sound: Low-frequency atmospheric drone, electrical hum of the portal, and the metallic clink of heavy footsteps. Scene 2 Action: The creature approaches a sleeping man; as it raises a neon-gloved hand, all motion in the room suddenly freezes. Camera: Slow-motion push-in to a tight close-up on the creature’s reflective black mask, then panning to the man. Lighting: Dim moonlight from a window supplemented by a cold, clinical top-down rim light. Sound: Instant vacuum-like silence followed by a high-pitched, crystalline ringing representing the time freeze. Scene 3 Action: The creature touches the frozen man’s shoulder, and both begin to dematerialize into glowing particles. Camera: Extreme close-up of the neon glove against the man's skin, followed by a rapid 360-degree orbital rotation. Lighting: Ethereal glow from the creature's gloves, casting a sickly green hue over the subject. Sound: Granular synthesis effects, shimmering digital "glitch" sounds, and a deep, resonant sub-bass pulse. Scene 4 Action: The bedroom is suddenly empty; the portal collapses into a single point of light before vanishing entirely. Camera: Wide static shot of the empty room, slowly zooming out to emphasize the sudden vacuum and isolation. Lighting: Naturalistic low-light interior; the flickering portal light abruptly cuts to a cold, desaturated blue moonwash. Sound: A sharp, percussive "thud" as the portal closes, followed by the faint, rhythmic ticking of a bedside clock. Dialogue: 'He's gone.'

prompts.text: Scene 1 Action: The guinea pig detective pauses before the glowing blue portal at the end of the forest path, then steps inside. Camera: Low angle, close-up tracking shot following the guinea pig from behind as it enters the portal. Lighting: High contrast, chiaroscuro effect with warm street lamp contrast against the intense neon blue portal glow. Sound: Soft crickets, distant rustling leaves, transitioning into a low-frequency bass hum as it approaches the portal. Dialogue: 'Finally, the entrance.' Scene 2 Action: The guinea pig emerges into a dimly lit, smoky basement club, moving past rows of dancing guinea pigs. Camera: Handheld shaky cam, shallow depth of field, moving through the dense, crowded dance floor. Lighting: Strobe lighting, deep saturated purples and reds, volumetric fog swirling through laser beams. Sound: Muffled thumping bass, crowd chatter, clinking glass sounds, sound of heavy footsteps on concrete. Scene 3 Action: A guinea pig DJ expertly manipulates a console, while the crowd moves rhythmically to the heavy techno beat. Camera: Mid-shot, rack focus from the DJ's paws on the console to the blurred, energetic crowd behind. Lighting: Intense, rapid-fire rhythmic flashes, harsh neon pink and cyan highlights, backlighting from stage spots. Sound: Industrial techno beat, high-pitched electronic synths, rhythmic mechanical scratching, crowd cheering. prompts.text: Decided to save some credits on Seedance 2.0 by going with 7 seconds. Bad idea. 7 seconds is just not enough to show anything these days. 😅 Epic cinematic storm-fantasy sequence on a cliffside monastery above a violent sea at night. A colossal sea titan made of black water, broken ship hulls, and bioluminescent eyes rises beside the cliffs during a lightning storm. Phase 1: immense build-up. Bells swing in gale force wind, monks run across stone bridges carrying lanterns, waves detonate against the lower walls, and the titan’s outline slowly assembles from the ocean itself. The camera is unstable, fighting the wind, whipping between terrified faces and the impossible form rising in fragments. Phase 2: catastrophic event. The titan lifts one arm the size of a tower and brings it down onto the outer seawall. Stone explodes outward. A bridge collapses. Lantern fire scatters into the rain. The camera is thrown sideways, briefly losing the horizon as debris and spray consume the frame. Phase 3: sudden subtraction. All sound drops to a low muffled underwater tone. Rain still falls, but softly. The camera, once chaotic, now drifts in a slow stabilized move through the aftermath: broken prayer flags hanging still, scattered embers hissing out in puddles, stunned monks kneeling in silence, fragments of blue bioluminescence sliding back down the shattered stones toward the sea. Detail priority: cracked masonry, rain threading off eaves, lantern glass fragments, trembling hands, luminous seawater retreating through carved channels, distant thunder now far away. Ending: the titan is gone. On the broken edge of the monastery, a single giant wet handprint glows faintly on the stone before fading. Final wide shot at dawn: the ruined cliff temple overlooks a suddenly calm sea.

prompts.text: [CORE IDEA] A cinematic time-freeze sequence in Riyadh featuring a Saudi man in traditional attire walking through a frozen city. [STYLE & TONE] Ultra-realistic cinematic urban fantasy, grounded time-freeze concept, authentic Saudi culture, stylish and playful tone, subtle humor. Natural daylight, clean color grading, realistic Riyadh atmosphere. [CHARACTER] Main subject: Young Saudi male wearing a clean white thobe, red-and-white shemagh, black agal. Confident, relaxed, charismatic, slightly mischievous personality. [ENVIRONMENT] Modern Riyadh street, Saudi Arabia. Arabic shop signs, sidewalks, moving cars, realistic traffic. Crowd of Saudi pedestrians: Men in thobes with shemagh/ghutra Women in black abayas, some in modest casual outfits [CAMERA & TECH] Smooth cinematic tracking, subtle orbit shots, natural handheld stability. Lens mix: 35mm & 50mm. Depth of field: realistic, soft background separation. Motion: grounded and fluid (no exaggerated AI motion). [TIMELINE – 15 SECONDS] 0.0 – 2.5s Frontal tracking shot (50mm). The Saudi man walks confidently through a busy Riyadh street. Natural movement, people crossing, cars passing. He suddenly CLAPS once. → At the exact clap: TIME FREEZES Everything stops instantly mid-motion (people, cars, even clothing movement). 2.5 – 7s Lateral tracking (35mm). He keeps walking while everything around him is completely frozen. He looks around with a subtle smile, amused and curious. 7 – 11.5s Tracking + slight orbit (35mm). He interacts playfully with frozen people: Takes a sip from a frozen person’s drink Waves his hand in front of someone’s face Adjusts a person’s pose slightly All frozen elements remain perfectly still (no micro-movements). 11.5 – 15s Frontal tracking (50mm). He continues walking forward confidently through the frozen city. Still holding the drink briefly, then casually drops his hand. End with a cinematic forward motion as he walks past frozen pedestrians. [QUALITY & RENDERING] Photorealistic 8K, highly detailed Saudi environment, accurate clothing physics, clean freeze effect, zero background jitter. Consistent character identity, stable faces, no morphing. Natural lighting, realistic shadows, cinematic polish. [NEGATIVE PROMPT] No face distortion, no clothing glitches, no floating objects, no AI warping, no crowd movement after freeze, no duplicated people, no unrealistic animation.

prompts.text: Live action cinematic action film. A breathtakingly beautiful female warrior in her late 20s, with long dark braided hair and battle-worn leather and steel armor, faces off against a massive armored villain on a rain-soaked rooftop at night. She moves with lightning speed — a flurry of precise sword strikes creating arcing trails of steel. Her eyes burn with fierce determination. Slow-motion close-up of their blades locking. Rain splatters dramatically off the metal. Shot in the style of a high-budget Hollywood action film — anamorphic lens flare, shallow depth of field, moody blue-orange color grade. prompts.text: This is what happens when a mage stops holding back Seedance 2.0 is live on @SJinn_Agent prompt Cinematic 15-Second Fantasy Battle — Western Female Mage A devastated battlefield of broken stone and burning wreckage under a smoke-choked sky. Dark atmosphere with glowing embers drifting through the air. Shot in cinematic 2.35:1 widescreen with shallow depth of field and strong contrast between deep shadows and vivid orange-red fire magic. Only natural, in-world sound. 0–3s — Awakening the Spell Low-angle cinematic shot from near ground level. A Western female mage, late 20s, long blonde hair loosely tied with strands whipping across her face, stands atop fractured rubble. She wears a worn, ancient dark robe with torn edges. She lowers into a grounded combat stance, steady and deliberate. Her hands move rapidly in controlled, intricate patterns, tracing glowing sigils in the air. Small embers spark to life at her fingertips, pulsing faintly. Sound: low-frequency magical vibration building, fabric shifting, distant wind cutting through ruins. 3–6s — Energy Surge Slightly elevated medium shot. With a sudden forward motion, she drives both hands outward. Multiple rotating magic glyphs ignite around her arms, layered and spinning with increasing speed. Their fiery glow lights up her face, revealing a focused, unwavering expression. Highlights shimmer in her eyes as her hair catches the backlight of the flames. Sound: rising arcane resonance, energy crackling, a sharp breath released with control. 6–9s — The Threat Emerges Wide establishing shot. A massive serpent-like dragon rises in the distance, its body coiling through smoke and fire. Across the battlefield, numerous glowing spell circles appear simultaneously, forming a vast containment field in the air and across the ground. The creature lashes violently against the invisible barrier as the symbols intensify. Sound: deep, echoing roar layered with a heavy magical pulse, ground rumbling beneath the force. 9–12s — Breaking Point Rapid sequence of sharp cuts: – Close-up of her eyes reflecting burning light – Tight shot of her shouting “EXPLOSION!” – Angles of the creature struggling against tightening magical constructs – Rotating camera movement circling both mage and spell formation The brightness surges, shadows flicker erratically, and the energy reaches a critical peak. Sound: her voice echoes outward, followed by a sudden dip into near silence with a dense, rising distortion. 12–15s — Cataclysm Extreme wide shot with sweeping camera motion around the battlefield. The entire magical formation collapses inward and erupts into a towering column of fire and raw energy. The serpent is consumed instantly. A powerful shockwave bursts outward, scattering debris and dust in all directions. At the center, a dense red-violet core pulses before fading. Sound: thunderous explosion, debris crashing, roaring wind tearing through the ruins. Fade to black.

prompt

Cinematic 15-Second Fantasy Battle — Western Female Mage

A devastated battlefield of broken stone and burning wreckage under a smoke-choked sky. Dark atmosphere with glowing embers drifting through the air. Shot in cinematic 2.35:1 widescreen with shallow depth of field and strong contrast between deep shadows and vivid orange-red fire magic. Only natural, in-world sound.

0–3s — Awakening the Spell
Low-angle cinematic shot from near ground level. A Western female mage, late 20s, long blonde hair loosely tied with strands whipping across her face, stands atop fractured rubble. She wears a worn, ancient dark robe with torn edges.
She lowers into a grounded combat stance, steady and deliberate. Her hands move rapidly in controlled, intricate patterns, tracing glowing sigils in the air. Small embers spark to life at her fingertips, pulsing faintly.

Sound: low-frequency magical vibration building, fabric shifting, distant wind cutting through ruins.

3–6s — Energy Surge
Slightly elevated medium shot. With a sudden forward motion, she drives both hands outward.

Multiple rotating magic glyphs ignite around her arms, layered and spinning with increasing speed. Their fiery glow lights up her face, revealing a focused, unwavering expression. Highlights shimmer in her eyes as her hair catches the backlight of the flames.
Sound: rising arcane resonance, energy crackling, a sharp breath released with control.

6–9s — The Threat Emerges
Wide establishing shot. A massive serpent-like dragon rises in the distance, its body coiling through smoke and fire.

Across the battlefield, numerous glowing spell circles appear simultaneously, forming a vast containment field in the air and across the ground. The creature lashes violently against the invisible barrier as the symbols intensify.

Sound: deep, echoing roar layered with a heavy magical pulse, ground rumbling beneath the force.
9–12s — Breaking Point
Rapid sequence of sharp cuts:
– Close-up of her eyes reflecting burning light
– Tight shot of her shouting “EXPLOSION!”
– Angles of the creature struggling against tightening magical constructs
– Rotating camera movement circling both mage and spell formation

The brightness surges, shadows flicker erratically, and the energy reaches a critical peak.

Sound: her voice echoes outward, followed by a sudden dip into near silence with a dense, rising distortion.

12–15s — Cataclysm
Extreme wide shot with sweeping camera motion around the battlefield.
The entire magical formation collapses inward and erupts into a towering column of fire and raw energy. The serpent is consumed instantly. A powerful shockwave bursts outward, scattering debris and dust in all directions.
At the center, a dense red-violet core pulses before fading.
Sound: thunderous explosion, debris crashing, roaring wind tearing through the ruins.
Fade to black.

prompts.text: Komut / Prompt A lone figure sits atop the skeletal remains of a skyscraper in a post-apocalyptic cityscape, legs dangling over the edge. The ruined metropolis stretches endlessly below — crumbling concrete towers, shattered glass facades, and twisted metal beams silhouetted against the dying light. The final sunset blazes across the horizon with otherworldly colors: deep crimson bleeding into electric violet, streaked with molten gold and bruised indigo. Ash and dust particles drift through the air, catching the light like embers. Shot 1 — Extreme wide establishing shot from ground level, low angle looking up at the towering ruins. The figure appears impossibly small against the vast decaying skyline. Slow crane up reveals the scale of destruction. Shot 2 — Medium shot from behind the figure at rooftop level. Camera positioned slightly below, capturing his silhouette framed against the apocalyptic sunset. His shoulders are slumped, head tilted upward. Gentle wind stirs his tattered

prompts.text: Seedance2.0 It's up and running. The Charlotte inside the signboard materializes, and you can easily create vlog-style videos too. This can also be applied to short videos on TikTok and the like. [The prompt is below] Feel free to tweak it for your own uses. Create a short vlog-style video where the white-haired female character from the life-sized panel in the foreground comes to life as if stepping out from the signboard into the real world, referencing the uploaded photo of the event venue. At first, she stands motionless amid the venue scenery. In the next instant, a faint blue light and particles trace her outline, and she naturally steps forward from the panel's surface. She takes on a three-dimensional form as a living being, not the texture of paper or a signboard, with her hair and coat gently swaying. While lightly showing the card in her right hand, she speaks to the camera in a friendly manner. Her expression is calm and slightly cool, yet with the natural closeness of a vlog. Her gaze is mostly directed at the camera. After that, she walks lightly with the venue in the background, looking around, occasionally leaning in toward the camera. Like a vlog shot on a smartphone, the camera has a slight handheld feel, following at close range. Keep the venue's atmosphere, the flow of people, and the booth vibes intact, while making the character the star. Blend the anime-style character naturally into the live-action background. Keep the staging understated—no over-the-top flair, just a touch of that mysterious light effect for the initial "emergence" moment. Overall, it's cinematic and natural, leaning more stylish than cute. At the end, the character gives a slight smile, lightly holds up the card, and wraps up facing the camera. High quality, live-action background + cel-shaded anime-style character, natural depth, vlog vibe, handheld camera, event venue, faint blue particles, subtle glow, friendly narration. I think it's reproducible, so give it a shot with your own characters too.

prompts.text: I used Midjourney to generate the main visual as a reference SUBJECTS: Male dancer, Black, defined facial features, short curly hair, focused and intense gaze with a sense of pressure, broad shoulders and narrow waist; wearing an open black stage outfit. Female dancer, White, clear and delicate skin, elegant temperament, long neck, defined collarbones, smooth shoulder line; wearing a white stage outfit, elegant and stylish. ENVIRONMENT: Main stage of a dance competition, reflective floor, clean center stage with no clutter, precisely controlled overhead spotlights, sharp and clean light beams, overall environment minimal, restrained, and pure. MUSIC: Slow-building minimalist electronic music, supported by subtle percussive hits, minimal melody, restrained harmonic changes. The overall tone leans more toward intimacy and tension rather than energy. The pressure and intensity gradually build with the movement without excessive layering, ultimately resolving in a clean, decisive final sound cue. TIMELINE: SHOT 1: Medium shot, 35mm, circular push-in. Both dancers are already in rotation. The male lifts the female by the waist with one hand, generating upward force. The female uses the momentum to leap and complete a turn. Her toes lightly touch the ground, creating a reflection before lifting again, landing onto the shoulder position. SFX: Beat starts + subtle friction sound SHOT 2: Medium-wide shot, 28mm, low-angle push upward. The male lowers to build force and explosively throws the female. She performs a smooth reverse flip in the air, extends her body, then contracts and is precisely caught by the wrist, transitioning seamlessly into a glide. SFX: Low-frequency impact SHOT 3: Close-up, 50mm, lateral tracking. The female slides along the ground while being pulled upward, forming a rotational axis. SFX: Continuous rhythmic beats SHOT 4: Medium shot, 35mm, accelerating circular movement. The male lifts the female overhead. She rotates in the air, extends her body, then naturally contracts and descends. SFX: Intensifying beat SHOT 5: Medium-wide shot, 24mm, wide circular movement. Both dancers move toward each other and jump simultaneously. After landing, they glide outward and reconnect through their hands. SFX: Air slicing sound SHOT 6: Close-up, 70mm, steady push-in. The male completes a high lift. The female performs a vertical spin mid-air, briefly suspending while fully extended. SFX: Brief musical pause SHOT 7: Medium shot, 35mm, slight push-in. As the female descends, she is precisely caught with one hand. They transition into a final partnered pose. Lighting focuses tightly on both dancers. SFX: Audience erupts in applause

Seedance 2.0 {part-4}

Trying something new 

on 
@PixVerse_
 

Prompt:

A hyper-realistic, experimental cinematic sequence set within an endless, monochrome void. The only objects visible are millions of suspended, geometric glass sculptures of varying shapes—spheres, polyhedrons, shattered shards. The void isn't black; it’s an oppressive, flat greyscale that devours depth. Suddenly, the void itself cracks. It’s a fissure not in a wall, but in the texture of space, emitting a deafening sound like shattering ceramic.

Emerging violently from this cosmic fracture is a massive Origami Kraken, constructed entirely from sentient, folding geometric paper that is constantly shifting and reconfiguring its shape. The Kraken doesn't just swim; its movement causes the air to instantly crystalize into jagged, impossible architectures.

Perched upon the Kraken's head is a Gothic-Industrial Painter, covered in a suit of canvas and leather straps. Instead of paint, their "brush" is a high-powered plasma welder. As the Kraken moves, the Painter isn't just surviving; they are actively forging impossible geometries using molten light, welding new, glowing structures onto the Kraken’s body, causing portions of the origami creature to shift from paper to a complex, transparent glass and light mesh.

The Twist:
As the Kraken roars—a sound of folding metal—the monochrome void violently inverts. The shadows become blinding white, and the glass sculptures begin to reflect a universe of previously unseen, chaotic, non-Euclidean colors (colors that shouldn’t exist, like "dark neon" or "glowing shadow").

Suddenly, a localized reality distortion occurs: a swarm of Vantablack hummingbirds manifests. These creatures aren’t biological; they are actual, kinetic shadows that absorb all light, launching from the monochrome distortions to attack the painter and the Kraken. The camera perspective performs a disorienting 90-degree whip-pan shift, turning the horizontal movement into a vertical free-fall, following the painter as they leap from the Kraken's head, dodging the Vantablack hummingbirds, using their plasma welder to create temporary, glowing shields of light that disintegrate the shadow-creatures mid-flight. The painter is diving toward the fractal-shifted glass-light mesh of the Kraken’s body.

Lighting & Atmosphere:
The scene is a claustrophobic paradox. The initial lighting is a severe, high-contrast monochrome (grey, black, white), which is suddenly and violently interrupted by the impossible colors (colors that shift and glow in ways physics doesn't allow) from the Kraken's new structure and the inverted void. The main light source shifts from a flat grey to the intense, localized ultraviolet and neon-orange radiance of the plasma welder.

Audio Profile:
The sound begins with a deafening, low-frequency grinding of the void cracking. The Kraken’s movements are marked by the high-pitched, mechanical screeching of shifting origami paper. When the Vantablack hummingbirds launch, the audio shifts to a unique sound: a mix of silent compression and static hiss. A frantic, experimental glitch-orchestral score (strings distorted by digital noise) builds to the void inversion. The plasma welder ignites with a high-pitched, electric whine, cutting to absolute sonic stillness as the camera dips below the inverted void's horizon, leaving only the faint, melodic resonance of the Impossible Colors.

prompts.text: A hyper-real cinematic action sequence set in a dense, rain-soaked forest near a steep cliff with a thunderous waterfall. The ground is muddy, covered in wet leaves, moss, and exposed roots. Sound design includes distant gunfire, heavy breathing, splashing footsteps, and the constant roar of falling water. YOUR IMAGE as the woman or man! A handheld camera tracks a woman sprinting through the forest at full speed. Gunshots crack behind her—bullets strike trees and mud nearby. The shooters are never seen, only heard. She bursts out toward a cliff and suddenly skids on the wet ground, stopping inches from the edge. She steadies herself and looks down—vertigo-inducing view of a massive waterfall crashing below. Gunfire echoes closer. She quickly raises her wrist and taps a concealed device: three sharp beeps. Beside her sits an old, wide tree stump—unevenly cut years ago, its rim jagged, surface covered in moss, grass, and small mushrooms. The bark subtly separates along natural cracks, opening just enough. No mechanical feel—completely organic. She slips inside and climbs down into darkness. The stump closes seamlessly, restoring its overgrown, untouched appearance. Moments later, soldiers arrive at the ledge. They scan the cliff and waterfall. One says, slightly out of breath: “Sir... she’s not here. I think she jumped.” Another replies: “She wouldn’t survive that fall.” Mid-sentence, sound carries through— Cut inside: a dim underground chamber formed within thick roots and earth. She watches through a narrow slit, breathing heavily but safe. The roar of the waterfall swells. No hard cut. Feel free to ask any questions below - Made using Seedance 2.

Prompt:
A hyper-real cinematic action sequence set in a dense, rain-soaked forest near a steep cliff with a thunderous waterfall. The ground is muddy, covered in wet leaves, moss, and exposed roots. Sound design includes distant gunfire, heavy breathing, splashing footsteps, and the constant roar of falling water. YOUR IMAGE as the woman or man! 

A handheld camera tracks a woman sprinting through the forest at full speed. Gunshots crack behind her—bullets strike trees and mud nearby. The shooters are never seen, only heard. She bursts out toward a cliff and suddenly skids on the wet ground, stopping inches from the edge. She steadies herself and looks down—vertigo-inducing view of a massive waterfall crashing below.

Gunfire echoes closer.

She quickly raises her wrist and taps a concealed device: three sharp beeps. Beside her sits an old, wide tree stump—unevenly cut years ago, its rim jagged, surface covered in moss, grass, and small mushrooms. The bark subtly separates along natural cracks, opening just enough. No mechanical feel—completely organic.

She slips inside and climbs down into darkness. The stump closes seamlessly, restoring its overgrown, untouched appearance.

Moments later, soldiers arrive at the ledge. They scan the cliff and waterfall.

One says, slightly out of breath:
“Sir… she’s not here. I think she jumped.”
Another replies:
“She wouldn’t survive that fall.”
Mid-sentence, sound carries through—
Cut inside: a dim underground chamber formed within thick roots and earth. She watches through a narrow slit, breathing heavily but safe.
The roar of the waterfall swells. No hard cut.

Feel free to ask any questions below - Made using Seedance 2.
