#Seedance2 #AIVideo Prompt:

15-second text-to-video continuous single-take sequence. Raw 70s/80s grindhouse horror style. Heavy analog film grain, high contrast, photorealistic practical effects. Heavy speed ramps. NO CUTS.

[SUBJECT DESCRIPTIONS]
- HEROINE: Ultimate 80s grindhouse final girl, striking athletic early 20s. Wet messy hair, fierce determined expression. Wearing a dark high-cut 80s athletic one-piece swimsuit. Alluring yet lethal.
- THE MONSTER: Slimy aquatic beast with dark scales, jagged teeth, milky dead eyes, muscular and visceral.

[TIMELINE SCRIPT]

0–3s: [THE DEEP END]
Action: She treads water frantically as a massive slimy silhouette rises fast from the pool drain.
Camera: Underwater low-angle looking up at her floating silhouette with distorted neon surface light.
Audio: Muffled bass, panicked breathing, distant synthwave.

3–6s: [THE AMBUSH]
Action: Beast lunges upward. She contorts backward in extreme slow-motion as its jaws snap inches from her face.
Camera: Fast underwater orbit locking into tight profile.
Audio: Violent water rush dropping to heavy sub-bass hum.

6–9s: [THE GRAPPLE]
Action: Beast grabs her thigh. She twists and drives her heel brutally into its snout.
Camera: Shaky handheld underwater medium shot.
Audio: Thudding impacts, monstrous screech, frantic thrashing.

9–12s: [THE DRAW]
Action: She propels backward and draws a serrated dive knife from her calf in elegant slow-motion.
Camera: Slight dolly-back into heroic tense framing.
Audio: Echoing metallic *schwing* + rising 80s horror synth swell.

12–15s: [THE STRIKE]
Action: Beast charges. She lunges forward and drives the knife deep into its skull as they sink into darkness.
Camera: Slow tilt-down watching them plunge into the deep end.
Audio: Brutal muffled puncture thud fading into crushing underwater silence.

[CONSTRAINTS]
Single unbroken take. Strictly photorealistic 80s grindhouse look. Accurate underwater physics, light refraction, and bubble dynamics.

prompts.author: @Dheepanratnam
prompts.text: Video prompt seedance 2.0 - 15s text to video The Storm Shepherd vs the Glass Locust King A cinematic weather war. A nomadic shepherd in layered sky-blue robes stands on a high desert ridge during a sandstorm. He fights using a hooked crook, wind channels, and charged storm clouds. His enemy is a king locust made of translucent chitin, lightning veins, and a swarm-crown of crystal insects. The setting transitions from dune ridge → storm trench → lightning plateau → salt crater. 0–3 seconds: the locust king descends out of the storm with a shrieking crown of glass-winged insects. The shepherd drives his crook into the sand and pulls a vortex of wind upward, forcing the first wave of insects into a spiraling wall. Close-ups of cracked lips, cloth snapping, glass wings, and charged dust. 3–7 seconds: the locust king splinters into swarming formations that attack from every direction across a trench carved by wind. The shepherd walks into the storm, redirecting gusts with broad arm sweeps. Each movement creates visible wind corridors that slam the swarm into rock spires. Sand peels off the ground in ribbons. Close-ups of sandals sliding, storm static along the crook, chitin fractures, and lightning flicker under skin. 7–10 seconds: the battle climbs onto a lightning plateau. The locust king towers above him with a giant fan of translucent wings reflecting the whole storm. The shepherd raises both hands and pulls a fork of lightning out of the sky like a rope, then whips it in a massive arc that shears off half the swarm crown. Orbit camera, desert lightning, flying crystal limbs. 10–12 seconds: rapid tracking shot as the shepherd runs across a collapsing salt shelf while the king reforms and dives with all wings screaming. He hooks the crook into its thorax and drags it downward into a charged crater. 12–15 seconds: overhead slow fall into the salt crater as storm winds spiral inward. The shepherd lands first while the locust king breaks apart into rain, glass fragments, and dead static that spiderwebs through the salt. Final frame: one intact locust wing ringing in the wind. Style: epic storm fantasy, desert electricity, glass insect textures, sand and lightning choreography, high-contrast sky warfare.

prompts.author: @johnAGI168
prompts.text: Blood Moon Approaches Eclipse Moon Vampire Princess Ultra-cool transformation transition effect, recreating popular short videos Seedance 2.0 All-in-One Reference Prompt Shot One: Everyday Home Scene Time Segment: 0:00 to 0:02 Shot Distance and Type: Medium shot, handheld follow-cam Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera subtly sways with the character's movements, with a light, upbeat, and lively rhythm. The camera follows the trajectory of the girl's arm waving, finally facing the prop she raises. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The girl is wearing white loungewear pajamas patterned with Crayon Shin-chan designs and a bear hairband. She holds a sheet of white paper rolled into the shape of a telescope. She first playfully waves this "paper telescope" with a smile on her face, then directly aims one end of the "paper telescope" at and fully presses it against the lens, using the physical darkness inside the paper tube to block the frame, creating a perfect transition medium. Visual Effects: No obvious effects, belonging to everyday real-light-and-shadow recording. Cleverly utilizes the dark circular hole inside the paper tube rolled into a telescope shape as a physical transition entry medium. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Warm white tones, bright. Mood is relaxed, everyday, and lively, laying the groundwork for the dramatic contrast to follow. Shot Two: Spacetime Tunnel Transition Time Segment: 0:02 to 0:04 Shot Distance and Type: Close-up transitioning to full wide shot, first-person perspective push-in Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera rapidly pushes forward at high speed, visually as if directly penetrating the inner hole of the "paper telescope" the girl pressed against the lens in the previous second, delivering an extremely strong visual impact and a sense of extreme speed. Main Subject Actions and Expression: No character subject, primarily showcasing the process of traversing space. Visual Effects: Intense CG visual effects, deep red vortex and wormhole effects with a strong sense of suction and spatial distortion, followed by bats flying out from the depths of the frame as visual guides. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Interwoven dark red and black. Mood shifts instantly from relaxed to mysterious, dangerous, and filled with a sense of the unknown. Shot Three: Vampire Princess Descends Time Segment: 0:04 to 0:06 Shot Distance and Type: Overhead full wide shot transitioning to medium shot, panning camera (downward pan) Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera pans from top to bottom, aligning with the character's upward gaze, with speed transitioning from fast to slow motion, creating tremendous visual tension. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The transformed vampire princess (white hair, elven ears, white ornate gown, red nails) gazes up at the lens from below, extending one hand toward the lens as if inviting or casting a spell, her expression alluring yet brimming with dangerous allure. Visual Effects: Strong slow-motion (high-frame-rate) treatment, with a large amount of red petals or light-spot particles drifting in the foreground, a red magical halo floating above the character's head, and a background of intersecting black Gothic tree branches and net-like structures. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Intense dark red blended with high-contrast cool white tones. Mood is mysterious, seductive, and infused with Gothic opulence. Shot Four: Alluring Freeze-Frame Time Segment: 0:06 to 0:09 Shot Distance and Type: Medium close-up, with a slight handheld push-pull feel Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera remains relatively fixed but with a breathing and subtle tremor sensation, syncing with the music's beat for a strong rhythmic pulse. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The character holds the extended-hand pose, lightly touching her lips with the other hand, her gaze locked directly on the lens, her expression radiating immense allure and oppressive intensity. Visual Effects: Incorporates frame-skipping, rapid flickers, subtle screen distortion (glitch-fault style), and radial blur effects, paired with high-frequency red light flashes to amplify visual impact and cyberpunk vibes. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Large areas of high-saturation red background, with the character at the absolute visual center. Mood is high-energy, intensely visually aggressive. Shot Five: Blood Moon Flight Time Segment: 0:09 to 0:12 Shot Distance and Type: Long shot, fixed camera Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera remains steady, with elements in the frame exhibiting a slow floating sensation. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The character unfurls massive demonic wings, hovering in the night sky in an expansive pose. Visual Effects: Grand scene compositing, with a massive blood moon in the background, rendered with dark red cloud layers; slow-motion flocks of bats accompany in flight, evoking a powerful epic atmosphere. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Dark fantasy tones dominated by black and red. Mood is grand, awe-inspiring, and brimming with dominance, perfectly echoing the video's theme.

prompts.author: @ShadeLurk
prompts.text: Shot 2-1 (0s–5s) Medium shot, slow dolly in. A morning market in the fused city. Glowing plants grown by elves with magic stand alongside Earth's vegetables and fruits, and mithril trinkets forged by dwarves are arranged in wooden crates. An elf merchant with pointed ears exchanges goods with a smiling Earth human. A beastkin girl with animal ears and a tail curiously picks up an Earth fruit. Soft morning natural light, warm color temperature, cinematic, shallow depth of field. Narration (low, resonant male Japanese voice): "Elves brought magic, and dwarves brought technology." White Japanese subtitles at the bottom of the screen: "Elves brought magic, and dwarves brought technology." Shot 2-2 (5s–10s) Medium shot, slow horizontal pan. A street in the fused city. At the terrace seating of an Earth café, an elf woman shows a scroll inscribed with runes to an Earth student. In the background, a dwarf craftsman assembles a spirit-powered device alongside an Earth engineer. Street signs feature both Japanese and elvish script. Warm afternoon light, golden hour, warm color temperature, cinematic, film grain. Narration (low, resonant male Japanese voice): "Beastkin brought keen senses, and dwarves brought engineering. Each contribution reshaped everyday life." White Japanese subtitles at the bottom of the screen: "Beastkin brought keen senses, and dwarves brought engineering. Each contribution reshaped everyday life." Shot 2-3 (10s–15s) Wide shot, slow tilt up. A panoramic view of the fused city at dusk. Elven vines and dwarven gear decorations beautifully entwine the framework of Tokyo Tower, forming a magnificent hybrid structure. At the base in the plaza, Earth humans and elves run stalls together; in the sky, silhouettes of angel-like wings gracefully circle, while beastkin children race around with Earth children. Lighting blending sunset oranges with the pale blue glow of elven magic, a grand sense of scale, cinematic 4K, film grain. Narration (low, resonant male Japanese voice): "Where magic and science intertwine—a new world begins to turn." White Japanese subtitles at the bottom of the screen: "Where magic and science intertwine—a new world begins to turn."

prompts.text: The host! Prompt on Seedance 2 : A lone explorer with a headlamp enters a vast arctic ice cave, crystalline blue walls glittering in the narrow beam of light. Slow push-in follows through the cave entrance, each step crunching on frost, breath visible in the freezing air, the headlamp illuminating intricate ice formations that stretch into darkness. A deep rumble shakes loose ice from the ceiling. The camera shifts to urgent shaky handheld, swinging wildly as the explorer spins around, the headlamp catching glimpses of something massive moving in the shadows, sickly pale green bioluminescent veins pulsing along the cave walls. The perspective snaps to a wide static shot as the creature emerges fully, a towering insectoid horror covered in translucent ice-like chitin, green light pulsing from within its body, dwarfing the terrified explorer. Glacial blue ice environment, bioluminescent creature design, horror lighting. 16:9 cinematic.

prompts.text: PromptShare Cinematic Battle prompt for Seedance 2 made in @invideoOfficial PROMPT Character A highly trained female operative in a sleek black tactical suit, calm, focused, controlled breathing, sharp eyes scanning constantly. Dual pistols in hand, precise and efficient. 0-3s Camera starts inside a luxury bank. Slow push through a tense standoff—security guards aiming, civilians frozen. She stands in the center, perfectly still. 3-5s Without warning—everything explodes into motion. She steps forward. Rapid precise shots—each movement minimal, controlled, no wasted motion. 5-7s Camera locks close to her, orbiting as she moves through guards. She uses environment—pillars, desks—flowing movement, never stopping. 7-9s Transition through glass reflections. She slides across polished floor, firing mid-motion, bullets impacting surfaces around her. 9-11s Tight corridor sequence. Close-quarters engagement, ultra fast reactions, micro head turns, instant targeting. 11-13s Massive push forward into main hall. Camera pulls wide—chaos everywhere. She moves through it like it’s slowed down. 13-15s Final moment. She exits through shattered glass doors into daylight. Doesn’t look back. Behind her—delayed impacts, everything collapses. Camera freezes on her walking away. Continuous tracking shot, tight proximity + dynamic orbit + whip transitions masked by movement Luxury bank interior, marble, glass, reflections, daylight contrast Ultra realistic, hollywood heist action, john wick gun-fu, precise choreography, high tension, fluid motion, cinematic lighting, no distortion, no stretching

prompts.text: 2. Upload your Video reference to Seedance and reference the action in the prompt Specific animation references work best with short clips, such as movements lasting 2–3 seconds. In your prompt, try to specify clearly when the reference should be executed. You can use timestamps like "in the second 00:03" or "in the second 5 of the shot," or describe when the action happens using logical connectors: while, then, after that, before. Prompt Video 1: "Video1"= teleport appear VFX. "Video2"= teleport dissapear VFX Do a japanese fast paced cut high stylized figh scene. (0-2s) "Image1" first frame. Characters look at each other, prepare for fight and dissapear doing a "teleport dissapear VFX" with smear lines in the style of "Video2" (2s-5s): Camera starts with a wide shot of the environment, empty, and then character 1 suddenly appears doing a "teleport appear VFX" movement in the style of "Video1". He then he flights righ to the camera with his punch charged, typical sakuga figh shot where the camera shows his face extremely close to camera, and then focus in the punch (5s-6s) Wide shot of character one approaching charater 2 with his punch . He throws the punch but character 2 dodges it dissapearing with a "teleport dissapear VFX" movemente, in the style of "Video1" (6s-8s): shot in low angle showing character 1 first missing the punch and then character 2 appearing behind character one with a "teleport appear VFX" in the style of "Video1" and executing a kick with full force that imapcts in the head of character 2. (8s-10s) wide shot of character one thrown to the air at high speed, with lot of smear frames, movment directly aproaching the camera (10s-12s) wide shot, ccharacter 2 dissapears doing a "teleport dissapear VFX" movement in the style of "Video2" to go near the character thrown in the air (12s-15s) character 2 appears next to character one with a "teleport appear VFX" movement in the style of "Video1" while character one is in the air at high speed and then performa an extremly violent punch, while the camera does an extreme push in to the punch Prompt Video 2: "Image1" as first-frame composition and character placement reference. "Video1" as special high-speed movement reference. Create an 11-second anime action shot with two characters in the same environment. Keep character identity consistent throughout. Use the first reference for the opening composition. Use the second reference only for the high-speed movement behavior, afterimage trails, motion rhythm, and transformation logic. 0s-2s: Two characters stand facing each other and talk briefly.Match the framing and starting pose from "Image1". Stable shot, clear readability, calm before the attack. 2s-6s: Character 1 launches a special high-speed move. Use "Video1" as the movement reference. Character 1 moves at lightning speed, rapidly dashing back and forth across the screen. Create elongated afterimage streaks, intense motion blur, smear frames, and fast directional trails. The real body is almost impossible to track.T he movement should feel explosive, aggressive, and extremely fast. 6s-8s: Character 2 turns his head left and right, trying to follow the attack. He is tense and alert, scanning both sides of the screen. The afterimage streaks keep flashing around him at high speed. 8s-11s: Character 2 executes a decisive sword slash that intercepts one of the high-speed afterimage streaks. The strike cuts through the elongated moving mass effect and breaks the technique. At that moment, Character 1 is forced out of the special high-speed form from"Video1" .The afterimage collapses and reveals the real body of Character 1. Character 1 falls to the ground after being stopped mid-technique. prompts.author: @AIishere_art
prompts.text: seedance 2 prompt - Cinematic 16:9 ultra-detailed fantasy battle trailer in the mythical realm of Aetherion. Massive floating islands of glowing crystal and ancient moss-covered ruins drift through endless golden skies. A colossal ancient dragon named Eldrath leads a desperate alliance of silver-armored elves and griffin riders to defend the Heart Crystal against the Obsidian Sorcerer Lord Vespera and his legion of shadow-wreathed demons. Explosive wide aerial shots and dynamic tracking camera capture the chaos: lightning storms, glowing arrows, griffin dive-bombing, and swirling black vortexes. Emotional close-ups of Eldrath and the half-elf sorceress Lirael as they combine powers in a blinding supernova of light. Hyper-realistic cinematic lighting, dramatic color grading, 8K, film grain, in the style of Guillermo del Toro and Peter Jackson.

prompts.author: @johnAGI168
prompts.text: An absolutely epic battle !!! Seedance 2.0 prompt Ultra-realistic cinematic disaster epic, single continuous shot, no cuts, no montage, no multiple-camera language, documentary-style realism, IMAX-scale clarity, natural film grain, high dynamic range, physically accurate daylight, realistic atmospheric perspective, authentic reflections, volumetric dust and smoke, true-to-life city lighting and environmental behavior. A real modern Chinese megacity in daytime: high-rise towers, elevated roads, broad avenues, plaza spaces, parked and moving cars, street signs, glass facades, all with the look of genuine live-action footage. The shot begins with chaos already underway: a colossal ancient giant python, far larger and more terrifying than a realistic anaconda, is violently rampaging through the city. Its thick muscular body whips between streets and buildings with horrifying speed and weight, crushing cars, smashing roadside structures, wrapping around building facades, lunging at fleeing crowds. People run in panic, vehicles collide, glass shards, concrete dust, torn billboards and debris fill the air. Everything feels like a real catastrophic emergency captured in one uninterrupted shot. Then the sky suddenly shifts. Clouds are torn apart at high speed and a gigantic Chinese dragon dives down from the heavens. This is not a cartoon dragon and has no wings. It is a believable colossal Eastern dragon, a mysterious real biological creature of the natural world, long serpentine body, no wings, powerful limbs, realistic muscles, bones, scale overlap, weathered reflective scales, layered shadows, natural skin tension, believable mass and inertia. As it moves, its body undulates through the air with convincing aerodynamic resistance, whiskers and mane trailing in turbulent airflow, subtle cloud vapor and disturbed mist forming around it. The dragon descends like a guardian over the city, precisely targeting the giant python below. In one continuous shot, the two beasts engage in a brutal close-range fight among skyscrapers and over shattered streets. The python coils, strikes, and thrashes between buildings; the Chinese dragon tears away constriction with its claws, coils around the serpent to overpower it, and finally bites hard into the python's upper body and neck. With overwhelming force, the dragon drags the struggling serpent up from the city ruins and lifts it into the sky. In the final moments, the wingless Chinese dragon powers upward by driving its long body through the air, carrying the still-writhing python away into the distant sky. Below, terrified citizens stop running and stare upward in stunned awe. The ruined city remains filled with smoke, debris, and sunlight cutting through haze, creating a final epic image of a divine dragon saving humanity. Keep the entire piece grounded in real-world physics, realistic destruction, believable scale, terrifying weight, restrained camera behavior, immersive live-action disaster authenticity, not stylized, not fantasy-cartoon, not game-like, absolutely photorealistic.

prompts.author: @IamEmily2050
prompts.text: Seedance V2 15-second cinematic romance, slow-burn emotional tone, one man and one woman only, both adults in their mid-20s, western-style leads, casual luxury wardrobe, dark quiet apartment living room at night, refined romantic tension, natural lip sync, no subtitles, no text on screen. Character continuity: Female lead: adult western woman, mid-20s, elegant natural beauty, long brunette hair with soft loose waves, minimal makeup, emotionally guarded but faintly amused, seated on the sofa. Outfit: soft ivory off-shoulder knit sweater, dark straight-leg jeans, barefoot, understated jewelry. Male lead: adult western man, mid-20s, handsome refined features, slightly messy dark hair, thin metal-frame glasses, calm warm expression. Outfit: charcoal knit sweater over a white T-shirt, dark trousers, sleeves pushed once, relaxed but polished. Environment: Upscale apartment living room, soft sofa, low coffee table, one warm lamp, deep evening shadows, muted neutral palette, intimate silence, shallow depth of field, premium film texture, modern romantic realism. 0-3s: Wide-to-medium slow push-in. She sits in one corner of the sofa with arms folded, looking away. He crosses the room and sits on the edge of the coffee table facing her, leaving a small respectful distance. Hold the silence and tension. 3-6s: Medium close-up on the man. He studies her face, voice low, calm, almost smiling: “I tried very hard to have an ordinary evening.” 6-9s: Close-up on the woman. She turns her eyes to him at last, cool but intrigued, with the faintest teasing edge: “And how did that go?” 9-12s: Close-up on the man. He lets out a quiet breath, gaze steady. He reaches toward a loose strand near her cheek, stopping just before touching: “Poorly. You were in all of it.” 12-15s: Side two-shot. She lightly catches his wrist before he pulls away, not rejecting him, only holding him there. A small unwilling smile appears: “That is not helping me stay angry.” Hold on the shared gaze, the restrained smile, and the unresolved tenderness. Motion and style rules: Slow elegant camera movement, meaningful pauses, micro-expressions, lingering eye contact, almost-touch tension, realistic hand motion, restrained acting, no kneeling, no raised voices, no crying, no extra characters, no exaggerated gestures, no waxy skin, no stiff posing, premium romantic realism, emotionally charged final frame.

prompts.author: @Gemalpha_88
prompts.text: : First-person perspective (POV), 8K hyper-realistic, 60fps fluid motion, dark fantasy aesthetic, cinematic lighting, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio. [00:00 - 00:05] SEGMENT 1: The Awakening (The Hook) "POV shot. Looking down at the user's hand (as seen in @image1 ), where glowing blue and black veins pulse with energy. The hand is gripping a swirling black and violet energy orb. The hand crushes the orb with a heavy grip. Instantly, a massive shockwave of purple lightning and dark smoke explodes outward. From the shadows on the ground, dozens of spectral, knight-like silhouettes with glowing eyes rise and kneel before the camera. The setting is a dark, ruined stone dungeon." [00:05 - 00:10] SEGMENT 2: The Onslaught & The Boss (The Body) "Fast-paced POV combat. The camera moves forward rapidly as the user's hand wields a jagged, glowing obsidian dagger, slashing through waves of grey stone monsters that crumble into dust upon impact. The shadow knights from segment one fight alongside the user. Suddenly, the ground shakes, and a colossal, 30-foot demonic titan with multiple red eyes and jagged armor emerges from the darkness, letting out a silent, earth-shaking roar. The user raises their left hand, charging a massive violet aura." [00:10 - 00:15] SEGMENT 3: The Final Surge (The Climax) "Extreme POV close-up. The user's hand reaches toward the giant titan. A colossal spectral shadow-giant manifests behind the camera, mimicking the user's movement. All the shadow energy in the room condenses into the user's palm. The user fires a massive beam of pure abyssal purple energy that pierces through the titan's chest. The titan slowly disintegrates into black ash and embers, its red eyes fading as it collapses. The screen shakes with a heavy bass effect as the purple veins on the user's arm glow one last time before fading to black." Cinematic gender transformation sequence: start with a male figure in a dark, mysterious environment, subtle seductive tension in body language. Begin slow transformation with close-ups on physical change: jawline softens, shoulders narrow, hips subtly shift, hair lengthens and flows. Use dramatic lighting and dynamic camera movement, soft glowing particles, smooth skin morphing, luminous eyes, halo effects, ethereal atmosphere. Add seductive emotional nuance without explicit content — lingering gaze, graceful posture, fluid silhouette, magnetic presence. Sequence seamless and cinematic, slow motion transformation blending male to female form, film-like color grading, atmospheric shadows and highlights, polished visual flow, intense but elegant aesthetic. A cinematic, hyper-realistic vertical shot of a male-to-female shapeshifter transformation in a dimly lit luxurious room. The left half of the body remains rugged and masculine, while the right half is transforming into a graceful, elegant female form. Skin ripples like liquid silk at the intersection, and clothing morphs seamlessly from a masculine jacket into flowing attire. Dramatic low-key lighting emphasizes contours, intricate textures, and the surreal transformation. Dynamic expression of surprise and awe. High contrast, 8k resolution. prompts.author: @ShadeLurk
prompts.text: Setting: Dark fortress interior with towering metal structures. Teal/cyan illumination leaks through gaps between massive pillars. Metallic reflective floor. Character: White-haired girl with red eyes. Mechanical angel in white armor plating. Wings on her back emit blue energy. [1: HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT WITH BOOST TRAILS] Extreme top-down angle. A tiny white light point zigzags across the fortress trailing blue energy lines. Concentric sonic-boom rings expand at each turning point. Wind-pressure particles scatter off the metal floor below. [2: CHARACTER CLOSE-UP → WEAPON AIM → FIRE → EXTREME FACE CLOSE-UP] Hard cut to low-angle close-up — the angel with wings spread, energy blades aimed forward in firing stance. She fires. Then the camera begins an agonizingly slow, deliberate zoom toward her face. It continues until only her glowing red eyes fill the entire frame. Pure intimidation. [3: BOOSTER ADJUSTMENT → CHARGE → ENERGY MAX → BOOST] From the red-eye extreme close-up, blue energy vents intensify in stages — blue → bright white. The entire screen whites out. An explosive flash of energy release. [4: HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT WITH BOOST TRAILS] Immediately after whiteout she streaks across the fortress at extreme speed. Blue beam trails cut diagonally across the frame. A targeting reticle flickers for an instant. [5: KICK TOWARD CAMERA] She dives from above and drives a kick straight at the camera — extreme low-angle POV from the target's perspective. Her armored leg fills the frame. Wing jets fire for added impact. [6: SAME KICK FROM DIFFERENT ANGLE → EXPLOSION] The same kick replayed from a different camera angle. On contact: cyan/white explosion → thick energy dust cloud → the dust lights up from inside as a secondary blast erupts. [7: CLOSE-UP → WEAPON AIM → AUTO-TARGETING → FULL BARRAGE] Dust clears to reveal the angel with all wings fully deployed. Each blue energy blade independently auto-adjusts its aim — blue/purple electrical arcs crackle as targeting locks on. Then every blade fires at once — continuous rapid-fire barrage, the entire screen consumed by cyan/white explosions. [8: BOOSTER ADJUSTMENT → CHARGE → MAX BOOST → HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT] Energy vents charge up again in stages. Blue → white → whiteout → explosive jet blast. She rockets away trailing blue energy across the fortress. [9: WEAPON READY POSE] Against the teal fortress backdrop she holds a static pose, energy blades aimed forward, wings fully spread. A faint blue aura shimmers around her.

[7: CLOSE-UP → WEAPON AIM → AUTO-TARGETING → FULL BARRAGE] Dust clears to reveal the angel with all wings fully deployed. Each blue energy blade independently auto-adjusts its aim — blue/purple electrical arcs crackle as targeting locks on. Then every blade fires at once — continuous rapid-fire barrage, the entire screen consumed by cyan/white explosions. [8: BOOSTER ADJUSTMENT → CHARGE → MAX BOOST → HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT] Energy vents charge up again in stages. Blue → white → whiteout → explosive jet blast. She rockets away trailing blue energy across the fortress. [9: WEAPON READY POSE] Against the teal fortress backdrop she holds a static pose, energy blades aimed forward, wings fully spread. A faint blue aura shimmers around her.

Hard cut to low-angle close-up — the angel with wings spread, energy blades aimed forward in firing stance. She fires. Then the camera begins an agonizingly slow, deliberate zoom toward her face. It continues until only her glowing red eyes fill the entire frame. Pure intimidation.

[3: BOOSTER ADJUSTMENT → CHARGE → ENERGY MAX → BOOST]

From the red-eye extreme close-up, blue energy vents intensify in stages — blue → bright white. The entire screen whites out. An explosive flash of energy release.

Immediately after whiteout she streaks across the fortress at extreme speed. Blue beam trails cut diagonally across the frame. A targeting reticle flickers for an instant.

She dives from above and drives a kick straight at the camera — extreme low-angle POV from the target's perspective. Her armored leg fills the frame. Wing jets fire for added impact.

[6: SAME KICK FROM DIFFERENT ANGLE → EXPLOSION]

The same kick replayed from a different camera angle. On contact: cyan/white explosion → thick energy dust cloud → the dust lights up from inside as a secondary blast erupts.

[8: BOOSTER ADJUSTMENT → CHARGE → MAX BOOST → HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT]

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 prompt share: NASA APOLLO SPACESUIT A7L "WORN ON ANOTHER WORLD" DNA: July 20, 1969. 102 hours, 45 minutes, 40 seconds into the mission. One small step. Arri Alexa 65. Ultra-wide. Grain progressive — starts clinical-clean, ends at maximum as the lunar surface appears. Key light: cold fluorescent Mission Control white. Secondary: harsh unfiltered solar light — no atmosphere to diffuse it. Flares: none in the lab sequence. One single overwhelming flare as the visor catches unfiltered sunlight on the lunar surface. Background: white clean room → vacuum of space → lunar surface at Tranquility Base. 00:00–00:02 · THE LAYERS A single thread of nylon being measured under a magnifying glass by a white-gloved technician's hand. Then: cut to the 21 layers of the A7L suit being assembled simultaneously — each layer materializing and wrapping the suit form: the liquid cooling garment first, its tubes threading through the fabric like a vascular system. Then the pressure bladder. Then the restraint layer. Then the thermal micrometeorite garment. Each layer distinct, each critical. Camera cross-section view through all 21 layers simultaneously. 00:02–00:04.5 · THE HELMET Speed 30%. The polycarbonate helmet shell forms — perfectly spherical, flawless. The visor assembly drops in: the gold-coated visor — 24-karat gold, 0.0002 inches thick — pressing over the outer shell. Camera macro on the gold surface: it reflects everything in warm gold — including us. The neck ring locks with a quarter-turn — the mechanism designed to never, under any circumstances, fail. 00:04.5–00:07 · PRESSURIZATION Speed 8%. The most important moment. Air flowing into the suit — the pressure building to 3.75 psi. Camera inside the suit as it pressurizes: the fabric stiffening, the gloves expanding slightly. Every seal tested by the pressure itself. The suit becomes a world — a personal atmosphere, the only thing between a human being and the void. 00:07–00:10 · THE CLEAN ROOM Speed 15%. The suited figure — complete — standing in the white clean room under brutal fluorescent light. Technicians moving around it in blurred background. The suit reads in extraordinary detail: the layers visible at the seams, the connector ports, the PLSS backpack life support system mounting points. A visor drops over the helmet. The astronaut disappears inside. 00:10–00:13 · TRANQUILITY BASE Speed 3%. The surface of the Moon. The suit boot pressing into lunar regolith in ultra-slow motion — the print forming in dust that has not been disturbed in 4.5 billion years. Camera at surface level — the boot print in sharp focus, the horizon of the Moon in the background, the Earth hanging above it, the size of a marble. The suit in the background, the gold visor catching unfiltered solar light. The single most overwhelming flare of any film in this collection — total, white, sacred. 00:13–00:14.5 · THE REVEAL Speed 1% — absolute stillness. The A7L floating in the void — the Earth behind it at distance. The gold visor reflects the Earth. The Earth reflected in the suit designed to walk on the Moon. Everything is contained in this one reflection. 00:14.5–00:15 · END CARD Silence — total. Then a single radio crackle. NASA worm logo. "Worn once. Changed everything." No grain — this moment is too clear, too real. Hold. Fade.

prompts.text: Prompt for Seedance 2.0: CHARACTERS: Define one figure in a Japanese festival mask with a staff at the curb, recoiling pedestrians at the sidewalk edge, and a colossal serpentine abyssal titan with a ridge-backed silhouette and city-scale mass that rises after the second strike. STAGE: Set Shibuya Crossing at night after rain with LED billboards, reflective asphalt, moving traffic, and clear geography before the street turns to liquid, keeps swallowing traffic, and opens beneath the masked figure. EMOTIONAL TARGET: Build from dread into epic ascent. COLOR LOGIC: Neon Noir TIMELINE: 00:00.0: Open on a high wide over the curb lanes at Shibuya Crossing. Hold the figure in a Japanese festival mask still against the crowd blur. SFX: crossing beeps, shoe chatter. 00:01.2: Hard cut to a 50mm dolly push on the Japanese mask. Let billboard light crawl across its lacquered surface. SFX: city wash narrows. 00:02.4: Insert cut to the right hand striking the asphalt with the staff for the first hit. Show the impact point clearly. SFX: wood crack, low hum. 00:03.6: Match cut to a ripple blasting through reflected neon on the road surface. Keep the ring centered and fast. SFX: sub-bass pulse. 00:04.8: Smash cut to a 28mm low wide. Let the asphalt soften and turn viscous around the first impact point before the liquid begins to spread. SFX: tar tear, liquid surge. 00:06.0: Hard cut to a front three-quarter wide as Shibuya lane paint slowly sags under the creeping surface. Drive the liquid outward in a heavy crawl. SFX: bubbling drain, horn choke. 00:07.2: Hard cut to moving cars starting to drop nose-first and sink mid-motion as the softened street finally gives way under them. Hold the delayed weight shift long enough to read it. SFX: horn choke, metal groan, glass rattle. 00:08.4: Hard cut wider as pedestrians recoil along the sidewalk edge and more moving cars keep dropping into the black surface behind them. Keep the masked figure centered on an unbroken patch of liquid. SFX: shouts, wave slap, horn choke. 00:09.6: Cut on action to a 35mm push-in. Let the masked figure plant the staff into that black surface for the second strike without breaking calm while cars continue sinking at the edges of frame. SFX: bass hit, rain hiss, metal groan. 00:10.8: Hard cut to a slow 85mm orbit. Reveal the black surface doming under the masked figure as the collapse continues behind them, then split it open in a tight circle around their feet. SFX: deep groan, resonance, distant impacts. 00:12.0: Land on a 24mm crane pullback. Reveal a colossal serpentine abyssal titan rising through that opening directly under the masked figure and lifting them on its head above the liquefied Shibuya Crossing while its long ridge-backed body coils through the flooded intersection below. SFX: rain roar, vertical surge, ominous note. 00:13.2: Continue into a full 360 orbit around the serpentine abyssal titan and the masked figure high above the crossing. Keep the city spinning below them while the titan's body coils through the black street and the ascent holds steady. SFX: rain hiss, deep resonance, distant horns. EXCLUDE: Avoid drifting facial identity, cartoon liquid physics, unreadable lane continuity, text overlays, and camera HUD.

prompts.text: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white blouse, a flowing burgundy skirt, and white sneakers, stands on the edge of a high rooftop at night, looking out over a glowing modern city. A shadowy figure suddenly rushes in from behind and violently pushes her off the edge. Her expression turns from confusion to shock as she begins to fall. The camera follows her in a dramatic wide-angle frontal tracking shot as she drops between towering neon skyscrapers, with intense motion blur, spinning perspective, and cinematic speed. As she keeps falling, the real city seamlessly transforms into a surreal dreamlike dimension: a tunnel of colossal stone faces and metallic sculptures, floating cathedrals and shattered monuments in the clouds, giant marble statues, swirling red fabric, a deep blue vortex of water and feathers, enormous carnival masks and theatrical faces, abstract glowing ribbons and floating orbs, and a mystical geometric tunnel made of glowing runes, sigils, and burning celestial spheres. At the climax, fiery golden rings and massive spinning artifacts surround her as she reaches out in panic. Suddenly she crashes back into reality on a crowded daytime city street, stumbling forward, breathing hard, and staring directly into the camera in disbelief. surreal urban fantasy, cinematic CGI, seamless transitions, strong emotional storytelling, Hollywood trailer energy, intense falling sequence, epic atmosphere, ultra detailed, volumetric lighting, 8k cinematic

PromptShare
High-speed chase sequence for Seedance 2

PROMPT
Ultra cinematic high-speed chase sequence, a powerful motorcycle racing at extreme speed along a rugged open terrain road, a military-style helicopter above tracking and engaging, constant tension and near-miss danger

- Ultra low tracking shot behind motorcycle, wheels spinning violently, dust and debris flying, helicopter shadow sweeping across ground
- Helicopter engages from above, bright impact bursts hitting ground around the bike, rider weaving aggressively at high speed, near misses
- Side tracking shot, motorcycle swerving between obstacles, rapid directional changes, camera staying perfectly locked with fluid motion
- Massive stunt moment, motorcycle hits a natural ramp or terrain bump, launches into the air, slow motion peak, helicopter visible in background, debris suspended
- Landing at full speed, immediate acceleration, camera swings around to front tracking shot as rider pushes forward escaping incoming impacts

Wide rugged environment, open terrain or canyon road, dust clouds, strong daylight, large scale environment enhancing speed and danger
ultra realistic, hollywood blockbuster chase, extreme sense of speed, physically grounded motion, cinematic slow motion accents, intense dynamic camera movement, high contrast natural lighting, fluid transitions, no distortion, no stretching

prompts.author: @ZaraIrahh
prompts.text: Shot on ALEXA 65mm anamorphic lens. Photorealistic cinematic quality. Aspect ratio 2.39:1 widescreen. Teal shadows, warm amber highlights. Film grain. Rain-soaked New York street at night. Neon signs, streetlights reflecting on wet asphalt. Steam rising from manholes. Lens flares, motion blur. Dolby Vision HDR. 0.0s–2.5s: Extreme low-angle tracking shot — a lone female fighter strides down a narrow NYC street, rain pouring heavily. Leather jacket soaked, hair slicked back and dripping. Heels echo faintly on wet pavement. Camera tracks backward with subtle shake. Yellow taxi lights streak across puddles. Figures step out from alleyways and fire escapes, slowly surrounding her. She tilts her head, cracks her knuckles — calm, fearless expression. 2.6s–5.0s: Whip-pan — first attacker lunges. TIME REMAP: slow-motion as she pivots smoothly, dodging and delivering a sharp elbow strike. Water sprays on impact. Her jacket snaps with the motion. Another attacker crashes into a stack of trash bags and metal bins. Sparks flicker from a flickering streetlight overhead. 5.1s–7.5s: Drone shot — overhead view as she moves fluidly through multiple opponents. SLOW MOTION: precise kicks and spins land cleanly, bodies sliding across rain-slick asphalt. Steam swirls under golden streetlights. One attacker swings a bat — she catches it mid-swing, twists, and disarms them effortlessly. 7.6s–10.0s: 360° orbital shot — she leaps into a spinning kick, taking down two attackers at once. Camera circles her as another rushes from behind. Without turning, she blocks and counters instantly. Breath visible in the cold night air. Each strike hits in sync with a rising cinematic score. 10.1s–13.0s: First-person POV — the final opponent charges. SMASH CUT: rapid, close-range exchange in slow motion. Her final punch lands clean. Silence falls. Rain continues to pour. Slow push-in — she stands alone in the empty street, adjusts her jacket sleeve, exhales steadily. Low-angle shot. Eyes locked forward. Unshaken.

prompts.author: @0xInk_
prompts.text: INFINITE FALL — Beer Catch [image1] Guy: lean young man, wavy blonde hair, thin glasses, black short-sleeve open shirt, dark grey pinstripe wide-leg trousers, large silver belt buckle, brown leather loafers, arm tattoos, silver bracelets. Expression: not panicked — annoyed at the bottle, nothing more. IMAX 65mm aggressive handheld — camera itself in freefall with him, shaking slightly with air resistance, never still. Fast orbital cuts, whip pans between angles, camera sometimes rushing past him at speed. Everything blown violently upward: hair, jacket, trouser legs, shirt — continuous strong upward wind throughout. The visual grammar of terminal velocity. Sound FX: constant roaring wind, fabric snapping, bottle tumbling, liquid sloshing. Environment: pure white infinite void — no ground, no ceiling, no horizon. Just white in all directions. A brown glass beer bottle tumbling slowly in freefall beside him, liquid sloshing inside, just out of reach. negative: no ground, no slow camera, no calm floating — this is a violent fall The entire sequence is one continuous fall at full speed. Camera whips around him — bug's eye from directly below looking up at him shrinking then rushing toward camera, overhead looking straight down at him, 10mm close pass inches from his face with the wind tearing at his hair and glasses, Dutch angle tracking his full body as he reaches. The bottle tumbles just past his fingers — he repositions fast, body rotating in the fall, reaching again. His glasses nearly torn off by the wind, he pushes them back with one hand without stopping reaching with the other. The fall feels violent and fast — not peaceful zero gravity, not serene floating. The roaring wind is constant and loud. His clothes are being destroyed by the air resistance — shirt billowing completely open, trouser legs flattened against his legs then snapping outward. He finally grabs the bottle in one hard grip — fingers closing around the neck. He pulls it against the wind to his lips. Takes a long defiant sip. Wind still roaring. Hair still destroyed. Glasses still crooked. Camera does one final fast orbit around him — close, aggressive, whipping past. He lowers the bottle. Looks directly into the camera lens from centimeters away. Completely unbothered. Wind roar continues. Cut to black. IMAX/anamorphic, violent freefall camera, aggressive orbital handheld, constant roaring wind, infinite white void, 4K Music: Flex It - MPH, y3kfae

prompts.author: @aimikoda
prompts.text: FORMAT: 15s / 148 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D action-comedy / Pixar-Kung Fu Hustle homage SUBJECTS: Young man, torn t-shirt. Girlfriend, floral dress. Boss, black suit. Blockers: Landlady in nightgown, Tailor, Mahjong duo, Coolie porter, Landlord in pajamas. Pixar-proportioned: rubbery limbs, wire-fu physics. PROPS: Rainbow lollipop, silver hatchet, red slipper, cigarette, brass forearm rings, mahjong tiles, wooden pole. ENVIRONMENT: 1930s walled tenement block: dusty courtyard, tight corridors, cascading balconies. Laundry lines, hanging signs. Dusty golden light. MOOD: Wire-fu comedic mayhem. Impossible physics, deadpan reactions. COLOR LOGIC: Golden Hour Look CAMERA: One uninterrupted Steadicam event. Tracks the young man continuously, pulling back as he runs, swinging to frame each blocker without cutting. 24mm spherical lens. SCENE: 1. Steadicam starts MCU. Young man hands girlfriend the lollipop. 2. Boss steps in raising the hatchet. Young man leaps ten feet backward. Camera pulls back fast into the alley to lead his sprint. 3. Landlady steps in, swinging a red slipper in a blurry tornado of strikes. Young man slides under the swings on both knees. The wind force of her slaps blasts the Boss backward. 4. Camera tracks backward into a corridor. Tailor blocks, brass rings clinking. Young man deflects rapid punches, spinning the Tailor into a pillar as camera glides past. 5. Mahjong duo attacks with synchronized rapid-fire palm strikes. Young man parries both simultaneously using the back of his hands, then does a wire-fu backflip twenty feet up. Camera tilts up as they crash into their tile table. 6. Camera levels on a balcony. Coolie thrusts a wooden pole like a spear. Slow motion: Young man deflects the tip with a single knuckle. Normal speed: he spins the pole away, plants it, and pole-vaults over the roof. 7. Camera tracks him landing on a vertical brick wall. Three thugs launch flying kicks. Young man runs horizontally along the wall, blocking their kicks with rapid shin-blocks in mid-air. 8. Camera drops to floor level. Boss charges, swinging a wild hatchet combo. Young man side-steps, traps the wrist, steps directly onto the falling blade, and leaps off the Boss's head. 9. Camera pulls back through the gate. Landlord attacks with heavy tai-chi pushes. Young man engages in a lightning-fast sticky-hands exchange, redirecting the Landlord's momentum to spin him away before running past. 10. Camera stops EWS on open street. Boss and thugs crash into the Landlady in a dust cloud. Girlfriend waves the lollipop from a window. He waves back, running away. SFX: Acoustic guitar opens. Slipper slaps beat 3, brass clink 4, rapid palm smacks and tile crash 5, slow-mo whoosh and wood clack 6, fast wall steps and kick thuds 7, metallic ping 8, heavy clothing swoosh 9, massive dust boom 10 with guitar reprise.

prompts.text: cinematic horror. Jakarta KRL Commuter Line station at night, Sudirman station platform, harsh yellow-white fluorescent overhead lighting, worn dirty tiled floor, blue KRL train car parked at platform, Indonesian signage on walls. A young woman in [reference outfit] poses next to the train car taking a selfie, smiling. On the train wall behind her, a large advertisement poster shows a beautiful woman's face. The poster surface begins to ripple and crack. Long black wet hair pushes through the glossy paper. A pale hand with black fingernails tears through. A kuntilanak in torn white kebaya crawls out of the poster completely, feet never touching the ground, long hair covering her face, head tilted at an unnatural angle. Bystanders on the platform scream and scatter. The woman drops her phone and runs. POV handheld tracking shot, she sprints through the platform, quick glance back, the kuntilanak glides at impossible speed closing the distance, hair flowing, white kebaya tattered. Emergency lights flicker red. Train doors slam shut. Dead end. Wide shot the woman presses her back against the closed train doors, nowhere to go. The kuntilanak stops. Slowly raises her head. Two hollow black eyes beneath the hair. Shaky handheld cam, motion blur, high contrast shadows, horror aesthetic, cinematic.

prompts.text: Hyper-realistic first-person POV inside a dense cyberpunk megacity at night, the camera represents the character’s eyes, both hands frequently entering frame with subtle finger motion, slight tremble from adrenaline. Action sequence: the POV character sprints through a narrow neon-lit alley, heavy breathing driving camera rhythm, rapid head turns scanning surroundings. Flickering holographic signs and glowing advertisements streak past, creating intense motion blur and color trails. Distant mechanical drones descend into view, scanning aggressively. The POV character reacts instantly, turning sharply and accelerating, feet pounding against wet pavement with visible splashes and reflections. The character vaults over obstacles, one hand slamming onto surfaces for support, then slides under a low barrier, camera dipping close to the ground before rising back up into a sprint. Hands remain visible, grounding every movement. Camera behavior: aggressive handheld POV, constant micro jitter, body sway, fast whip pans during direction changes, forward push-in momentum, head bob synced with running cadence, dynamic focus shifts (f/0.4). Environment: dense cyberpunk city with layered neon signage, holograms, steam vents, reflective rain-soaked streets, volumetric fog catching colored light, deep depth from foreground hands to distant skyline. Lighting: high-contrast neon (cyan, magenta, electric blue), reflections on wet surfaces, glowing atmosphere, strong backlight silhouettes. Style: ultra-cinematic realism, Blade Runner-inspired tone, documentary action intensity, motion blur streaks, no HUD, no overlays, no text, stable anatomy, normal proportions without stretch. Made in @dreamina_ai #DreaminaCPP #DreaminaAI

prompts.author: @noman23761
prompts.text: Spent 24 hours stress-testing Seedance 2.0 so that you don't have to The difference between “AI slop” and “this looks directed” is literally 2–3 prompt changes. Seedance 2 Global access api :- https:// github.com/Anil-matcha/Se edance-2.0-API ... https:// muapi.ai/playground/see dance-v2.0-i2v ... If you are just looking for an app to run Seedance 2 without business email and geo restrictions check out VadooAI The “4-Part Prompt Formula” Most people write vibes. Seedance wants structure. Use this every time: Subject → Action → Camera → Style If you skip camera → you get random motion If you skip action → you get stiff clips 2. The “Camera is King” rule Seedance is basically a camera simulator. Instead of: “girl walking in city” Say: “tracking shot, slow dolly-in, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field” That alone upgrades output quality massively 3. The “Don’t Describe the Image” hack If you’re using a reference image: DO NOT re-describe it Only describe motion + changes Otherwise the model “reinterprets” your image and ruins it 4. The “Motion Intensity” trick Seedance doesn’t infer speed. “car drives” = boring “car accelerates aggressively, motion blur, tires screeching” = cinematic You have to explicitly define energy levels

If you are just looking for an app to run Seedance 2 without business email and geo restrictions check out VadooAI

The “4-Part Prompt Formula” 

Most people write vibes. Seedance wants structure.

Use this every time:

Subject → Action → Camera → Style

If you skip camera → you get random motion

If you skip action → you get stiff clips

2. The “Camera is King” rule 

Seedance is basically a camera simulator.

Instead of: “girl walking in city”

Say: “tracking shot, slow dolly-in, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field”

That alone upgrades output quality massively

3. The “Don’t Describe the Image” hack 

If you’re using a reference image:

DO NOT re-describe it

Only describe motion + changes

Otherwise the model “reinterprets” your image and ruins it

4. The “Motion Intensity” trick 

Seedance doesn’t infer speed.

“car drives” = boring

“car accelerates aggressively, motion blur, tires screeching” = cinematic

You have to explicitly define energy levels

prompts.text: WWE John Cena Vs Roman Reigns Made on seedance 2.0 Creation in @vadooai Prompt inspired by @techhalla [CINEMATIC SETUP] Style: Professional 4K TV Sports Broadcast footage, handheld ringside camera mixed with wide crane shots. Lens/Aperture: 35mm broadcast lens, deep depth of field to keep the crowd in view. Color Grade: High-contrast, saturated "Main Event" lighting with vibrant blues and reds. Atmosphere: Volumetric haze, strobe light flashes from the crowd, realistic arena sweat and skin texture. Audio: Immersive spatial sound, roaring stadium crowd, thudding ring canvas impacts, heavy metallic chair "clang" SFX. [CHARACTERS] Wrestler 1: Athletic, lean high-flyer in neon green trunks and wristbands. Wrestler 2: Heavyweight powerhouse, tall with long wet hair, wearing black leather tights. The Behemoth: A colossal, morbidly obese giant in a stretched leopard-print singlet.The Official: Standard referee in a black-and-white striped shirt and black slacks. [TIMELINE SECOND BY SECOND] 0-3s: [Medium Tracking Shot] Wrestler 1 sprints toward the ring ropes, bounces off the tensioned cables with realistic physics, and accelerates back toward the center. 3-6s: [Dynamic Low-Angle] Wrestler 2 stands his ground and executes a massive lariat clothesline; Wrestler 1 flips backward from the impact and hits the canvas hard with a visible ripple effect on the ring floor. 6-11s: [Wide Crane Shot] Both wrestlers lie dazed. A massive 500lb Behemoth climbs the turnbuckle. He pauses, then performs a giant splash, landing body-first onto both men. The ring frame shakes violently upon impact. 11-15s: [Tight Close-up] The referee suddenly grabs a cold-rolled steel chair. In a shocking heel-turn, he swings the chair overhead, smashing it against the Behemoth’s skull. Metallic impact sparks and "CLANG" spatial audio. [STYLE & QUALITY BOOSTERS] Photorealistic 8K, ultra-detailed skin textures and sweat, cinematic stadium lighting, perfect motion blur, high dynamic range, no artifacts, coherent multi-subject physics.

prompts.text: A massive coastal battlefield where ocean, land, and sky collide. Three colossal creatures engage: — a sky dragon with metallic scales and storm wings — a fire colossus emerging from volcanic fissures — a giant ocean leviathan rising from the sea Opening frame: wide shot of coastline — ocean churning, volcano erupting, storm clouds gathering overhead. Hook at second two: all three creatures attack simultaneously. The battlefield fractures into elemental chaos: — the dragon generates hurricane-force winds and lightning — the fire colossus erupts lava and shockwaves — the leviathan summons massive tidal surges The city between them collapses under combined forces — water floods streets, fire ignites structures, wind tears apart buildings. Camera sweeps between the three titans, snap zooming into collisions — fire meeting water in explosive steam clouds, lightning striking molten terrain. Color logic: deep ocean blue, molten orange-red, storm gray and electric white. Escalation builds as all three forces collide at the same point, destabilizing the entire coastline. Final beat: hard POV shift — camera becomes the wave-fire-storm collision itself, rushing forward as all elements merge into a single catastrophic blast. Massive environmental destruction, multi-element physics interaction, cinematic scale, 4K ultra-detail. Made in @dreamina_ai #DreaminaCPP #DreaminaAI

prompts.author: @ibexdream
prompts.text: This is the prompt used in Seedance 2.0 FORMAT: 15s / MULTI-CUT / 5 BEATS / VIRAL EMOTIONAL TWIST SUBJECTS: A small robot the size of a shoebox, boxy body made of dented brushed aluminum with visible rivets and scratches, one flickering blue LED eye (left) and one steady warm orange LED eye (right), two stubby telescoping arms with three-pronged claw hands, and tank treads that squeak when moving. Its chest panel has a cracked circular speaker grille. It moves with jerky stop-start motions and tilts its whole body to express emotion. A single wilted daisy in a cracked terra cotta pot — this is the visual anchor throughout. Stylized 3D quality animation with tactile material rendering, squash-and-stretch on the robot's body, and exaggerated emotional eye animation. ENVIRONMENT: An abandoned rooftop greenhouse at golden hour. Shattered glass panels let warm sunset light pour in at low angles. Overgrown dead vines cover rusted metal shelving. Cracked concrete floor with patches of dry soil. One corner has a small puddle of collected rainwater reflecting the orange sky. Dust motes and tiny pollen particles float in the light beams. The city skyline is visible through broken glass — distant but soft, out of focus. STYLE: Stylized 3D animation, subsurface rendering on organic matter, physically accurate metal wear on the robot. Warm desaturated palette — dusty oranges, faded greens, soft rust tones. Cinematic depth of field with golden hour lens flares. Gentle film grain. MOOD: Lonely tenderness building to quiet joy. Bittersweet but ultimately hopeful. COLOR LOGIC: Sunset Rust — warm amber light, cool blue-grey shadows, pops of green only at the very end. ⸻ 0:00–0:02 · The Discovery Wide shot, 35mm, low angle from floor level. The greenhouse is still, bathed in golden light. The tiny robot rolls in through a gap in the broken glass wall, treads squeaking. It stops. Its mismatched eyes scan the space — the blue one flickers nervously. It spots something offscreen. Cut to insert close-up, 85mm: the wilted daisy in its cracked pot, sitting alone on a shelf in a beam of light. One brown petal falls. SFX: tread squeak, servo whir, gentle wind through broken glass, petal tap on concrete. 0:02–0:05 · The Attempt Medium shot, 50mm. The robot rolls to the shelf and extends one arm toward the pot. Too short. It stretches — whole body tilting forward on its treads, arm telescoping to maximum with a strained ratcheting sound. Fingertips barely touch the pot. It nudges the pot off the shelf and catches it with both claws in a clumsy fumble — nearly drops it, recovers, hugs it tight against its chest panel. Its orange eye glows slightly brighter. SFX: ratchet extension, ceramic scrape, fumble clatter, catch clank, relieved servo sigh. 0:05–0:08 · The Problem Close-up, 85mm, on the daisy. It is completely wilted — drooping, brown, dry. The robot tilts its body sideways examining it. It pokes one petal with a claw tip. The petal crumbles to dust. The robot recoils. Its blue eye flickers faster — distressed. It looks around the greenhouse frantically, body swiveling left and right. Then it spots the puddle of rainwater in the corner. Both eyes lock on it. SFX: petal crumble, distressed beep sequence, servo whip-pan, hopeful double chirp. 0:08–0:12 · The Gift Medium tracking shot, 35mm, following the robot as it rolls carefully toward the puddle, pot clutched tight. It arrives at the edge. Problem: it has no way to scoop water. One beat of stillness. Then it tilts the entire pot and dips the dry soil directly into the shallow puddle — gentle, slow, deliberate. Water seeps into the cracked terra cotta. The robot holds it there. Sunset light catches the water surface, throwing rippled golden reflections across the robot's dented body. Its speaker grille crackles and emits a faint broken hum — it is trying to sing. SFX: water absorption, gentle ripple, crackling hum melody attempt, distant wind. 0:12–0:15 · The Bloom Close-up, 85mm. The robot lifts the pot from the water and holds it at eye level. Nothing happens. One still beat. Then — a single green leaf unfurls from the stem, small and bright against all the brown. The robot's blue eye stops flickering and holds steady for the first time. Both eyes glow warm together. It pulls the pot closer to its chest. Camera slowly pulls back to a wide shot, 35mm. The tiny robot sits alone in the vast greenhouse, sunset light wrapping around it, holding one small pot with one new leaf. SFX: leaf unfurl whisper, both eyes hum in harmony, warm music swell, golden hour silence.
prompts.display_text: used in Seedance 2.0 FORMAT: 15s / MULTI-CUT / 5 BEATS / VIRAL EMOTIONAL TWIST SUBJECTS: A small robot the size of a shoebox, boxy body made of dented brushed aluminum with visible rivets and scratches, one flickering blue LED eye (left) and one steady warm orange LED eye (right), two stubby telescoping arms with three-pronged claw hands, and tank treads that squeak when moving. Its chest panel has a cracked circular speaker grille. It moves with jerky stop-start motions and tilts its whole body to express emotion. A single wilted daisy in a cracked terra cotta pot — this is the visual anchor throughout. Stylized 3D quality animation with tactile material rendering, squash-and-stretch on the robot's body, and exaggerated emotional eye animation. ENVIRONMENT: An abandoned rooftop greenhouse at golden hour. Shattered glass panels let warm sunset light pour in at low angles. Overgrown dead vines cover rusted metal shelving. Cracked concrete floor with patches of dry soil. One corner has a small puddle of collected rainwater reflecting the orange sky. Dust motes and tiny pollen particles float in the light beams. The city skyline is visible through broken glass — distant but soft, out of focus. STYLE: Stylized 3D animation, subsurface rendering on organic matter, physically accurate metal wear on the robot. Warm desaturated palette — dusty oranges, faded greens, soft rust tones. Cinematic depth of field with golden hour lens flares. Gentle film grain. MOOD: Lonely tenderness building to quiet joy. Bittersweet but ultimately hopeful. COLOR LOGIC: Sunset Rust — warm amber light, cool blue-grey shadows, pops of green only at the very end. ⸻ 0:00–0:02 · The Discovery Wide shot, 35mm, low angle from floor level. The greenhouse is still, bathed in golden light. The tiny robot rolls in through a gap in the broken glass wall, treads squeaking. It stops. Its mismatched eyes scan the space — the blue one flickers nervously. It spots something offscreen. Cut to insert close-up, 85mm: the wilted daisy in its cracked pot, sitting alone on a shelf in a beam of light. One brown petal falls. SFX: tread squeak, servo whir, gentle wind through broken glass, petal tap on concrete. 0:02–0:05 · The Attempt Medium shot, 50mm. The robot rolls to the shelf and extends one arm toward the pot. Too short. It stretches — whole body tilting forward on its treads, arm telescoping to maximum with a strained ratcheting sound. Fingertips barely touch the pot. It nudges the pot off the shelf and catches it with both claws in a clumsy fumble — nearly drops it, recovers, hugs it tight against its chest panel. Its orange eye glows slightly brighter. SFX: ratchet extension, ceramic scrape, fumble clatter, catch clank, relieved servo sigh. 0:05–0:08 · The Problem Close-up, 85mm, on the daisy. It is completely wilted — drooping, brown, dry. The robot tilts its body sideways examining it. It pokes one petal with a claw tip. The petal crumbles to dust. The robot recoils. Its blue eye flickers faster — distressed. It looks around the greenhouse frantically, body swiveling left and right. Then it spots the puddle of rainwater in the corner. Both eyes lock on it. SFX: petal crumble, distressed beep sequence, servo whip-pan, hopeful double chirp. 0:08–0:12 · The Gift Medium tracking shot, 35mm, following the robot as it rolls carefully toward the puddle, pot clutched tight. It arrives at the edge. Problem: it has no way to scoop water. One beat of stillness. Then it tilts the entire pot and dips the dry soil directly into the shallow puddle — gentle, slow, deliberate. Water seeps into the cracked terra cotta. The robot holds it there. Sunset light catches the water surface, throwing rippled golden reflections across the robot's dented body. Its speaker grille crackles and emits a faint broken hum — it is trying to sing. SFX: water absorption, gentle ripple, crackling hum melody attempt, distant wind. 0:12–0:15 · The Bloom Close-up, 85mm. The robot lifts the pot from the water and holds it at eye level. Nothing happens. One still beat. Then — a single green leaf unfurls from the stem, small and bright against all the brown. The robot's blue eye stops flickering and holds steady for the first time. Both eyes glow warm together. It pulls the pot closer to its chest. Camera slowly pulls back to a wide shot, 35mm. The tiny robot sits alone in the vast greenhouse, sunset light wrapping around it, holding one small pot with one new leaf. SFX: leaf unfurl whisper, both eyes hum in harmony, warm music swell, golden hour silence.

prompts.text: Core Concept: A dramatic contrast between a chaotic wake-up and a polished, professional office look achieved through high-speed "portal" transitions and a continuous spin mechanic. Transition Mechanics: The Portal Smack: Starts in bed. The character aggressively smacks the camera lens to silence the alarm, triggering a warp/whoosh speed-portal effect. The Spin: She lands perfectly on a spinning backless makeup stool at a vanity in the same bedroom. The continuous 360-degree rotation begins, with a new action every time she faces the camera. Character: A young woman with red hair. The prompt strictly uses "The same Character" to lock consistency. Total Duration: 6.0 seconds. Timeline & Scene-by-Scene Breakdown: Scene 1: The Alarm Smack ( - . | Duration: 2 sec) Action: The same Character is sleeping soundly in a real bed, her eyes fully closed. She has messy red hair, a sleep mask pushed up on her forehead, and is wearing pajamas. The loud sound of an alarm begins. The camera trembles and shakes slightly, simulating phone vibration. Transition (The Portal): Startled by the sound, she wakes up abruptly, sitting up fast with an irritated expression. At the peak of her sitting motion, the 'portal' effect activates, visibly 'sucking' her inward, immediately transforming into a rapid portal motion blur with a warp/whoosh distortion effect. Scene 2: Landing & Brushing Teeth (.0 - .6 | Duration: 0.6 sec) Action: The same Character. The portal transition ends as she lands perfectly seated on a spinning backless stool at her vanity. She is still in her pajamas. As she spins to face the camera, she is already brushing her teeth with an electric toothbrush. Transition: Immediate continuous spin away. Scene 3: Hair Brushing (0:2.6 - .2 | Duration: 0.6 sec) Action: The same Character. She spins back to face the camera. She is now vigorously brushing her red hair with a hairbrush. Transition: Immediate continuous spin away. Scene 4: Eye Makeup (.2 - .8 | Duration: 0.6 sec) Action: The same Character. She spins back to face the camera. She is quickly applying mascara or eyeshadow with an applicator, looking focused. Transition: Immediate continuous spin away. Scene 5: Fully Dressed (.8 - .4 | Duration: 0.6 sec) Action: The same Character. She spins back to face the camera. Wardrobe change: She is now instantly dressed in professional office wear (e.g., a crisp white button-down shirt and a navy blue blazer). She is adjusting her collar or cuffs. Transition: Immediate continuous spin away. Scene 6: Morning Coffee (.4 - .0 | Duration: 0.6 sec) Action: The same Character. She spins back to face the camera. She is holding a sleek travel coffee mug and takes a quick, sharp sip. Transition: Immediate continuous spin away. Scene 7: The Catch & Finale (.0 - .0 | Duration: 1.0 sec) Action: The same Character. She completes the final spin facing the camera. She is now wearing stylish glasses. Looking slightly off-camera, she confidently catches a professional tote bag or briefcase that is thrown to her from behind the camera. She looks straight into the lens, completely ready for the day. The video ends here. #YouArt #Seedance2

Seedance 2.0 Upload the generated studio photos (I added one of the car in the mountains) and create your own prompt for Seedance 2.0 I'm leaving you the prompt I used so you can copy it as a base and ask any AI to adapt it to your vehicle and environment ---- Title / Concept “CIVIC TYPE R — DOMINION IN EVERY CURVE” — a 15s high-performance commercial where the car conquers a dramatic mountain road, blending precision engineering with raw driving emotion. STYLE / VISUAL AESTHETIC Cinematic automotive realism, mountain lighting like [attached road image] , high contrast tones, glossy red paint reflecting landscape, motion blur, dynamic environment, premium commercial finish. SUBJECTS Red Honda Civic Type R — aggressive stance, black aerodynamic details, rear wing, triple exhaust, sharp LED headlights, performance wheels gripping asphalt. ENVIRONMENT Winding mountain road with guardrails, dense pine forests, towering rocky peaks in the background, golden sunlight cutting through clouds, sense of altitude and open space. MOOD / INTENT Adrenaline, control, freedom, precision under pressure. The car feels planted, alive, engineered for curves and speed. CAMERA / CINEMATOGRAPHY Dynamic tracking shots, low-angle chase cams, drone sweeps, wheel-level motion shots, fast push-ins, lateral tracking with background blur, crisp subject isolation, cinematic motion blur at speed. TIMELINE 0.0s–2.0s Wide aerial shot of a winding mountain road at golden hour. The red Civic appears in the distance, cutting through curves. Text: “CONTROL STARTS HERE”. 2.0s–4.0s Low front tracking shot. The car charges forward, headlights sharp. Road lines streak beneath. Mountains reflect across the hood. 4.0s–6.0s Side chase shot. The Civic takes a tight curve with precision. Wheels grip aggressively, slight body roll controlled. Background blurs into speed. 6.0s–8.5s Rear three-quarter shot. The spoiler slices the air. Triple exhaust centered. Subtle heat distortion. Text: “BUILT FOR THE CURVES”. 8.5s–11.0s Rapid montage: close-up wheel spinning, brake calipers clamping, steering input, suspension compression over asphalt. Each cut synced to deep bass hits. 11.0s–13.0s Drone orbit as the car exits a curve into a straight. Sunlight hits the red paint dramatically. The car accelerates into open road. 13.0s–15.0s Front hero shot as the car approaches camera and slows slightly. Final text: “HONDA CIVIC TYPE R”. Subline: “IT DOESN’T FOLLOW THE ROAD. IT DOMINATES IT.” End on engine echo fading into the mountains. GLOBAL KEYWORDS automotive commercial, mountain road, Honda Civic Type R, dynamic driving, cinematic car ad, performance, curves, speed, control, golden hour

prompts.text: A 42-year-old Tibetan monk with shaved head and deep-set eyes, wearing layered charcoal robes threaded with faint gravitational lattice patterns, skin marked with subtle fractal scars that pulse with dim violet light — opening frame is a medium close-up of him seated in lotus position on a levitating stone disk above a vast canyon, fragments of rock orbiting slowly around him in silent suspension under a starless sky. His right hand rotates slowly and the surrounding debris begins accelerating, forming a visible gravity well — at second two the ground below implodes inward as the canyon floor collapses into a spiraling sinkhole, triggering a rapid dolly zoom outward revealing entire mountain ridges bending toward his position. He never stands: the right hand amplifies gravitational pull, pulling structures inward; the left hand inverts local gravity fields, sending boulders and enemies upward into suspended orbit. Dynamic orbit camera circles him as debris fields form layered rings around his body, snap zooming into his hands during each gravity surge, snap cutting to collapsing terrain as impact confirmation. Deep violet fills the core frame, while black void distortion consumes the outer edges — lensing effects bending light around him. Escalation builds through increasing mass displacement until a floating fortress is pulled from the horizon and crushed inward. Final beat: hard POV shift — camera becomes the collapsing gravity field itself, spiraling downward through airborne debris into the canyon core as everything converges into a singular point. Gravitational lensing distorts all edges of frame; dust and stone fragments stretch under compression; subtle starfield flicker appears in void zones. Epic cosmic realism, ultra-detailed debris physics, volumetric dust collapse, 4K ultra-detail. Made in @dreamina_ai #DreaminaCPP #DreaminaAI

prompts.text: 0-3s · Otherworldly Inscription Low-angle upward shot. The void entity's right hand embeds into the altar, dark veins in fractal geometry patterns wildly parasitizing across the stone slab. Fissures erupt with viscous flesh tendrils, the ground pulsating dramatically like lungs. Background sect ancient architecture undergoes visual horizontal displacement tremors. 3-6s · Ossified Mutation Circling ascending/descending shot. The entity's spine explodes and twists in a chain reaction, obsidian horn crown piercing out from deep within the skull. Both arms entwined with liquid black smoke, generating high-temperature electric arcs in the air along its path, suspended lanterns instantly bursting in a visually collapsing overload. 6-9s · Material Deconstruction Pull-back shot. The entity's epidermis displays porcelain-like cracking textures, revealing a writhing dark matter core inside. Fingertips mutate into half-meter-long shadow blades, instantly triggering accelerated decay upon touching wooden pillars, the architectural structure dissolving into rising black smoke. 9-12s · Shadow Tide Devouring High-altitude overhead shot. The entity raises its arm, darkness behind it collapsing then erupting violently, forming a kilometer-scale black-red corrupted tsunami. The shadow flood ravages everything in its path—bluestone pavement, stone lions, pavilions—all pixelated, torn apart, and devoured. 12-15s · Void Finale Facial close-up. In the background, the massive mountain gate twists and snaps like a hemp rope under black hole gravity toward the center. The entity approaches slowly in dead silence, its pupils containing a rotating void nebula. It stares into the lens, the frame generating intense film burning and signal glitch effects, ultimately fading into absolute darkness.

prompts.text: Playful high-stakes slapstick cinematic scene in an abandoned wooden warehouse with warm amber sunlight and cool industrial shadows. A mischievous ginger tabby cat wearing a tiny tactical harness performs a secret “spy mission” while suspended from a rope, holding a lit firecracker. Below him, a plump white chicken wearing a blue nightcap sleeps on grain sacks, snoring loudly. The cat theatrically drops the firecracker into the chicken’s nightcap. It explodes in a burst of purple smoke and flying feathers. The chicken is launched upward in exaggerated cartoon physics, then lands dazed, slowly turning toward camera with glowing red eyes in a dramatic cliffhanger. Style: cinematic comedy, Mission Impossible parody, ultra-detailed, volumetric lighting, dust particles, feather physics, squash-and-stretch animation, dynamic motion, 120 BPM orchestral slapstick score, high detail, 4K, film-quality rendering.

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 on @nsketchai Prompt A dark, cinematic surreal film set in a post-war dystopian city, muted tones, cold color grading, shallow depth of field, soft film grain, dramatic lighting. Scene 1: A cracked empty street near a foggy shoreline. A woman in a long grey coat walks slowly toward the camera. Beside her floats a giant fragmented human face made of broken buildings and concrete, subtly shifting as if alive. Dust particles drift in the air. Scene 2: Cut to a tired child leaning against a broken wall indoors, eyes half-closed, exhausted. In the blurred background, another child sits silently. The atmosphere feels heavy, abandoned, and hopeless. Scene 3: A stern middle-aged man in a grey overcoat stands in a ruined European-style street beside an old rusty car. The camera slowly pushes in as he looks ahead with a hardened expression. Scene 4: Close-up of a woman’s face partially merged with mechanical and architectural fragments. Orange butterflies flutter around her head in slow motion, symbolizing fragile hope. Scene 5: A crowded street under a massive curved wall embedded with small structures and windows. People walk aimlessly, heads down, creating a sense of routine and oppression. Scene 6: A street musician with messy hair plays a guitar into a vintage microphone. Behind him stands a silent crowd. A rusted tram looms in the background. Light rain begins to fall. Scene 7: A line of children in worn vintage clothing stands still, staring directly into the camera. Their expressions are blank, almost haunting. Slow dolly movement forward. Scene 8: A surreal couple walks together. The woman carries a house-like structure on her head, with her face visible through a small window. The man beside her is partially covered in dark soot. They walk through rubble in silence. Scene 9 (Final): A woman sits in a cluttered room filled with old radios and clocks. A sign reading “MORE” hangs behind her. She slowly turns a knob on a vintage radio as static fills the air. Fade to black. Style & Motion Keywords cinematic, dystopian, surreal realism, slow motion, dramatic lighting, volumetric fog, depth of field, 35mm film look, desaturated tones, symbolic storytelling, melancholic mood, smooth camera movement
