prompts.author: @LurkShade
prompts.text: A cinematic concert gacha reveal in portrait orientation. Phase 1 (2s): Dark arena with scattered blue-white penlight dots. Vertical Japanese text of the character's catchphrase reveals rapidly character-by-character with soft glow. Camera orbits above the audience. Phase 2 (2.5s): Camera swings toward the stage. 8-10 vertical spotlight beams descend from trusses. Steady zoom in reveals spherical footlights along the stage edge. A rainbow-colored ring burst explodes at center with multicolored star-shaped particles scattering outward. Phase 3 (3.5s): Stage reappears with an elaborate gothic arch structure. Penlights multiply into a vibrant rainbow sea below. On the large screen behind the stage, a character silhouette slowly materializes. Camera creeps closer. The glow intensifies into a massive four-pointed star flash, then instant cut to total black. Phase 4 (3s): A blinding white flash erupts. The stage returns dramatically upgraded — golden fireworks shoot upward from both sides of the arch, backdrop transforms into stained-glass geometric patterns in pink, purple, blue and gold. The character materializes from silhouette to full color on center stage. Crossing laser beams sweep from the sides. Phase 5 (4s): Screen floods white, resolves into a close-up dolly sweeping right-to-left past colorful spotlights with dense rainbow penlights waving below. Camera pulls back to center revealing the full arena — arch stage, stained glass screen, character center, thousands of rainbow penlights. Final frame: character illustration in a decorative frame.

prompts.author: @ShamiWeb3
prompts.text: 15-second cinematic video, ultra-smooth camera, natural focus pulls, warm-to-cool color shift, photorealistic 8K, ARRI Alexa look. Macro close-up of a Michelin-style salmon rose—glossy, orange-pink layers. Knife makes a slow precise slice, oils shimmer (0–3s). Focus pulls to a calm young man in side profile as he lifts a bite (3–5s). Extreme close-up bite—slow chew, eyes soften, subtle smile (5–7s). Fast push into his eye—reflection blooms into light, scene dissolves (7–8s). Underwater world: wide shot, sun rays through turquoise water, corals, seaweed, schools of salmon swimming. Man floats weightlessly, watching fish in calm wonder. Slow orbit, light beams shifting (8–13s). Match cut back to restaurant—same angle, he swallows, smiles, continues eating (13–15s). SFX: knife slice, soft chew, restaurant ambiance fading into underwater sounds and back. No text overlays.

prompts.author: @aimikoda
prompts.text: FORMAT: 15s / 150 BPM / 8 shots / compact action duel loop SUBJECTS: One occult fighter and one curse-like creature, both drawn as 2.5D line-art characters with visible contour lines, interior sketch lines and light hatching, never solid black fill, one body each in every beat. SCENE: Black and white 3D sketch-anime combat inside a minimal sketch ruin on white paper. Keep clear 2.5D line-art characters with contour lines, interior construction strokes and light hatching, not black silhouette bodies. Start on direct impact, not entry, with both characters already in mid-exchange at center frame. Use aggressive cinematic framing, hard impact punctuation, sharp micro-pauses, strong anticipation and forceful follow-through while preserving left-right continuity and readable strike lanes. The creature uses short curse bursts, limb warping and ink shockwaves. Build the action as a seamless loop so the final rush reconnects directly into the opening clash. The space has floor, broken wall planes and depth, and only redraws on hits, surges or skids. MOOD: Occult pressure, supernatural force, hard cinematic impact, seamless loop energy. COLOR LOGIC: Monochromatic Grading STYLE: 3D hand-drawn sketch anime with 2.5D line-art characters, bold cinematic action framing and readable curse-battle choreography TIMELINE: 1. Smash cut, low 24mm impact track, open on direct mid-clash at center frame as fighter's short strike and creature's forearm collide, lines splinter outward, both bodies compress then snap past each other without stopping, SFX: impact snap, brush tear. 2. Hard cut, 35mm handheld push, fighter pivots out of the pass, shoulder-feints and lands a short body strike under guard, both recoil half a step with visible force transfer, SFX: air slice, ink thud. 3. Whip pan, 50mm side track, creature whips a warped forearm across a clear lane and sheds a short ink shockwave, fighter slips under both by inches, SFX: heavy whoosh, brush tear, ink flare. 4. Smash cut, 28mm close pursuit, micro-pause, fighter plants, twists through the hips and drives a compact rib counter, impact distortion spikes and the camera kicks with contact, SFX: crack hit, ink burst. 5. Match cut, 40mm rear three-quarter, creature skids backward as floor and wall lines redraw under the impact path, SFX: scrape, paper rip, low ink pulse. 6. Hard cut, 32mm handheld orbit, creature slams back in with one arm warping longer, fighter gives ground, parries high and pivots across the axis to keep continuity, SFX: double hit, sharp breath, tendon stretch. 7. Whip pan, 65mm impact close-up, fighter coils low, holds one sharp micro-pause, then releases a decisive upward strike, recoil whips through both bodies and the frame blows out white for a beat, SFX: deep crack, white flash burst. 8. Hard cut, 24mm wide pursuit frame, creature regathers, fires a short chest-level curse burst and surges back to center as fighter rebounds into the same opposing rush geometry as beat 1, SFX: trailing crack, paper hiss, ink burst, rushing foot drag.

Hard cut, 24mm wide pursuit frame, creature regathers, fires a short chest-level curse burst and surges back to center as fighter rebounds into the same opposing rush geometry as beat 1, SFX: trailing crack, paper hiss, ink burst, rushing foot drag.

prompts.author: @Kiber_Alla
prompts.text: Overarching Concept: Continuous character journey, moving from gritty Y2K streetwear on a dark rooftop to a stylized, high-tech "tech-ninja" aesthetic inside a pristine white iOS interface dimension. Fast-paced, fluid, and highly interactive with the camera. Universal Rule: The same red-haired woman from Scene 1 must appear in all subsequent scenes, ensuring perfect visual continuity. Scene 1 (00:00–00:01): Rooftop Throw Location: Windy urban rooftop at night, glowing city skyline. Wardrobe (Character 1): Y2K style — baggy vintage denim jacket, graphic baby tee, wide-leg parachute pants. Character Continuity: A specific red-haired woman with wavy copper hair. Action & Camera: Static camera. The red-haired woman spins rapidly, her loose clothes catching the wind. Mid-spin, she throws an iPhone 17 Pro Max directly into the camera lens. Scene 2 (00:01–00:02): Giant Phone Spin Location: Blurred night city backdrop. Action & Camera: Focus pulls to the giant, spinning iPhone 17 Pro Max in the foreground. It stops spinning, hovering vertically and centered. Scene 3 (00:02–00:07): The "Twist & Pull" Transition (CRITICAL FOCUS — NO GLASS BREAKING) Location: Still on the night rooftop, phone centered. Character Continuity: The same red-haired woman (from Scene 1) is visible inside the glowing white phone screen, smiling confidently. Wardrobe (Character 2): A tight, form-fitting, cropped matte-black leather motorcycle jacket over a white top. Action (The Twist): Her hand smoothly emerges from the screen into 3D space (the screen acts like a fluid boundary — no glass breaking). She reaches toward the camera and performs a twisting motion with her wrist and fingers — exactly like screwing in a lightbulb or turning a dial. Camera (Max Zoom): As she twists, the camera zooms in maximally on her hand. Action (The Pull): She reverses the twisting motion and rapidly retracts her hand back into the phone. Camera (The Dive): This reverse motion acts as a physical "pull." As she yanks her hand back, she pulls the camera with her — the camera flies rapidly into the phone screen, fully entering the digital interface. Scene 4 (00:07–00:14): UI Dimension & The Final Punchline Location: Bright, infinite white 3D space. Character Continuity: The same red-haired woman stands center, smiling confidently. Wardrobe (Character 3 — "Tech-Ninja"): Full matte-black tactical jumpsuit in technical fabric; asymmetrical layered vest with utility straps; multi-strap chest harness with glowing magnetic buckles; full gloves with integrated digital displays; chunky combat platform boots. Interface Elements: Gigantic simplified floating 3D app icons — Instagram camera, TikTok "d", Snapchat ghost — swirling around her. The Finale: She looks directly at the camera, playfully catches a glowing "Like" (Heart) icon from the air, gives a sharp wink, and throws the icon straight into the camera lens. The icon covers the lens, turning the screen instantly to black — creating a definitive ending or a seamless loop back to the start. #Seedance2

Prompt  

A dark, post-apocalyptic city covered in smoke, debris, and burning ruins, cinematic wide aerial shot, dramatic cloudy sky with fire embers floating in the air, destroyed buildings on both sides, abandoned cars, cracked roads glowing faintly with heat

She slowly reaches forward, picks up the can, stands up — background explosions flicker behind her, camera slowly pushes in
Close-up shot — she opens the can, a sharp metallic sound echoing, green energy vapor leaks out, lighting her face dramatically
As she drinks — her eyes suddenly glow bright neon green, energy pulses through her body, veins illuminate, wind starts swirling around her
Dark organic energy tendrils emerge from her back and arms, wrapping around her body, forming armor-like structures, cinematic transformation sequence, high detail, slow motion
Her body evolves into a demonic feminine entity, sleek black armor fused with glowing green energy lines, horns forming, wings expanding behind her
Wide hero shot — she fully transforms into a towering, powerful demon-like being with massive wings, glowing eyes, and energy blades forming in her hands
She raises both arms — energy surges through the sky, debris starts levitating, buildings trembling
Final shot — she unleashes a massive green energy beam into the sky, creating a shockwave across the ruined city, camera pulls back to wide cinematic scale

prompts.author: @ertanlabs
prompts.text: Stickman Fight with Seedance 2.0 Prompt FORMAT: 15s / 182 BPM / 7 CUTS / minimalist 2D stick-fight animation, pure white background, ultra-fast readability SUBJECTS: Two 2D stick fighters drawn in solid black lines on a blank white field. One is lean, evasive, and elastic. The other is wider, heavier, and constantly presses forward with crushing force. ENVIRONMENT: Empty white void, no props. Only black speed lines, impact rings, smear frames, skid marks, and sharp red blood accents. Clean negative space keeps every move instantly readable. MOOD: Brutal, explosive, relentless, stylish, unfinished. COLOR LOGIC: Monochromatic Grading TIMELINE: 0:00-0:01 - Wide shot, extreme negative space. The lean fighter stands centered and still. The heavy fighter drops from above already throwing a downward strike. Sudden hard push-in. 24mm wide feel. SFX: air drop, hard land, cutting whoosh. 0:01-0:03 - CUT ON ACTION. Side wide shot. Heavy fighter unleashes jab, hook, knee. Lean fighter slips, guards, absorbs the knee, then fires back with calf kick, straight punch, spinning back kick. A sharp red blood arc snaps off the final hit. Short truck move. 35mm feel. SFX: swishes, dry thuds, foot taps, impact ticks. 0:03-0:05 - SMASH CUT. Medium wide side view. Heavy fighter answers with body hook, elbow, backfist, stomp kick, then drives through with a rushing shoulder check, forcing the lean fighter across frame. Quick red flecks burst near the impact rings. Fast lateral move with slight undercrank feel. SFX: impact cracks, whip swishes, stomp hit, air bursts. 0:05-0:07 - CUT ON ACTION. Side wide shot. Lean fighter ducks the next swing, steps inside, lands a rib shot, slicing elbow to the chin, then a rising kick to the chest. A brief red spray snaps off the last connection. Short truck move. 35mm film feel. SFX: duck swish, body thud, elbow crack, kick crack, skid scrape. 0:07-0:10 - WHIP PAN TRANSITION. Side wide shot. Both crash back together and trade a savage twelve-hit chain: punch, block, elbow, knee, duck, backfist, kick, catch, shove, hook, spinning elbow, straight cross. Red flicks burst only on the hardest impacts. Fast truck move with momentum-based cutting. Thick black impact circles on the heaviest blows. SFX: rapid hit flurry, hard swishes, bass ticks, breath bursts. 0:10-0:12 - CUT ON ACTION. Worm's-eye wide shot. Heavy fighter surges forward again. Lean fighter eats two hits, slips the third, steps off the planted thigh, vaults upward, and hammers down. Both collide midair in a tight X-shaped silhouette that splits apart instantly. Quick arc move around the clash. 24mm wide feel. SFX: rising whoosh, hit flurry, double crack, burst hiss, bass slam. 0:12-0:15 - HARD CUT. Monumental wide shot. Both land already in motion, skid a step, rebound, and charge back to center without pause, dissolving into black strike smears and red flecks as the exchange continues. Tiny push-in. End mid-fight, unresolved. 50mm standard feel. SFX: skid scrape, hard swishes, dry impacts, low ring.

prompts.text: **Environment:** A frozen glacial valley under pale arctic twilight. Deep cobalt shadows across the ice field with cold blue ambient light reflecting from massive glacier walls. Snow particles drifting through the air. Frozen lake surfaces acting as natural mirrors for diegetic reflections. **Action:** 15.0s sequence. A towering figure composed of crystalline ice and refracting light engages a magma-armored titan whose body glows through volcanic fissures beneath black stone plating. They clash in rapid close-range combat across the frozen lake. Each strike fractures the ice beneath them, sending radial cracks spreading outward. The magma titan’s punches melt sections of the glacier while the ice giant counters with explosive frost bursts that instantly freeze the molten rock. Velocity Ramp choreography: rapid exchanges freeze into ultra-slow motion when fists collide, showing ice crystals shattering and lava droplets vaporizing before snapping back to full speed as both titans slide across the ice surface. **Camera:** Low tracking shot sliding across the frozen lake surface, reflections capturing both combatants. A sudden upward crane move follows the moment the magma titan is thrown into a glacier wall, ice exploding outward. **Style & Constraints:** 8K resolution, photorealistic volumetric snow, ray-traced reflections on ice surfaces, cinematic cold lighting, 35mm film grain, stable geometry, no flicker. Made in @dreamina_ai #DreaminaCPP #DreaminaAI

The magma titan’s punches melt sections of the glacier while the ice giant counters with explosive frost bursts that instantly freeze the molten rock.

Velocity Ramp choreography: rapid exchanges freeze into ultra-slow motion when fists collide, showing ice crystals shattering and lava droplets vaporizing before snapping back to full speed as both titans slide across the ice surface.

**Camera:**

Low tracking shot sliding across the frozen lake surface, reflections capturing both combatants. A sudden upward crane move follows the moment the magma titan is thrown into a glacier wall, ice exploding outward.

**Style & Constraints:**

8K resolution, photorealistic volumetric snow, ray-traced reflections on ice surfaces, cinematic cold lighting, 35mm film grain, stable geometry, no flicker.

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 can replicate all currently popular short videos Seedance 2.0 prompt [Style] Y2K Retro Pool Party, MiniDV Camcorder Texture (Camcorder Footage), Overexposed Warm Yellow, Film Grain, VHS Interference Lines, Fast-Paced Beat-Synced [Duration] 15 seconds [Scene] 2000s American Backyard Pool Party, Blazing Sun, Dazzling Water Ripples, Folding Lounge Chairs, Silver CD Player, Rainbow Inflatable Floats, Plastic Whale [Characters] A group of Y2K-styled girls: Low-Rise Bikinis, Belly Chains, Colorful Plastic Sunglasses, Butterfly Clips, Glitter Lip Gloss [00:00-00:01.5] Shot 1: Bursting Out of Water (Close-up / Pullback) DV Boot-Up Blue Screen Flashes with REC Red Dot. In-Your-Face Close-Up—A girl wearing colorful plastic sunglasses erupts from underwater, flinging wet hair to spray an arc of water (Slow-mo), water droplets splashing the lens, grinning wide at the DV as sunlight overexposes to pure white. [00:01.5-00:03] Shot 2: Poolside Stroll (Low Angle / Right Pan) Low-angle waist-high right pan, three girls in sheer cover-ups clutching canned drinks saunter across wet tiles, one snapping a selfie with a flip phone, chunky platform flip-flops slapping the ground. [00:03-00:04.5] Shot 3: Shoving into the Pool (Dutch Angle) Dutch angle medium shot, one girl shoves her bestie into the pool from behind, soda can flying out, body splashing in with a massive spray, the pusher doubled over laughing. [00:04.5-00:06] Shot 4: FPV Dive (FPV Drone Dive) FPV dives from above skimming the water surface, girls lounging on floats soaking up the sun, one raising a disposable film camera (Disposable Camera) to flash the lens. [00:06-00:07] Shot 5: Ice in Glass (Macro / Still) Macro still frame, ice cubes drop into a plastic cup, orange liquid splashing up, the hand gripping it adorned with colorful rubber bracelets, sunlight piercing the liquid to cast caustic light spots. [00:07-00:08.5] Shot 6: Dance Tracking (Tracking / Backward Follow) Backward tracking locked on her face, a girl with wet hair clinging to her cheeks and butterfly clips in her hair sways in a woven bikini amid the crowd, hoop earrings swinging, smiling straight into the lens. [00:08.5-00:10] Shot 7: Diving Silhouette (Worm's Eye / Push-in) Worm's-eye upward push, girl launches off the diving board into a silhouette, sun exploding into lens flare, water droplets turning to sparkles in the air. [00:10-00:11.5] Shot 8: Clinking Glasses (Close-up / Left Pan) Quick left pan, two girls clink red plastic cups, liquid spilling out in golden arcs, eyes squinting with laughter. [00:11.5-00:13] Shot 9: DJ Over-the-Shoulder (OTS / Pull-in) Over-the-shoulder push-in on the DJ, foreground fingers hit buttons on the silver CD player, background girls go wild splashing water to the beat, backlit sprays forming a golden rain curtain. [00:13-00:15] Shot 10: Golden Hour Wide Freeze (Extreme Wide / Crane Rise) Crane shot rapidly pulls up, the entire pool party unfurling in golden hour warm light, packed with people and inflatable toys, water surface shattered into gold. Overlay DV timestamp "08/15/2000 PM 5:47," freeze-frame flickering to mimic VHS pause.

prompts.text: Get the prompt for Seedance 2.0 SHOT: camera_motion: tracking shot movement_dynamics: The camera stays anchored on the central silhouetted swordsman, executing fast micro-pans and sudden whip-pans to frame each incoming enemy from the darkness. The camera shakes violently on each high-impact flash to emphasize the kinetic energy and aggressive strobing rhythm of the scene. ACTIONS: core_action: A heavily silhouetted man in a deep red cinematic void stands in a martial arts combat stance holding a katana. A sequence of massive, monstrous silhouetted enemies rushes him sequentially from the shadows: a hulking bipedal reptile, a giant mutated arachnid, a shadowy wraith with elongated claws, a towering armored brute wielding a heavy mace, and a ferocious winged gargoyle. The swordsman executes blazing, precise katana strikes with authentic momentum conservation. Exactly upon blade contact with each target, a powerful 1-frame white light flash explodes, momentarily overexposing the entire scene and freezing the exact point of impact. Between the strobing flashes, the environment instantly plunges back into deep red darkness, while the defeated monsters immediately dissolve into black smoke or drop out of frame. The sequence maintains a relentless, high-contrast, hyper-kinetic rhythm of shadows, precise physical strikes, and sudden blinding light.

The model wears a haute couture silk-textured evening gown, her hair strands gently swaying in the wind, with a blurred neon city elevated bridge in the background. 5-8 seconds: [360-Degree Orbiting Track Shot] The model stands at the central intersection of three sports cars, with the camera orbiting rapidly around her from a low angle. Through overcranking (slow motion) processing, capture her icy and alluring glance back, her gaze exuding strong aggression and sophistication. 8-10 seconds: [Low-Angle Hero Shot from Below] The camera pulls back rapidly from ground level to a full wide shot, with the model standing proudly in the center of the luxury car cluster. The frame composition presents perfect symmetrical aesthetics, with light and shadow focused on her face, showcasing a queen-like dominance. Visual Style: Ultimate cinematic realism, 2.35:1 widescreen. Overall color grading leans toward cool teal and orange (Teal & Orange), with natural film grain texture and softened highlights. The character's skin texture is delicately natural, featuring top-luxury magazine-level makeup and styling. Sound Design: Deep bass electronic ambient music, with sound effects synced precisely to shot transitions (Swish effects), and the visual rhythm breathing in sync with the music's drum beats. prompts.text: A hyper-realistic, high-octane cinematic video still set in a narrow, labyrinthine desert canyon at night. A colossal Storm-Wyrm—a serpentine dragon forged from turbulent thunderclouds and internal lattice-works of blue lightning—violently erupts from a dry riverbed, breaching like a whale through the canyon floor. It sends explosive shockwaves of pulverized red sandstone and electrified dust high into the storm-choked sky. Riding the apex of the Storm-Wyrm's rugged, crackling snout is a modernized Shaolin Monk, clad in robes woven with conductive wire and armored boots. Instead of holding on, he harnesses the wyrm’s massive upward thrust to launch into a spectacular, gravity-defying flying spear kick, aiming directly at a hidden target over the chaotic, shifting dust cloud. The Twist: Suddenly, an unexpected twist: as the wyrm reaches its peak, the canyon walls around them violently ignite with intense static electricity, glowing in pulsating blue and purple hues. A massive, explosive swarm of flying, magnetic iron-ore gargoyles (carved from the cliff face itself) is ripped from the rock, soaring like kinetic missiles all around the suspended monk. The camera perspective shifts from a high-angle wide to a kinetic, fast-paced spiraling FPV drone-style tracking shot. The camera corkscrews 360 degrees around the monk’s spin, tracking his leg trajectory through the static-filled dust as he smashes through the gargoyles and weaves between the lightning-filled air. The shot then plunges momentarily into a thick cloud bank just as the Storm-Wyrm’s massive, spade-like tail slams down into the canyon floor with catastrophic force. The cool, flickering blue static light is dramatically pierced by a sudden, jagged bolt of crimson lightning tearing across the dark sky. Audio Profile (visualized): The scene visualizes the sound of a deafening, crackling roar of compressed thunder and shattering rock, the zing of static electricity, the clatter of stone gargoyles, and a soaring, high-tempo percussion-heavy cinematic score that cuts abruptly to a muffled, low-frequency echo as the camera is engulfed by the heavy storm cloud.

prompts.text: Wild journey in the Grand Canyon 🐱🏜️💥 (made with @nemovideoai Seedance 2) Prompt down below. 👇 #seedance #sd2 #aivideo #CatsLover "STORY FORMAT: 15s / 150 BPM / MULTI-CUT / Shaw Brothers-style wuxia meets absurd American action-comedy TONE: calm confidence → sudden chaos → explosive wuxia combat → absurd comedic payoff SETTING: 18th-century styled characters in a surreal modern setting, speeding along a dusty riverside road at the Grand Canyon, golden sunset, wind blasting, dramatic canyon backdrop CHARACTERS: Black cat master: long white eyebrows, sharp eyes, wearing a beige daoist robe and straw hat, calm but intimidating, master-level martial artist White cat: wearing a pink dress, innocent, naive, easily panics Giant black bear: huge, muscular, wet fur dripping, aggressive but weirdly expressive SCENE: Wide shot: A convertible jeep speeds along the canyon river path. Dust trails behind. Cut to close-up: White cat holding a burger, smiling happily. White cat: “So fun!” Cut to close-up: Black cat driving calmly. Black cat: “Stay alert.” Cut to extreme close-up: Black cat’s eyes open slowly. “Peace... is short.” SMASH CUT— SPLASH!!! A giant black bear rises from the river. Close-up: Bear slowly forms a creepy evil grin. Cut to close-up: White cat freezes. “...uh oh.” The bear locks onto the burger. Bear: “Mine.” It LAUNCHES toward them— White cat (panic scream): “WHY FLYING?!” Mid-air— Black cat grabs her and leaps out. Jeep continues— BOOM (off-screen) Slow-motion: SNATCH!!! The bear steals the burger mid-air. White cat (devastated): “MY FOOD!!!” Close-up: Bear chewing smugly. Black cat lands, sets her down. Close-up: his face shifts from calm → slightly annoyed. Adjusts hat. Black cat: “...mistake.” COMBAT SEQUENCE: — Bear swings, black cat dodges smoothly — Close-up: calm eyes tracking — Redirect strike—THUD — Two fast hits—PAK! PAK! — Ground cracks Bear: “JUST FOOD!!” Black cat: “Her food.” Final— Black cat leaps— “Too far.” DOUBLE KICK— WHAM!! Bear flies— “NOOO—!!” SPLASH!!! River carries it away. Fish jump dramatically. Silence. Final shot: White cat beside jeep, sad face. “...hungry...” Black cat adjusts eyebrows. “I warned him.”

SETTING: 18th-century styled characters in a surreal modern setting, speeding along a dusty riverside road at the Grand Canyon, golden sunset, wind blasting, dramatic canyon backdrop

CHARACTERS:

Wide shot: A convertible jeep speeds along the canyon river path. Dust trails behind.

Cut to close-up: White cat holding a burger, smiling happily.

White cat:
“So fun!”

Cut to close-up: Black cat driving calmly.

Black cat:
“Stay alert.”

Cut to extreme close-up: Black cat’s eyes open slowly.

“Peace… is short.”

SMASH CUT—

SPLASH!!!

A giant black bear rises from the river.

Close-up: Bear slowly forms a creepy evil grin.

Cut to close-up: White cat freezes.

“…uh oh.”

The bear locks onto the burger.

Bear:
“Mine.”

It LAUNCHES toward them—

White cat (panic scream):
“WHY FLYING?!”

Mid-air—

Black cat grabs her and leaps out.

Jeep continues—

BOOM (off-screen)

Slow-motion:

SNATCH!!!

The bear steals the burger mid-air.

White cat (devastated):
“MY FOOD!!!”

Close-up: Bear chewing smugly.

Black cat lands, sets her down.

Close-up: his face shifts from calm → slightly annoyed.

Adjusts hat.

Black cat:
“…mistake.”

COMBAT SEQUENCE:

— Bear swings, black cat dodges smoothly
— Close-up: calm eyes tracking
— Redirect strike—THUD
— Two fast hits—PAK! PAK!
— Ground cracks

Bear:
“JUST FOOD!!”

“Her food.”

Final—

Black cat leaps—

“Too far.”

DOUBLE KICK—

WHAM!!

Bear flies—

“NOOO—!!”

SPLASH!!!

River carries it away.

Fish jump dramatically.

Silence.

Final shot:

White cat beside jeep, sad face.

“…hungry…”

Black cat adjusts eyebrows.

“I warned him.”

prompts.text: A hyper-real cinematic sequence set in an ancient Indian battlefield at golden sunset. The air is thick with dust, glowing in warm orange light. Thousands of armored warriors clash in the background—swords, shields, and banners moving in chaotic rhythm. Sound design includes distant war cries, drums, clashing metal, and strong wind sweeping across the battlefield. The tone is epic, grounded, and intense. ⸻ Shot 1 (0–1s): Mid shot of a warrior archer standing on a wooden chariot. He is battle-worn, focused, breathing heavily. He draws his bowstring fully, muscles tense, eyes locked ahead. Without hesitation, he releases. The arrow launches forward with force, cutting through the dusty air. ⸻ Shot 2 (1–4s): Tracking shot alongside the arrow in slow motion. The arrowhead is realistic—slightly uneven metal, no fantasy glow, worn and sharp. As the camera stabilizes near the tip, something impossible becomes visible: On top of the arrowhead, a miniature battlefield is actively unfolding. Tiny warriors run, clash, and fight across its surface, dust rising from their movement. ⸻ Shot 3 (4–7s): The camera slowly orbits around the arrow mid-flight, maintaining focus on the tip. The miniature battlefield becomes clearer. Within it, a warrior—mirroring the original archer—draws his own bow, preparing to shoot. ⸻ Shot 4 (7–13s): The second arrow is released from within this tiny world. The camera briefly follows it, then shifts into a bullet-time orbit as it travels toward a towering demonic figure within that miniature battlefield. ⸻ Shot 5 (13–15s): The arrow strikes the demon. Impact in slow motion—dust erupts, the demon collapses heavily. As it falls, the camera pulls back, revealing the entire miniature battle still exists on the original arrow, which continues flying forward through the real battlefield. Sharing some failed ones below to show you that I had to go through fails to come up with the almost perfect/usable shot so you don't have to go through it.

prompts.text: Want to know how to achieve this insane level of cinematic detail and fluid dynamics using Seedance 2.0? Here is the exact prompt I used! Subject: > A large, shaggy-haired dog and a real white duck, both completely free of leashes or harnesses. Both animals are soaking wet, with water visibly dripping from the dog's heavy coat and beading off the duck's waxy feathers. Action: > The dog and duck enter the house together. In the center of the room, they both stop for a synchronized grooming moment. In extreme slow motion, the dog starts a powerful head-to-tail shake, creating a massive, spiraling spray of water droplets. Simultaneously, the duck stands tall, stretches its neck, and vigorously flaps its wings to shake off the rain, sending smaller, fine droplets into the air. The two overlapping sprays of water create a beautiful, chaotic pattern of liquid physics as they catch the light. Camera & Movement: > Fixed low-angle cinematic shot. The camera is placed at floor level to emphasize the scale of the animals and the trajectory of the water droplets. High-speed camera aesthetic (slow motion) to capture every ripple in the dog's skin and every individual feather movement of the duck. Environment: > Entrance of a cozy, modern home with a polished dark wood floor. In the background, through the open door, a soft-focus view of a grey, rainy garden. The floor acts as a dark mirror, showing sharp, glistening reflections of the dog, the duck, and the flying water. Style & Lighting: > Hyper-realistic documentary style. Natural, soft light from the overcast exterior creates a "cool" rim light on the animals' silhouettes, while warm interior lamps provide a soft "fill" light. High-fidelity liquid simulation for the droplets, with realistic motion blur only on the fastest moving water particles. Technical Metadata: > 15s duration, synchronized dual-subject motion, advanced liquid particles, 4K resolution. #PromptEngineering #AIArt #AIFilmmaking #DreaminaCPP

prompts.text: EL TAQUERORON SEEDANCE 2.0 — TEXT TO VIDEO — 15 SECONDS — 21:9 ASPECT SHOT 00:00–00:02 · LA TAQUERÍA Extreme close-up macro — the trompo al pastor turning in the early morning light. The meat glistening, the charcoal glow behind it, the pineapple on top catching the fire light. Camera pulls back slowly: Chuy's taquería in Tepito, 6am. Chuy behind the counter — white apron, red bandana on forehead, arms crossed. The trompo turning. The comal hot. The cilantro and onion chopped and waiting. A line of workers, construction helmets and lunchboxes, waiting for their tacos. The trompo spins. Faster than it should. SHOT 00:02–00:04.5 · LA SEÑAL The last customer in line receives his taco. Chuy looks at the trompo — now empty of customers but still turning. He touches the trompo's base with one hand. It vibrates. The pineapple on top begins glowing — not orange from the fire, but supernatural gold. The charcoal fire intensifies: the coals glowing white-hot. The cilantro and onion on the cutting board lift off and orbit the trompo slowly. The salsa jars rattle. The hot sauce begins glowing red. SHOT 00:04.5–00:08 · LA TRANSFORMACIÓN Speed 40%. The trompo IS the transformation's axis — everything builds around its rotation. The vertical spit becomes the robot's spine. The stacked meat panels unfold outward from the spit like a flower — each layer of al pastor becoming one armor plate, the seasoning visible in the texture of each panel, the achiote red and the pineapple gold. The charcoal grill base spreads outward, becoming the robot's legs — the grill grates forming foot soles that leave scorch marks on the street. The comal rises and becomes a shield in the robot's right arm. The enormous carving knife that Chuy uses to slice the taco meat — it rises and becomes the robot's sword, still glowing from the fire. The pineapple on top of the trompo becomes the robot's head — glowing gold, with charcoal-fire eyes. Chuy in the head pod: visible inside the pineapple, red bandana still on, white apron. The hot sauce bottles orbit the robot's shoulders. Sparks fly in achiote red and charcoal orange. SHOT 00:08–00:11 · EL TAQUERO ROBOT The Chuy Robot stands on the Tepito street — built from fire and meat and the smell

prompts.text: English: A 10-second realistic ASMR short video, single-lens, fixed camera position, single angle, no cuts, no zoom, no exaggeration, no science fiction. Set in an industrial workshop environment, a real iPhone is placed directly beneath a heavy-duty hydraulic press. The phone is intact, screen facing upwards, with the metal frame and glass texture clearly visible. Cool-toned natural industrial lighting enhances the realistic details, macro-level clarity, cinematic realism, realistic material deformation, realistic cracking logic, and realistic dust and small glass particles. The ASMR style emphasizes the sounds of metal pressure, fine cracking of glass, and the slight hum of machine oil and machinery. The background is quiet, with no music, no subtitles, and no people in the frame. 0-1 second: The image is stable, the press hovers above the phone, the phone is intact, the environment is quiet, and only a slight mechanical hum can be heard. 1-2 seconds: The press slowly descends, gradually approaching the phone's surface. prompts.text: Cat master has a kid?? here to help or cause chaos?😳🐱 (made with @nemovideoai Seedance 2) Prompt (see below) 😂👇 STORY FORMAT: 15s / 155 BPM / MULTI-CUT / ice ballet performance / exaggerated slapstick comedy TONE: elegant start to escalating chaos to sudden comedic failure SUBJECTS: Orange male cat, athletic, wearing a 1960s hippie outfit with patterned shirt and flared pants, confident expression White female cat, graceful, wearing a sparkling pink fringe dress with rhinestones, precise ballet movement Small gray kitten, wearing white short-sleeve shirt and dark blue shorts school uniform, overly excited, waving arms Judges: hyenas in black suits and sunglasses, strict and synchronized Audience: cute animals, expressive and reactive ENVIRONMENT: Indoor ice arena, glossy reflective ice, strong overhead spotlights, visible audience, clean competition stage MUSIC: Orchestral with light electronic pulse, building intensity, sudden silence at climax, followed by laughter TIMELINE: SHOT 1 0:00–0:02 Medium shot, glide tracking Both cats already spinning. Orange cat lifts white cat with one arm. She extends fully, toes brushing the ice with bright reflections Foreground reveal: small gray kitten at rink side, jumping and waving excitedly SFX: soft glide SHOT 2 0:02–0:04 Wide low-angle Orange cat launches her very high. She spins rapidly mid-air, dress flaring dramatically SFX: strong whoosh SHOT 3 0:04–0:06 Close-up tracking She lands but keeps spinning too fast, pulling orange cat into a fast shared rotation, ice particles spraying SFX: accelerating scrape SHOT 4 0:06–0:08 Medium circular shot Orange cat lifts again, struggling as speed increases. prompts.text: HOOK (0–2.5s): Extreme macro on volt yellow fiber strands pulled taut against black void. 8-12 threads diagonal, hard side light camera-right. f/1.4, nearest sharp, furthest bokeh. At 1.5s one fiber snaps sending ripple through strands. Blue-white rim light. Silence 1.2s, fiber-snap SFX at 1.5s. (2.5–5s): Whip cut wide. Hundreds of volt fibers swirling in vortex against black — multiplying, interlocking mid-air. Speed ramp 200% to 50% slow-mo as fibers condense into shoe upper shell. Mesh solidifies translucent to dense volt textile. Navy strands weave into midfoot overlays. Silver threads flash forming N logo. Push-in 1 ft/s. Tension hum builds. (5–7s): Hard cut — overhead bird's eye. Viscous volt-green liquid pours into frame center against black, pooling with honey viscosity and foam bubbles. Self-molds into FuelCell midsole profile — sculpted curves, angular sidewall. Navy pigment bleeds into edges. Wet glossy transitions to matte solid foam. FUELCELL impression forms. Locked overhead camera. Pour SFX. (7–9.5s): Hard cut — low angle 15° dutch. Dark molten rubber drops and SLAMS onto steel surface flattening into outsole tread. Waffle grid stamps on contact. Debris flies outward 30% slow-mo. Sparks at impact. Camera shakes 3mm then stabilizes. Dutch corrects to level over 1s. Slam SFX, metallic ring, steam. (9.5–12s): Wide shot black void. Three components float at screen edges. At 0.5s magnetic force pulls toward center — drift to violent snap. Outsole locks at 1.2s, shockwave. Midsole slams at 1.6s, dust burst. Upper crashes at 2.0s, biggest shockwave, white flash. Assembled shoe center frame matching @image1 . Three ascending bass thuds per snap. (12–15s): Shoe @image1 drops onto volcanic gravel matching reference. Bounces once, settles hero position — tilted, lateral showing silver N logo, volt-navy colorway. Grey powder and gravel erupt catching blue-white backlight against black. Ground-level camera. Impact real-time, dust 40% slow-mo. Final 1s hero lock. Bass drop, debris foley, silence. Hold black 0.5s. SOUND: 0–1.2s silence | 1.5s snap | 2–5s hum | 5s pour | 7s slam | 9.5/9.8/10.2s triple snap | 12s bass drop | 12–14s foley | 14–15s silence. No music. No VO. TECHNICAL: 9:16, 15s, cinematic photorealistic, ARRI color science, shallow DOF, speed ramp, particles, cool blue-black palette. @image1 = New Balance FuelCell Rebel volt/navy, silver N logo, FuelCell midsole, gravel terrain reference.

Mesh solidifies translucent to dense volt textile. Navy strands weave into midfoot overlays. Silver threads flash forming N logo. Push-in 1 ft/s. Tension hum builds.

(5–7s): Hard cut — overhead bird's eye. Viscous volt-green liquid pours into frame center against black, pooling with honey viscosity and foam bubbles. Self-molds into FuelCell midsole profile — sculpted curves, angular sidewall. Navy pigment bleeds into edges. Wet glossy transitions to matte solid foam. FUELCELL impression forms. Locked overhead camera. Pour SFX.

(7–9.5s): Hard cut — low angle 15° dutch. Dark molten rubber drops and SLAMS onto steel surface flattening into outsole tread. Waffle grid stamps on contact. Debris flies outward 30% slow-mo. Sparks at impact. Camera shakes 3mm then stabilizes. Dutch corrects to level over 1s. Slam SFX, metallic ring, steam.

(9.5–12s): Wide shot black void. Three components float at screen edges. At 0.5s magnetic force pulls toward center — drift to violent snap. Outsole locks at 1.2s, shockwave. Midsole slams at 1.6s, dust burst. Upper crashes at 2.0s, biggest shockwave, white flash. Assembled shoe center frame matching 
@image1
. Three ascending bass thuds per snap.

(12–15s): Shoe 
@image1
 drops onto volcanic gravel matching reference. Bounces once, settles hero position — tilted, lateral showing silver N logo, volt-navy colorway. Grey powder and gravel erupt catching blue-white backlight against black. Ground-level camera. Impact real-time, dust 40% slow-mo. Final 1s hero lock. Bass drop, debris foley, silence. Hold black 0.5s.

SOUND: 0–1.2s silence | 1.5s snap | 2–5s hum | 5s pour | 7s slam | 9.5/9.8/10.2s triple snap | 12s bass drop | 12–14s foley | 14–15s silence. No music. No VO.

TECHNICAL: 9:16, 15s, cinematic photorealistic, ARRI color science, shallow DOF, speed ramp, particles, cool blue-black palette.


@image1
 = New Balance FuelCell Rebel volt/navy, silver N logo, FuelCell midsole, gravel terrain reference."

prompts.text: Out came: - Wide shot of the kitchen - Medium shot of the chef cracking - Extreme close-up of the egg - Wide shot with the plated dish Four shots in 8 seconds. Audio synced. Sizzle, ambient kitchen, jazz, dialogue, all native.
prompts.display_text: Out came: - Wide shot of the kitchen - Medium shot of the chef cracking - Extreme close-up of the egg - Wide shot with the plated dish Four shots in 8 seconds. Audio synced. Sizzle, ambient kitchen, jazz, dialogue, all native.
prompts.tweet_text:
The prompt does the heavy lifting. Mine had three sections:

1. Scene setup (chef, kitchen, lighting)
2. Action beats (crack egg, oil snaps, close-up of yolk)
3. Audio cues (sizzle, soft jazz, dialogue "service up")

Seedance reads action beats as cuts. That is how you get multi-shot in one pass.

prompts.author: @Kiber_Alla
prompts.text: Seedance V2 It is really fun to do long videos but you need to do some editing to get the best out of the clips, I did not do any editing with this video. This is the firs Clip prompt Shoot this like a prestige streaming thriller, not a music video, not fantasy. Two women, both idols, both adults. The scene lives in breath, silence, and proximity. Set the entire moment in a dim vintage apartment hallway, or the corner of an old room that feels half-forgotten. Deep walnut wood paneling. Antique brass wall sconces. One warm amber pool of light falls over the women while everything beyond it dies into shadow. The space should feel beautiful, expensive, and airless, as if the room itself is closing around them. Character one is Han Seo-rin, early 30s, a Korean female idol with an elegant but quietly dangerous presence. She wears a black turtleneck under a long black coat, all clean lines and dark restraint. Her hair is sleek, dark, and softly layered around the face, with a slight fringe that lets her eyes appear and disappear in the low light. She is not loud. She is the kind of woman who controls a room by lowering her voice. Character two is Tachibana Rei, 25, a Japanese female idol with a pale, fragile beauty that reads delicate at first glance but emotionally intelligent on closer look. She wears an ivory V-neck knit dress that falls to the knees, soft and understated, the fabric catching the warm light. Her long dark hair is slightly disordered, as though the evening has already worn her down. She looks like someone trying very hard not to show fear. The emotional shape is simple: suspicion, pressure, fixation. No overt violence. No grabbing. No melodrama. The tension comes from how little space Seo-rin leaves Rei to breathe. Open on Rei already standing near the wall beneath the sconce, shoulders tight, breathing shallow, gaze lowered but restless. Then let Seo-rin enter behind her, close enough to dominate the frame without touching. She stops just at Rei’s back, almost still, letting the silence do the work. The camera should feel like it is slowly being pulled toward them. Seo-rin leans in toward Rei’s ear, speaking so softly that it feels more dangerous than a shout. One hand rises near Rei’s cheek, almost brushing it, but never quite landing. Keep that hesitation. That is where the charge is. Rei’s hands tense near her chest. Her fingers curl. Her jaw tightens. She looks away, then toward the doorway, then down again, realizing there is nowhere easy to go. Use close shots of the details that matter: the tremor in Rei’s fingers, the flicker in her eyes, the shadow of Seo-rin’s face falling across her neck, the black silhouette of the coat swallowing the warm light, the tiny pause before a breath, the way Rei tries to stay composed and fails by a fraction. Dialogue should feel intimate, dangerous, and controlled. Seo-rin, near Rei’s ear, almost gentle: “You can run from everyone else. Not from me.” Seo-rin, after the smallest pause: “Stay where I can see you.” Rei, voice unsteady, trying to hold herself together: “Please... just let me leave.” Seo-rin, with the faintest smile, certain of the answer before she speaks: “You already know this is where the story ends.” Performance note: Seo-rin is never frantic, never theatrical, never raising her voice. Her control is what makes her frightening. Rei is not weak, just cornered; she should feel intelligent, proud, and increasingly shaken, fighting to keep her dignity in a moment that is slipping out of her hands. Visual tone: premium psychological thriller, shallow depth of field, slow deliberate camera drift, warm practical light against surrounding darkness, realistic skin texture, subtle fabric movement, no camp, no exaggerated acting. The scene should feel like a forbidden, dangerous beat from an expensive late-night TV drama.

prompts.author: @ZaraIrahh
prompts.text: FPV drone camera chasing a pack of 2 racing cars speeding together on a super narrow curvy road in a ruined apocalyptic city. The cars are racing and chasing each other aggressively, drifting through sharp turns, overtaking, bumping slightly, and competing for position. The FPV camera flies low behind them, swinging left and right, diving and rising with the steep up-down road. Dust clouds explode from the tires. Broken buildings, flying surveillance drones emitting scanning waves, and rays of light cutting through dusty air. Minimalistic color palette, cinematic lighting, hyper-detailed environment, ultra-realistic, high-speed motion blur, intense chaotic racing energy.

prompts.author: @drjoetw
prompts.text: cat master deserves a nice break (made with Seedance 2.0 on @nemovideoai ) Prompt share DAY STRUCTURE: 15s / 148 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D slapstick wuxia-animal comedy TONE: disciplined temple routine collapsing into chaotic micro-mayhem SUBJECT: Orange cat monk in worn grey dao robe, agile but constantly sleep-deprived CAST: Black-robed chanting cat monks (low-energy), White training monks (overconfident), Elder red-robed master cat (silent authority) PROPS: Rope bucket well, wooden bucket, prayer beads, bamboo axe, stone courtyard, rooftop tiles, incense smoke ENVIRONMENT: Mountain temple complex—courtyard → prayer hall → well → training square → rooftops → bamboo forest → dorm room COLOR: Dawn gold → harsh noon white → sunset amber CAMERA: Single uninterrupted 24mm Steadicam, fast whip transitions, gravity-defying follow, no cuts 1 (0–2s) DAWN WAKE Camera glides through temple roof gap into dorm. Orange cat monk jolts awake to loud birds. He freezes... then performs an exaggerated full-body stretch that briefly distorts his silhouette before snapping back. 2 (2–4s) PRAYER HALL ENTRY He rushes straight into black-robed chanting monks. They recite in dull unison. He tries to chant—mouth moving too slow—head dips mid-syllable, almost asleep while standing. 3 (4–5.5s) WELL SNAP ACTION Hard whip pan to courtyard well. He yanks rope instantly—bucket rockets up, water splashes camera. He wipes face aggressively, fully rebooted. 4 (5.5–7.5s) TRAINING SQUARE MISFIRE Camera swings into white-robed training monks. They strike in formation. He joins late, misreads rhythm, and accidentally redirects every punch—monks scatter outward in synchronized slow-motion confusion. 5 (7.5–8.5s) ELDER INTERRUPTION Elder red-robed master appears frame edge. Instant freeze. Orange monk bows too fast, overshoots balance, slides sideways in panic respect. 6 (8.5–10s) ROOFTOP LAUNCH He bolts upward. Camera tilts and follows as he runs wall-to-roof seamlessly, robe flaring. Tiles crack under rapid steps. 7 (10–11.5s) BAMBOO FOREST AXE BURST Whip transition lands him in forest. He grabs axe mid-motion and chops wood at insane speed—each swing splitting logs and launching chips like ricocheting projectiles. 8 (11.5–13s) SUNSET FATIGUE RUN Lighting shifts to amber. Same continuous camera tracks him looping tasks—run, chop, stumble recover. Motion stays fast but posture collapses slightly each step. 9 (13–14.5s) RETURN PASS He walks back through temple gate. Other monks salute. He tries to respond properly but only manages delayed, tired nods while still moving. 10 (14.5–15s) BED DROP END Camera follows into dorm. He collapses instantly onto mat. Eyes close mid-fall. Final frame holds on stillness as wind chime rings once. SFX: playful shakuhachi + brisk percussion engine, comedic taiko “bonk” hits on monk impacts, rope snap + water splash burst at well, fast wooden clack for training chaos, bamboo crack percussion in forest, ending with soft koto + single wind chime decay into silence. #sd2 #seedance #aivideo #CatsLover

DAY STRUCTURE: 15s / 148 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D slapstick wuxia-animal comedy

TONE: disciplined temple routine collapsing into chaotic micro-mayhem
SUBJECT: Orange cat monk in worn grey dao robe, agile but constantly sleep-deprived
CAST: Black-robed chanting cat monks (low-energy), White training monks (overconfident), Elder red-robed master cat (silent authority)
PROPS: Rope bucket well, wooden bucket, prayer beads, bamboo axe, stone courtyard, rooftop tiles, incense smoke
ENVIRONMENT: Mountain temple complex—courtyard → prayer hall → well → training square → rooftops → bamboo forest → dorm room
COLOR: Dawn gold → harsh noon white → sunset amber
CAMERA: Single uninterrupted 24mm Steadicam, fast whip transitions, gravity-defying follow, no cuts

1 (0–2s) DAWN WAKE
Camera glides through temple roof gap into dorm. Orange cat monk jolts awake to loud birds. He freezes… then performs an exaggerated full-body stretch that briefly distorts his silhouette before snapping back.

2 (2–4s) PRAYER HALL ENTRY
He rushes straight into black-robed chanting monks. They recite in dull unison. He tries to chant—mouth moving too slow—head dips mid-syllable, almost asleep while standing.

3 (4–5.5s) WELL SNAP ACTION
Hard whip pan to courtyard well. He yanks rope instantly—bucket rockets up, water splashes camera. He wipes face aggressively, fully rebooted.

4 (5.5–7.5s) TRAINING SQUARE MISFIRE
Camera swings into white-robed training monks. They strike in formation. He joins late, misreads rhythm, and accidentally redirects every punch—monks scatter outward in synchronized slow-motion confusion.

5 (7.5–8.5s) ELDER INTERRUPTION
Elder red-robed master appears frame edge. Instant freeze. Orange monk bows too fast, overshoots balance, slides sideways in panic respect.

6 (8.5–10s) ROOFTOP LAUNCH
He bolts upward. Camera tilts and follows as he runs wall-to-roof seamlessly, robe flaring. Tiles crack under rapid steps.

7 (10–11.5s) BAMBOO FOREST AXE BURST
Whip transition lands him in forest. He grabs axe mid-motion and chops wood at insane speed—each swing splitting logs and launching chips like ricocheting projectiles.

8 (11.5–13s) SUNSET FATIGUE RUN
Lighting shifts to amber. Same continuous camera tracks him looping tasks—run, chop, stumble recover. Motion stays fast but posture collapses slightly each step.

9 (13–14.5s) RETURN PASS
He walks back through temple gate. Other monks salute. He tries to respond properly but only manages delayed, tired nods while still moving.

10 (14.5–15s) BED DROP END
Camera follows into dorm. He collapses instantly onto mat. Eyes close mid-fall. Final frame holds on stillness as wind chime rings once.

SFX: playful shakuhachi + brisk percussion engine, comedic taiko “bonk” hits on monk impacts, rope snap + water splash burst at well, fast wooden clack for training chaos, bamboo crack percussion in forest, ending with soft koto + single wind chime decay into silence.

prompts.text: Sun Wukong is my favorite legendary figure. (made with Seedance 2.0 on @yapper_so ) Prompt share Cinematic hyper-dynamic fast-paced multi-shot sequence, epic mythological battlefield, IMAX film simulation, 35mm Panavision lens, f/4, heavy cinematic color grading, dramatic contrast between dark necrotic tones and radiant golden divine light. Shot 1: Extreme close-up on Sun Wukong’s face, covered in dirt and blood, golden eyes flickering with exhaustion yet defiance. His fur is matted, his breathing heavy. He kneels in the center of a ruined battlefield, his golden staff cracked and planted into the ground for support. Around him, countless skeletal warriors slowly close in, their hollow eyes glowing with eerie green fire. Shot 2: Rapid shaky handheld shot circling Wukong. The skeletal army tightens its formation, bones clattering, rusted weapons scraping. Wukong struggles to stand, gripping his staff, as the undead swarm prepares to strike from all directions. Shot 3: Low-angle shot from behind Wukong. Just as the skeletons lunge forward, a faint golden glow begins to emerge behind him, cutting through the darkness like dawn breaking through a storm. Shot 4: Sudden explosive bloom of radiant golden light. A towering Buddha manifestation appears behind Wukong, विशाल and serene, radiating infinite divine energy. The battlefield is instantly bathed in warm, overwhelming golden luminosity. Shot 5: Fast upward tilt. Rows upon rows of celestial soldiers materialize in the sky and on the ground behind the Buddha—heavenly generals clad in ornate golden armor, divine banners flowing, weapons shining with sacred light. Shot 6: Whip-pan across the battlefield. The skeletons freeze mid-attack, their bodies trembling under the pressure of the divine aura. Golden light surges outward like a tidal wave. Shot 7: Ultra-fast sequence of disintegration shots. The skeletal army is instantly reduced to ash—bones crack, dissolve, and scatter into glowing dust, evaporating into nothingness under the overwhelming holy radiance. Shot 8: Wide epic drone pull-back. Wukong stands silhouetted in front of the colossal golden Buddha and the vast heavenly army. The battlefield, once dark and corrupted, is now purified, glowing with divine light. Golden particles drift through the air like sacred snow. Final frame: Freeze in epic tension—Wukong gripping his staff, head slightly bowed, while behind him the Buddha and celestial army radiate infinite power, dominating the horizon. #sd2 #seedance #aivideo #RPG

prompts.tweet_text:
Game Mode 🕹️

Seedance 2.0 Prompt:

FORMAT: 15s / 145 BPM / beat-synced jumps
CHARACTER: @[image1], continuously moving forward, outfit changes with each jump, actively part of each game world
CAMERA: frontal tracking, eye-level, full-body, moving backward with the character
COLOR GRADE: Hyperreal Pop Look

TRIGGER: clearly visible finger snap in frame center, strong motion, brief micro pause before snap → instant transition
RULE: New outfit with each jump, forward motion never stops, speed gradually increases (walk → fast walk → run → panic run → slow)

JUMP_MODE: game world
SEQUENCE:
start in home interior, character sitting and playing a game, slight frustration, drops controller, stands up, begins moving forward → first snap → trigger

1: fantasy RPG forest, character as adventurer, walking with purpose, distant creature reacts → trigger  
2: dungeon corridor, character holding torch, navigating traps while moving → trigger  
3: FPS battlefield, character as soldier, bullets pass, tactical forward movement → trigger  
4: racing track, character as racer on foot between cars, dodging vehicles → trigger  
5: survival island, character scavenging while moving, animal rush → trigger  
6: zombie zone, character pushing through, zombies reach out, keeps running → trigger  
7: stealth mission base, character sneaking past guards, alarm triggers mid-move → trigger  
8: sci-fi corridor, character dodging laser grids, fast precise movement → trigger  
9: boss arena, character targeted by boss attack, evasive movement → trigger  
10: extreme boss phase, shockwave forces stumble, unstable run → forced trigger  
11: glitch world, character partially glitching, physics breaking around → forced trigger  
12: empty dev/test map, no threats, character slows down, breathing stabilizes while still moving forward

FINAL:
continues moving forward, performs the same snap again → seamless loop

prompts.author: @tussiwe
prompts.text: A solo cave explorer descends on a rope into a vertical ice cave in the Greenland glacier, their headlamp the only light source. As they descend, the ice walls around them glow from within, a deep electric blue that intensifies with depth. The camera descends with them, looking upward to see the entry hole shrinking above, then looking downward into the blue void below. They land on an ice floor 80 meters down and unclip from the rope. Their torch sweeps across the cave and reveals an enormous underground chamber, cathedral in scale, with ice formations the size of buildings hanging from the ceiling like frozen chandeliers. In the center of the chamber, perfectly preserved in a block of clear ice three meters tall, is a sailing ship. 18th century. Fully intact. Rigging, masts, name plate visible: The Erebus. The explorer walks slowly toward it, breath misting in the cold. They press their gloved hand flat against the ice surface. Inside, through the ice, the ship's wheel turns one degree on its own. Cinematic arctic adventure aesthetic, bioluminescent ice color grade, ultra-realistic ice surface and refraction detail, building wonder to impossible discovery, expedition documentary meets supernatural atmosphere.

prompts.author: @umesh_ai
prompts.text: A one-take begins in extreme close-up on a Stone Age hand gripping a rough flint tool. The camera rotates slowly around the hand as the tool transforms continuously and almost instantly through human history: flint knife to polished spearhead, bronze blade, iron hammer, chisel, quill, compass, telescope, mechanical wrench, fountain pen, soldering iron, keyboard, smartphone, then a gesture controlling floating AI interfaces in midair. The hand ages, changes, scars, skin tone, clothing, and era, but the grip and movement stay continuous. Around it, the blurred environment transforms too: cave wall paintings, mud-brick settlement, forge, library, ship deck, workshop, factory, laboratory, server room, and intelligent future workspace. Each transformation must feel like one invention leading naturally to the next. The story is humanity learning to shape the world with increasing precision. Final reveal: the hand opens, no longer gripping a tool but guiding a luminous AI-generated model of Earth, showing the shift from surviving nature to collaborating with intelligence itself.

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 on @nsketchai Prompt A surreal battlefield in the sky: floating rock islands drifting through a thunderstorm, clouds swirling below like an ocean. The masked ronin dashes across the drifting platforms, pursued by a colossal winged beast whose chest is a swirling vortex of storm clouds and lightning. The camera hurtles from island to island, struggling to keep up as rocks tilt, spin, and crumble away beneath them. Every wingbeat sends shockwaves through the air, shaking the frame and blowing debris and rain straight into the viewer's face. Rapid handheld cuts capture the ronin leaping impossible gaps, sword carving arcs of light that briefly cut through the darkness. The finale shows the camera diving behind him as he jumps off the last crumbling rock, riding a bolt of lightning directly into the monster's chest vortex with a final, all-or-nothing slash that explodes the storm from within and clears the sky in a blinding flash.

prompts.text: First-person GoPro POV mounted on a BMX rider speeding through a dense urban environment. Hands gripping handlebars, front wheel visible. City sounds echo — tires rolling over concrete. At the 2-second mark the rider hits a small ramp and launches onto a ledge. The bike lands — slight jolt through the camera. Immediate transition into a grind along a metal rail — sparks flicker briefly. Velocity ramp: mid-air trick — the bike spins — hands briefly release and re-grab the bars in slow motion. The rider lands and continues forward without pause. He jumps down a staircase — rapid impacts, camera shaking. Final beat: sharp turn through a narrow alley — near miss with a wall. Urban realism, camera vibration, metal textures, cinematic motion, 4K. Made in @dreamina_ai #DreaminaCPP #DreaminaAI

Orange male cat, wearing a gray Taoist robe and traditional hat, hands behind back, confident expression, sharp senses
White female cat, elegant noble appearance, wearing white jeweled ancient outfit, holding a paper umbrella, calm but mysterious
Gray female cat, wearing light green commoner ancient outfit, alert and cautious
Background animals, various cute creatures in Qing dynasty clothing, lively street activity

ENVIRONMENT:
Bustling Qing dynasty street, wooden buildings, warm lantern light, crowded with animal citizens, stone bridge crossing a canal, light fog atmosphere

MUSIC:
Traditional Chinese instruments mixed with light comedic rhythm, builds tension, shifts to fast-paced action, ends with abrupt comedic drop

TIMELINE:

SHOT 1 0:00–0:02
Wide shot, slow tracking
Orange cat walks confidently through a busy street, hands behind back
Camera reveals stone bridge ahead with white cat holding umbrella and gray cat beside her
SFX: ambient crowd

Close-up
Orange cat suddenly stops, nose twitching, sensing something strange
He turns sharply toward the bridge
SFX: subtle cue

Medium shot
Orange cat points and shouts
There is a demon

Immediately leaps forward using exaggerated light-foot movement

Tracking shot

Medium close-up

She says

What can you do

Sudden transformation

She opens her mouth wide and in one fast motion swallows the orange cat

Interior shot, dark environment
Inside the stomach, dim and wet
Orange cat covered in green slime, sitting in darkness

Anyone here Help

SFX: echoing drip

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 Prompt Create a photorealistic ultra-cinematic 15-second first-person POV supernatural defense scene. We are standing alone on a vast ancient salt flat filled with broken stone totems, torn ritual banners, shallow reflective water, drifting dust, and low storm clouds rolling across the horizon at blue-gray twilight. Both hands stay visible in frame. In the right palm, a small black crystalline seed with a dim molten core pulses with strange energy. The tone is tense, mystical, and grounded, like a prestige fantasy-sci-fi film. 0-3s: tight POV on both hands, the right palm holding the small black crystal seed close to camera, wind dragging dust and mist sideways across the salt plain. The POV lifts to reveal a line of armored desert hunters emerging through the haze at medium distance, advancing quickly with long spears and sling-launchers, their silhouettes growing clearer. 3-6s: the right hand closes and crushes the crystal seed. It fractures with a sharp mineral snap and releases a storm of glowing silver-black particles that swirl around both hands and forearms. The particles fuse into luminous geometric markings and heat-like energy veins across the skin, transforming both hands into powerful radiant relic-like hands in full view. 6-10s: the hunters launch a deadly volley of barbed projectiles and thrown spears straight toward the POV. At the last instant both transformed hands thrust forward and all incoming weapons stop abruptly in mid-air just in front of camera, suspended in a dense invisible force field, dust and water rippling outward in a circular shockwave. 10-13s: with one precise hand motion the suspended spears and projectiles rotate in the air and reverse direction toward the attackers, hanging for one charged breath. With a second sharp gesture they launch back at extreme speed across the salt flat. 13-15s: the returning volley tears through the advancing hunters, bodies collapsing into shallow water and dust, formation breaking apart in chaos. The transformed hands remain in frame, glowing with silver-black runic energy as wind sweeps across the battlefield. Photorealistic, immersive, powerful, premium blockbuster finish.

The pavement splits open instantly. Magma veins burst upward through subway tunnels and sewer systems. The fight becomes geological and explosive: lava fountains erupt through streets mid-battle, basalt pillars burst through skyscraper foundations, and asphalt liquefies under intense geothermal pressure. Each of his strikes triggers tectonic fractures beneath the city. Entire blocks begin sinking into molten fissures. Velocity ramp when a dormant volcanic chamber beneath the city detonates and the entire district erupts upward. Cut to aerial: a new volcanic caldera has formed where the city once stood. He stands at the edge of the crater as lava flows reshape the landscape. Diegetic orange magma emissive lighting interacting with ash clouds and molten rock particles, cinematic fire glow and geological destruction physics, 4K. prompts.text: “Am I in a simulation?” —cat master (made with @dreamina_ai Seedance 2 1080p) Prompt share: STORY FORMAT: 15s / 152 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D adventure-comedy / stylized ancient-tomb fantasy TONE: tense survival → frantic ingenuity → claustrophobic horror → absurd cosmic twist SUBJECTS: Orange cat explorer in rugged fedora-style hat, brown leather outfit, holding a torch, axe strapped at waist; Ancient sarcophagi; Swarm of black scarab beetles; Green-skinned alien in black suit with large dark eyes PROPS: Torch, stone lever switch, sarcophagus lids, improvised wooden ladder, crawling tunnel, glowing exit, pyramid peak, green banknote ENVIRONMENT: Dark pyramid chamber filled with sarcophagi → narrow ceiling tunnel → pyramid summit → surreal zoom-out into currency world COLOR: Deep shadow gold and ember torchlight → dusty brown claustrophobic tones → bright desert sunlight → flat green currency palette CAMERA: Single continuous 24mm tracking shot, tight interior movement, rapid whip pans, vertical climb transitions, seamless macro-to-wide transformation, no cuts 1 (0–2s) TRAPPED CHAMBER Camera circles tightly around the orange cat explorer in a dim pyramid room filled with sarcophagi. He slams a stone switch repeatedly. Instead of opening, the stone door grinds downward, sealing completely. DIALOGUE (Cat): “Oh come on—wrong button?!” 2 (2–3.5s) QUICK SCAN He spins, torchlight flickering across walls. Camera tilts up with his gaze—revealing a small hole in the ceiling. His eyes widen. DIALOGUE (Cat): “Okay... plan B.” 3 (3.5–6s) BUILD IN SECONDS He rushes to the sarcophagi—rips off multiple lids, wood cracking. With rapid axe strikes, he chops and reshapes pieces mid-motion. Camera orbits as he snaps them together into a rough ladder with absurd speed. 4 (6–7.5s) CLIMB AND LAUNCH He climbs fast, ladder wobbling. At the top, he forcefully kicks off—launching himself upward into the small ceiling hole, barely squeezing through. 5 (7.5–9s) CLAUSTROPHOBIC CRAWL Camera follows tightly behind as he crawls through a narrow, dark tunnel. Torchlight dims. Ahead, a faint glowing exit flickers. DIALOGUE (Cat, strained): “Yeah... definitely haunted.” 6 (9–11s) HORROR CHASE Behind him, a swarm of black scarab beetles floods into the tunnel—rapid clicking echoes. He panics and speeds up, scrambling forward. DIALOGUE (Cat): “NOPE nope nope nope—!” 7 (11–12s) ESCAPE BURST He bursts out of the tunnel into blinding sunlight—rolling forward onto the peak of a massive pyramid. Desert wind howls. 8 (12–13s) REVEAL HEIGHT He stands, catching breath—then looks down. Camera begins pulling rapidly upward, revealing impossible scale. His expression shifts to shock. 9 (13–14s) REALITY TWIST The pyramid morphs seamlessly into a printed symbol—the entire scene flattening into a green banknote design. The cat’s shocked face becomes a stylized portrait above the pyramid with “100 USD” markings. 10 (14–15s) FINAL PUNCHLINE Camera pulls back further—a green-skinned alien in a black suit holds the bill between fingers. Camera pushes in to his face as he gives a slow, sinister grin directly to lens. SFX: low rumbling stone grind, torch crackle, rapid wood chopping impacts, climbing creaks, muffled tunnel breathing, rising insect chitter swarm, sudden wind burst at exit, surreal paper-flattening sound, ending with a subtle eerie chuckle. #sd2 #seedance2 #aivideo #AICatDrama #CatMiniDrama

Curiosity got the cat in trouble hehe 🐱😆
(created with @nemovideoai Seedance 2)
Prompt share (feel free to re-use it) 🌠👇

Cinematic absurd fantasy time-slip comedy featuring an orange cat in an exaggerated soap-opera style. Ultra-realistic visuals with extreme melodrama and explosive comedic timing.

Character:
Orange cat: dramatic, jumpy, overreacts instantly. Wearing a slightly wrinkled gray suit.
White cat: peacefully asleep in soft pink pajamas.
Guinea pig: tiny, wet, aggressively affectionate.
Gorillas: primitive, expressive, laugh uncontrollably.

Environment:
1950s Japanese tatami room. Dim warm light. Covered mirror in the corner, subtly shaking.

Camera:
Extreme close-ups → slow suspense push → sudden zoom → violent pull → rapid absurd cuts → chaotic comedy framing.

Sequence:

0–2s: white cat sleeping.
SFX (whisper): “Cat master… wake up…”

2–4s: orange cat eyes snap open.
Orange Cat: “...Nope.”

4–6s: hears it again, turns slowly.
SFX: “Cat master…”
Orange Cat: “Who said that?!”

6–8s: tiptoes dramatically. Checks white cat.
Orange Cat: “Stay asleep. Please.”

8–10s: approaches mirror.
SFX (closer): “Come closer…”
Orange Cat: “This is a bad idea…”

10–11.5s: lifts cloth. FLASH.

11.5–12.5s: sucked in violently.
Orange Cat: “NO NO NO—!!”

12.5–13.5s: time vortex chaos.
Orange Cat: “TOO MUCH!!”

13.5–14.2s: lands in snowy hot spring (Mount Fuji).
SFX: SPLASH!!
Orange Cat: “I regret everything.”

14.2–14.7s: looks up, trembling.
Orange Cat: “Where am I…”

14.7–15s: guinea pig pops up and hugs his face.
SFX: SQUEAK!
Orange Cat (muffled): “WHY?!”

Gorillas explode laughing.
SFX: HAHAHAHAHA!!
Orange Cat (to camera): “HELP ME!!”

Style:
Ultra-realistic with absurd fantasy, fast pacing, dramatic zooms, exaggerated reactions, punchy comedic beats.

Final:
Consistent characters, smooth transitions, no glitches, maximum chaos, strong slapstick payoff.

#sd2 #seedance #aivideo #CatsLover

prompts.author: @egeberkina
prompts.text: Style 100% real-life filmed texture, iPhone documentary look, handheld single take feeling, natural low-light environment, slight breathing shake, subtle focus hunting, soft sensor noise in shadows. Character Reference: Use Image1 as the exact character reference. Face, body, posture, clothing must remain identical. No stylization drift. Environment A dark living room at night. Only light source: a TV screen flickering. Minimal furniture. Quiet atmosphere. Hook (0–3s) The TV glitches. For a split second, something is off. Then the room flickers into a completely different reality. 13-Second One-Take Sequence 0–2s The living room suddenly transforms into a horror scene, walls decayed, dim red lighting, distant whispering. The character doesn’t react. SFX: glitch + low horror ambience 2–3s Instant flicker → now sci-fi spaceship interior. Cold blue lights. Mechanical hum. 3–5s The Netflix red glow slowly spreads from the TV across the room. Light bleeds into every surface. Music: deep cinematic build begins 5–7s The world cycles rapidly around the character: • medieval throne room • crime interrogation room • post-apocalyptic wasteland All while the character stands perfectly still in center frame. 7–9s The character slowly raises a remote. Presses pause. SFX: hard digital click 9–11s Everything freezes mid-action: • a sword mid-swing • dust particles suspended • a character mid-fall Absolute silence. 11–12s The main character looks around calmly. Steps through the frozen scene. 12–13s They sit back into their original couch position. The room snaps back to normal. On TV: “Continue Watching?” Soft Netflix red glow fades. Audio Direction SFX: glitch distortions, environment swaps, digital pause click Music: slow cinematic build → cuts to silence at pause → subtle ambient ending Important Notes Keep transitions fast but readable All environments must feel real, not stylized CGI Character must remain calm → contrast is key

prompts.tweet_text:
Just paused everything… except Netflix

Seedance 2.0 Prompt: Style 100% real-life filmed texture, iPhone documentary look, handheld single take feeling, natural low-light environment, slight breathing shake, subtle focus hunting, soft sensor noise in shadows.
Character Reference: Use Image1 as the exact character reference. Face, body, posture, clothing must remain identical. No stylization drift.
Environment A dark living room at night. Only light source: a TV screen flickering. Minimal furniture. Quiet atmosphere.
Hook (0–3s) The TV glitches.
For a split second, something is off.
Then the room flickers into a completely different reality.
13-Second One-Take Sequence
0–2s The living room suddenly transforms into a horror scene, walls decayed, dim red lighting, distant whispering.
The character doesn’t react.
SFX: glitch + low horror ambience
2–3s Instant flicker → now sci-fi spaceship interior.
Cold blue lights. Mechanical hum.
3–5s The Netflix red glow slowly spreads from the TV across the room.
Light bleeds into every surface.
Music: deep cinematic build begins
5–7s The world cycles rapidly around the character:
• medieval throne room • crime interrogation room • post-apocalyptic wasteland
All while the character stands perfectly still in center frame.
7–9s The character slowly raises a remote.
Presses pause.
SFX: hard digital click
9–11s Everything freezes mid-action:
• a sword mid-swing • dust particles suspended • a character mid-fall
Absolute silence.
11–12s The main character looks around calmly.
Steps through the frozen scene.
12–13s They sit back into their original couch position.
The room snaps back to normal.
On TV: “Continue Watching?”
Soft Netflix red glow fades.
Audio Direction
SFX: glitch distortions, environment swaps, digital pause click
Music: slow cinematic build → cuts to silence at pause → subtle ambient ending
Important Notes
Keep transitions fast but readable
All environments must feel real, not stylized CGI
Character must remain calm → contrast is key

prompts.text: Childhood nightmare unlocked...cat master fixed it (made with Seedance 2 on @nemovideoai ) Prompt share / #NemoOneShotChallenge / Seedance 2 Prompt (15 seconds total, each shot ~0.6–1.2s) Cinematic dark fairy-tale thriller with comedic twist, eerie enchanted forest, low-key lighting, cold moonlight filtering through dense trees, volumetric fog, high contrast shadows, dynamic handheld camera, expressive character animation, fast-paced storytelling. S1 (0.9s) Wide shot: An orange cat older brother in blue overalls and a gray flat cap runs barefoot through a dark forest, pulling along a white cat little sister in a dirty pink dress, both breathing heavily. S2 (0.8s) Rear tracking shot: The forest behind them echoes with distant howling wolves, shadows shifting between trees. S3 (0.9s) Forward reveal: Through the fog, a glowing candy house made of sweets appears at the end of the path, colorful and surreal against the dark woods. S4 (0.7s) Close-up: The siblings slow down, eyes wide—fear mixed with curiosity. S5 (0.8s) Door action: The orange cat cautiously pushes open the candy door, it creaks softly. S6 (0.9s) Interior wide: Inside, dim warm light reveals a strange room—giant half-open birdcage, scattered sweets, and a bed in the corner. S7 (0.8s) Close-up: On the bed lies a white-haired “grandma” in green pajamas and a white shower cap, blanket half covering her face. S8 (0.9s) Dialogue moment: The “grandma” weakly gestures toward the birdcage, implying there is cake nearby, voice soft and inviting. S9 (0.8s) Insert shot: A cake sits temptingly near the open birdcage door. S10 (1.0s) Action split: The little sister eagerly reaches for the cake, while the orange cat narrows his eyes, scanning the room. S11 (0.9s) Suspicion reveal: Close-up at the foot of the bed—a wolf tail sticks out from beneath the blanket. S12 (1.0s) Action burst: The orange cat instantly grabs a nearby large iron shovel, swings it with full force toward the “grandma’s” head. S13 (1.0s) Impact & reveal: The shower cap flies off—“grandma” leaps up in pain, revealing a ferocious wolf face, snarling before panicking. S14 (1.0s) Escape: The wolf stumbles and scrambles out the door, fleeing into the dark forest. S15 (1.2s) Final comedic beat: The orange cat scratches the back of his head proudly, while the little sister happily eats cake beside him, cheering with crumbs on her face. Motion & Effects: Dynamic chase camera, shaky handheld for tension, fast snap zooms during action, exaggerated character expressions, cloth and fur simulation, soft glow from candy elements, contrast between horror atmosphere and playful comedic timing. #sd2 #seedance #CatsLover #aivideo ( NemoVideo × Seedance 2.0 The One-Shot Challenge) Contest Info: https:// nemovideo.com/workspace/seed ance-challenge ...
