prompts.text: GYM Rush Morning Seedance 2.0 on @SocialSight Prompt - FORMAT: 15s / 145 BPM / 15 SHOTS / beat-synced routine SUBJECT: @[image1] < ATTACH YOUR IMAGE. WARDROBE: Sleep tee and lounge shorts at home. Compression tee, joggers, training shoes outside. ENVIRONMENT: Small bedroom, dim bathroom light, stairwell echo, early street haze, neon-lit gym, locker room mirror. Everything feels raw, humid, and kinetic. MOOD: Sleepy resistance, forced push, rising aggression, controlled exhaustion. MUSIC: Fast percussive trap-electro COLOR LOGIC: Cool dawn blues → high contrast neon reds STYLE: Ultra-Realistic. LOGIC RULE: Sweat buildup, outfit transition, and physical fatigue must stay consistent across all shots. SHOT 1: ECU, 85mm push-in / 05:10 alarm vibrating aggressively on bedside table. / SFX: alarm buzz, wood rattle. SHOT 2: WS, 35mm handheld jolt / Cut into sluggish sit-up, hand dragging across face, legs dropping off bed. / SFX: mattress creak, tired exhale. SHOT 3: MCU, 50mm slide / Match cut into water splash hitting face in sink, droplets scattering. / SFX: faucet burst, splash slap. SHOT 4: Insert shot, 85mm rack focus / Match cut into protein powder scoop dropping into shaker. / SFX: powder tap, plastic click. SHOT 5: Interior fridge view, 24mm wide / Door swings open, cold light hits as bottle gets grabbed fast. / SFX: fridge hum, bottle knock. SHOT 6: Insert shot, 50mm handheld / Shoes hit ground, laces pulled tight aggressively. / SFX: lace drag, sole thump. SHOT 7: MCU, centered 50mm push-in / Quick gulp of drink, wipe mouth, sharp breath. / SFX: gulp, breath hit. SHOT 8: Bird’s-eye insert, 35mm overhead / Socks slide on, heel snap tight. / SFX: fabric stretch, tap. SHOT 9: MS, 35mm pivot / Outfit swap into gym wear mid-motion, bag grabbed. / SFX: fabric whip, zipper zip. SHOT 10: Insert shot, 50mm overhead / Gym shoes stomp down, final lace pull. / SFX: stomp, lace snap. SHOT 11: WS, 24mm parallax / Door burst open into stairwell, fast descent. / SFX: echo steps, door slam. SHOT 12: MS to CU, 35mm glide into 85mm push-in / Gym entry, weights clank as grip tightens. / SFX: metal clank, breath tighten. SHOT 13: Insert to MCU, 50mm snap zoom / Heavy lift strain, veins tense, sweat forming. / SFX: weight strain, grunt. SHOT 14: OTS, 35mm handheld / Rapid reps, mirror reflection shaking slightly. / SFX: reps thud, breath bursts. SHOT 15: WS, 50mm pull-out / Match cut to locker room bench collapse, head back, deep exhale. / SFX: bench creak, long breath.

GYM Rush Morning 

Seedance 2.0 on @SocialSight

Prompt - FORMAT: 15s / 145 BPM / 15 SHOTS / beat-synced routine
SUBJECT: @[image1] < ATTACH YOUR IMAGE.
WARDROBE: Sleep tee and lounge shorts at home. Compression tee, joggers, training shoes outside.
ENVIRONMENT: Small bedroom, dim bathroom light, stairwell echo, early street haze, neon-lit gym, locker room mirror. Everything feels raw, humid, and kinetic.
MOOD: Sleepy resistance, forced push, rising aggression, controlled exhaustion.
MUSIC: Fast percussive trap-electro
COLOR LOGIC: Cool dawn blues → high contrast neon reds
STYLE: Ultra-Realistic.
LOGIC RULE: Sweat buildup, outfit transition, and physical fatigue must stay consistent across all shots.
SHOT 1: ECU, 85mm push-in / 05:10 alarm vibrating aggressively on bedside table. / SFX: alarm buzz, wood rattle.
SHOT 2: WS, 35mm handheld jolt / Cut into sluggish sit-up, hand dragging across face, legs dropping off bed. / SFX: mattress creak, tired exhale.
SHOT 3: MCU, 50mm slide / Match cut into water splash hitting face in sink, droplets scattering. / SFX: faucet burst, splash slap.
SHOT 4: Insert shot, 85mm rack focus / Match cut into protein powder scoop dropping into shaker. / SFX: powder tap, plastic click.
SHOT 5: Interior fridge view, 24mm wide / Door swings open, cold light hits as bottle gets grabbed fast. / SFX: fridge hum, bottle knock.
SHOT 6: Insert shot, 50mm handheld / Shoes hit ground, laces pulled tight aggressively. / SFX: lace drag, sole thump.
SHOT 7: MCU, centered 50mm push-in / Quick gulp of drink, wipe mouth, sharp breath. / SFX: gulp, breath hit.
SHOT 8: Bird’s-eye insert, 35mm overhead / Socks slide on, heel snap tight. / SFX: fabric stretch, tap.
SHOT 9: MS, 35mm pivot / Outfit swap into gym wear mid-motion, bag grabbed. / SFX: fabric whip, zipper zip.
SHOT 10: Insert shot, 50mm overhead / Gym shoes stomp down, final lace pull. / SFX: stomp, lace snap.
SHOT 11: WS, 24mm parallax / Door burst open into stairwell, fast descent. / SFX: echo steps, door slam.
SHOT 12: MS to CU, 35mm glide into 85mm push-in / Gym entry, weights clank as grip tightens. / SFX: metal clank, breath tighten.
SHOT 13: Insert to MCU, 50mm snap zoom / Heavy lift strain, veins tense, sweat forming. / SFX: weight strain, grunt.
SHOT 14: OTS, 35mm handheld / Rapid reps, mirror reflection shaking slightly. / SFX: reps thud, breath bursts.
SHOT 15: WS, 50mm pull-out / Match cut to locker room bench collapse, head back, deep exhale. / SFX: bench creak, long breath.

prompts.text: AI Video Production is coming along, but SEEDANCE 2 is banging it. Check this comparison of Grok Imagine versus Seedance 2 on Freepik. The base image is my good friend @nwfandi . I posted on our Discord that we need to make him the star of our new Dungeon Dads YouTube show! The gap is widening, and China currently has the lead. Base prompt used Scott Hogan as the seed image: Cinematic fantasy opening credits sequence starring the attached bald smiling man with glasses and goatee as the Dungeon Master, dressed in rich classic fantasy game-master robes: deep burgundy and midnight blue layered velvet robe, subtle gold trim, leather belt with pouches, rune-stitched mantle, silver ringed hands, weathered amulet, polished wooden staff capped with crystal, tasteful hood occasionally lowered, wise charismatic presence He stands in a torchlit stone chamber, candle flames flicker, magical blue mist swirls around him, camera slowly pushes in, robe fabric moving gently in unseen wind Cut to classic first generation tabletop fantasy scenes inspired by early dungeon adventure art: graph paper maps, polyhedral dice rolling across scarred wooden table, pencils marking secret doors, paper character sheets, old school painted miniatures of fighter wizard cleric thief The Dungeon Master gestures and the world comes alive. A red dragon emerges from parchment drawings, skeleton warriors march through torchlit catacombs, treasure chest opens with golden light, gelatinous cube glides through corridor, giant spider descends from ceiling, floating eye tyrant monster watches from shadows Hero party assembles: armored knight with sword and shield, robed wizard with staff, hooded rogue with dagger, dwarf cleric with hammer. They enter a stone dungeon with traps, lava pits, swinging blades, secret passages The attached man reappears throughout as narrator Dungeon Master, turning pages of an ancient tome, sleeves flowing as he moves miniatures with his hands, controlling fate with dice rolls, dramatic closeups, warm firelight reflecting in glasses, confident smile Epic final shot: heroes stand victorious on pile of treasure while the Dungeon Master sits behind a grand carved wooden table in candlelight, wearing ornate robes and amulet, grinning as he rolls one final twenty sided die Style: nostalgic 1980s fantasy opening credits, practical effects feel, rich colors, cinematic lighting, sweeping orchestral energy, high detail, dynamic camera moves, fantasy adventure wonder, no text, no logos

He stands in a torchlit stone chamber, candle flames flicker, magical blue mist swirls around him, camera slowly pushes in, robe fabric moving gently in unseen wind

Cut to classic first generation tabletop fantasy scenes inspired by early dungeon adventure art: graph paper maps, polyhedral dice rolling across scarred wooden table, pencils marking secret doors, paper character sheets, old school painted miniatures of fighter wizard cleric thief

The Dungeon Master gestures and the world comes alive. A red dragon emerges from parchment drawings, skeleton warriors march through torchlit catacombs, treasure chest opens with golden light, gelatinous cube glides through corridor, giant spider descends from ceiling, floating eye tyrant monster watches from shadows

Hero party assembles: armored knight with sword and shield, robed wizard with staff, hooded rogue with dagger, dwarf cleric with hammer. They enter a stone dungeon with traps, lava pits, swinging blades, secret passages

The attached man reappears throughout as narrator Dungeon Master, turning pages of an ancient tome, sleeves flowing as he moves miniatures with his hands, controlling fate with dice rolls, dramatic closeups, warm firelight reflecting in glasses, confident smile

Epic final shot: heroes stand victorious on pile of treasure while the Dungeon Master sits behind a grand carved wooden table in candlelight, wearing ornate robes and amulet, grinning as he rolls one final twenty sided die

Style: nostalgic 1980s fantasy opening credits, practical effects feel, rich colors, cinematic lighting, sweeping orchestral energy, high detail, dynamic camera moves, fantasy adventure wonder, no text, no logos

prompts.text: Here is the 2nd try of the epic war Seedance 2 idea and the fact that this was better I thought I should do one more to get it right understanding that it was a complicated prompt. I tried to tweak the prompt and timing a little. A hyper-real cinematic sequence set in an ancient Indian battlefield at golden sunset. The air is thick with dust, glowing in warm orange light. Thousands of armored warriors clash in the background—swords, shields, and banners moving in chaotic rhythm. Sound design includes distant war cries, drums, clashing metal, and strong wind sweeping across the battlefield. The tone is epic, grounded, and intense. ⸻ Shot 1 (0–1s): Mid shot of a warrior archer standing on a wooden chariot. He is battle-worn, focused, breathing heavily. He draws his bowstring fully, muscles tense, eyes locked ahead. Without hesitation, he releases. The arrow launches forward with force, cutting through the dusty air. ⸻ Shot 2 (1–4s): Tracking shot alongside the arrow in slow motion. The arrowhead is realistic—slightly uneven metal, no fantasy glow, worn and sharp. As the camera stabilizes near the tip, something impossible becomes visible: On top of the arrowhead, a miniature battlefield is actively unfolding. Tiny warriors run, clash, and fight across its surface, dust rising from their movement. ⸻ Shot 3 (4–7s): The camera slowly orbits around the arrow mid-flight, maintaining focus on the tip. The miniature battlefield becomes clearer. Within it, a warrior—mirroring the original archer—draws his own bow, preparing to shoot. ⸻ Shot 4 (7–10s): The second arrow is released from within this tiny world. The camera briefly follows it, then shifts into a bullet-time orbit as it travels toward a towering demonic figure within that miniature battlefield. ⸻ Shot 5 (10–13s): The arrow strikes the demon. Impact in slow motion—dust erupts, the demon collapses heavily. As it falls, the camera pulls back, revealing the entire miniature battle still exists on the original arrow, which continues flying forward through the real battlefield. Hope this helped you in understanding work flows and prompting with Seedance 2 or any other generator actually. I say sorry in advance if I made any mistake with my typing or missed something important I wanted to say - ADHD and being organized isn't my strongest point.

prompts.text: Mini drama: first contact goes wrong (made with @yapper_so Seedance 2) Prompt share (feel free to re-use it) STORY FORMAT: 15s / 150 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D sci-fi action comedy / exaggerated cartoon space fantasy TONE: curious exploration → absurd confrontation → sudden escalation → comedic domination payoff SUBJECTS: Orange cat astronaut in a bulky white space suit holding a flashlight; Alien queen with green skin and large black eyes wearing a luxurious red diamond-studded gown and crown; Small hovering UFO craft PROPS: Flashlight, smartphone, giant rocket launcher, UFO, lunar dust trails ENVIRONMENT: Moon surface with craters and drifting dust, deep space skybox, distant Artemis II spacecraft tilted and embedded in the ground COLOR: Cold blue-grey lunar tones → sharp contrast highlights → explosive fire glow → crisp heroic finish CAMERA: Single continuous 24mm dynamic tracking shot, low-gravity float movement, smooth orbital pans, fast whip transitions, no cuts 1 (0–2s) LUNAR WALK Camera glides low across the moon surface. Orange cat astronaut bounces lightly in low gravity, scanning with a flashlight. In the distance, Artemis II spacecraft sits tilted in the خاک-like lunar dust. 2 (2–3.5s) UFO ARRIVAL A sharp hum builds. Camera tilts up as a small UFO descends aggressively, kicking up a circular dust wave. It lands directly in front of the cat. 3 (3.5–5s) QUEEN DESCENDS Hatch snaps open. Alien queen steps out dramatically, gown flowing despite no atmosphere. She points angrily at the cat. DIALOGUE (Queen): “Excuse me?! Who said you could just stroll onto MY moon?!” 4 (5–6.5s) CAT CLAPBACK Cat barely reacts, casually lowering flashlight. DIALOGUE (Cat): “Oh please... like you guys don’t sneak down to Earth all the time.” 5 (6.5–8s) EVIDENCE DROP Cat pulls out smartphone and flips it toward her. Camera pushes in briefly: screen shows ancient pyramid construction—green alien in pharaoh outfit commanding white rabbit slaves moving giant stones. DIALOGUE (Cat): “Yeah... wanna explain this little construction project?” 6 (8–9s) QUEEN DENIAL Queen scoffs, visibly irritated, crossing arms. DIALOGUE (Queen): “Irrelevant! You’re trespassing. That’s still illegal.” 7 (9–10s) FINAL WARNING Cat tilts head slightly, smirks. DIALOGUE (Cat): “Alright... then I won’t hold back.” 8 (10–11s) MOCKING RESPONSE Queen laughs arrogantly, stepping closer. DIALOGUE (Queen): “Oh really? And what exactly are you gonna—” 9 (11–12.5s) INSTANT ESCALATION Before she finishes, cat whips out an oversized rocket launcher from off-frame. No hesitation—fires instantly. Massive recoil blast kicks up lunar dust cloud. 10 (12.5–13.5s) EXPLOSIVE EXIT Rocket hits. Queen screams as she is launched backward, spinning into the void—small explosion bloom flashes in distance. 11 (13.5–15s) HERO SHOT END Dust settles. Camera slowly pushes in. Cat adjusts suit calmly, turns to camera with confident grin. DIALOGUE (Cat): “Never mess with Cat Master.” SFX: soft ambient space hum, low-gravity foot thumps, rising UFO whine, sharp landing burst, comedic dialogue timing beats, phone “beep” reveal, heavy rocket launch blast, distant explosion pop, ending with subtle heroic sting and silence. #sd2 #seedance #aivideo #CatsLover Fast access to Seedance 2 PRO (no wait, no queue): https:// yapper.so/?via=shao-chiu

prompts.text: Cat master vs snow lady—how to survive? (made with @nemovideoai Seedance 2) Prompt share STORY FORMAT: 15s / 150 BPM / MULTI-CUT / Shaw Brothers-style wuxia horror-comedy / exaggerated melodrama and slapstick payoff TONE: eerie suspense → frantic chase → over-the-top wuxia escape → absurd comedic reversal SETTING: Nighttime snowy coniferous forest, heavy snowfall, cold blue tones, Mount Fuji looming in the background, howling wind CHARACTER: Orange cat ronin wearing a traditional 16th-century Japanese straw hat (kasa), worn kimono, holding a wooden staff in one hand and a flickering lantern in the other White cat as a Yuki-onna spirit: long messy hair, glowing blue eyes, pale expression, wearing a thin translucent light-blue kimono, floating in the air with a sinister aura SCENE: Wide shot: The orange cat struggles through deep snow, each step heavy, breath visible in the freezing air. The lantern flickers violently in the wind. Suddenly, the wind stops. Silence. A ghostly figure slowly materializes ahead—floating above the snow. Close-up: The white cat Yuki-onna, hair drifting unnaturally, eyes glowing bright blue, a twisted smile forming. The orange cat freezes, trembling, voice shaking: “Miss... who... who are you...?” The white cat tilts her head, then lets out a chilling, playful laugh: “I am the Snow Woman... and now that you’ve seen me... you’re finished.” The wind HOWLS again— Instantly, the orange cat SCREAMS and bolts away. CHASE SEQUENCE (fast cuts, Shaw Brothers wuxia style): — The orange cat leaps onto a tree trunk with light-foot kung fu, kicking off and flying to another tree — He spins mid-air, barely dodging the white cat who glides smoothly after him, closing distance rapidly — He dives behind a large rock, holding his breath— The white cat slowly floats past... then suddenly snaps her head backward unnaturally — He yelps and launches away again The white cat accelerates, flying faster, robes fluttering violently, her laughter echoing through the forest “I can see you... you can’t escape...” — The orange cat sprints across snow, slips, rolls, then recovers with a dramatic wuxia flip — He jumps between trees again, but his movements grow slower, exhausted Final escape: He bursts out onto the edge of a cliff— He stops. No way forward. Heavy breathing. Snow falling. Silence. He slowly turns around, gripping his staff, forcing courage: “...Fine. I’ll face you.” The white cat slowly descends from the sky, drifting closer... closer... almost within reach— Suddenly— The orange cat pulls out a can from his robe—labeled clearly: “CAT MASTER” He shouts dramatically: “I’M USING MY FINAL MOVE!!” The white cat instantly freezes—eyes LOCK onto the can In a blur—she SNATCHES it mid-air Her expression instantly flips from evil to crazed excitement “FOOD?!” She lands and begins DEVOURING the can wildly, completely ignoring everything else The orange cat stares for half a second—then grins “Got you.” He steps forward— And delivers an exaggerated, full-force wuxia kick “HYAAAH!!” The white cat SCREAMS dramatically as she flies backward—still clutching the can— “MY FOOOOOOD—!!” She disappears off the cliff into darkness Long silence Snow continues to fall Final shot: The orange cat stands at the cliff edge, adjusts his straw hat, then turns to the camera with a smug grin “Never underestimate... CAT MASTER.” #sd2 #seedance2 #CatsLover #aivideo

prompts.tweet_text:
Cat master vs snow lady—how to survive? 
(made with 
@nemovideoai
 Seedance 2)
Prompt share 

STORY FORMAT: 15s / 150 BPM / MULTI-CUT / Shaw Brothers-style wuxia horror-comedy / exaggerated melodrama and slapstick payoff

TONE: eerie suspense → frantic chase → over-the-top wuxia escape → absurd comedic reversal

SETTING: Nighttime snowy coniferous forest, heavy snowfall, cold blue tones, Mount Fuji looming in the background, howling wind

CHARACTER:
Orange cat ronin wearing a traditional 16th-century Japanese straw hat (kasa), worn kimono, holding a wooden staff in one hand and a flickering lantern in the other
White cat as a Yuki-onna spirit: long messy hair, glowing blue eyes, pale expression, wearing a thin translucent light-blue kimono, floating in the air with a sinister aura

SCENE:

Wide shot: The orange cat struggles through deep snow, each step heavy, breath visible in the freezing air. The lantern flickers violently in the wind.

Suddenly, the wind stops. Silence.

A ghostly figure slowly materializes ahead—floating above the snow.

Close-up: The white cat Yuki-onna, hair drifting unnaturally, eyes glowing bright blue, a twisted smile forming.

The orange cat freezes, trembling, voice shaking:
“Miss… who… who are you…?”

The white cat tilts her head, then lets out a chilling, playful laugh:
“I am the Snow Woman… and now that you’ve seen me… you’re finished.”

The wind HOWLS again—

Instantly, the orange cat SCREAMS and bolts away.

CHASE SEQUENCE (fast cuts, Shaw Brothers wuxia style):
— The orange cat leaps onto a tree trunk with light-foot kung fu, kicking off and flying to another tree
— He spins mid-air, barely dodging the white cat who glides smoothly after him, closing distance rapidly
— He dives behind a large rock, holding his breath—
The white cat slowly floats past… then suddenly snaps her head backward unnaturally
— He yelps and launches away again

The white cat accelerates, flying faster, robes fluttering violently, her laughter echoing through the forest

“I can see you… you can’t escape…”

— The orange cat sprints across snow, slips, rolls, then recovers with a dramatic wuxia flip
— He jumps between trees again, but his movements grow slower, exhausted

Final escape: He bursts out onto the edge of a cliff—

He stops. No way forward.

Heavy breathing. Snow falling. Silence.

He slowly turns around, gripping his staff, forcing courage:
“…Fine. I’ll face you.”

The white cat slowly descends from the sky, drifting closer… closer… almost within reach—

Suddenly—

The orange cat pulls out a can from his robe—labeled clearly: “CAT MASTER”

He shouts dramatically:
“I’M USING MY FINAL MOVE!!”

The white cat instantly freezes—eyes LOCK onto the can

In a blur—she SNATCHES it mid-air

Her expression instantly flips from evil to crazed excitement

“FOOD?!”

She lands and begins DEVOURING the can wildly, completely ignoring everything else

The orange cat stares for half a second—then grins

“Got you.”

He steps forward—

And delivers an exaggerated, full-force wuxia kick

“HYAAAH!!”

The white cat SCREAMS dramatically as she flies backward—still clutching the can—

“MY FOOOOOOD—!!”

She disappears off the cliff into darkness

Long silence

Snow continues to fall

Final shot:
The orange cat stands at the cliff edge, adjusts his straw hat, then turns to the camera with a smug grin

“Never underestimate… CAT MASTER.”

prompts.text: Cat master’s girlfriend? built different This is a little animation gift for Creatureberry @BerryBattyToys (made with @yapper_so Seedance 2.0) Prompt share Seedance 2 Prompt (15 seconds total, each shot ~0.6–1.2s) Cinematic fantasy elegance with mystical action, enchanted forest rose garden, Mount Fuji in the background, soft golden sunlight mixed with magical glow, drifting petals, ethereal atmosphere, smooth cinematic camera, graceful yet powerful energy effects. S1 (0.9s)Wide shot: A white cat princess with traditional Japanese royal hairstyle walks gracefully through a blooming rose garden in a forest, Mount Fuji visible in the distance under a clear sky. S2 (0.8s)Medium tracking shot: She gently hums an English melody, holding a golden glowing wand, brushing past roses as petals drift in the air. S3 (0.9s)Close-up: Her serene expression, soft smile, golden light reflecting in her eyes as she admires the flowers. S4 (0.7s)Atmosphere shift: The wind subtly changes, petals scatter faster, shadows deepen. S5 (0.8s)Reveal: A group of hyenas dressed as Japanese ronin step out from the bushes, slowly surrounding her. S6 (0.9s)Wide encirclement shot: The hyenas tighten the circle, gripping their weapons, tension rising. S7 (0.8s)Reaction: The white cat remains calm, lifting her wand slightly, expression turning confident. S8 (1.0s)Hero moment: She raises the wand high, golden light intensifying, robes flowing gently. S9 (1.0s)Incantation: She chants a clear English spell about banishing evil spirits, voice echoing softly through the garden. S10 (1.0s)Magic release: The wand emits a radiant golden aura that expands outward like a wave of light. S11 (0.9s)Impact: The aura strikes the hyenas—dark, smoky evil spirit energy bursts out from their bodies, being forcefully expelled. S12 (0.9s)Supernatural effect: The hyenas stagger as if their souls are shaken loose, black mist pulled away and scattered into the air. prompts.tweet_text:
Cat master vs father-in-law—straight chaos 
(made with 
@yapper_so
 Seedance 2)
Prompt share 

1990s Japanese TV drama style. A white cat (daughter, wearing a pink dress) sits beside her boyfriend, an orange cat (wearing a gray suit). Next to the father, a black bear (wearing casual clothes), sits the mother, a white rabbit (wearing a kimono). All four characters speak entirely in English. A 15-second multi-cut scene that builds awkward tension and erupts into absurd comedy.
A typical cramped Japanese dining room, with a table packed full of homemade dishes.
The four characters are tightly squeezed around the small table. The orange cat boyfriend sits stiffly, forcing a nervous smile. The black bear father crosses his arms, glaring intensely at him with growing suspicion.
Breaking the heavy silence, the daughter (white cat) beams with excitement and points proudly at her boyfriend:
“Dad! I want you to meet my boyfriend!”
The mother (white rabbit) smiles gently and pats the father’s shoulder, trying to calm him down:
“Dear… please don’t look so scary.”
The father slowly lowers his head. A long, ominous silence. Then suddenly—
He SLAMS the table, stands up violently, and roars:
“BOYFRIEND?!”
In an instant, chaos explodes. The black bear lunges across the table and starts wildly swinging at the orange cat. Plates fly into the air, food scatters everywhere in exaggerated slow motion. The orange cat desperately dodges and shields himself, shouting:
“WAIT—SIR—PLEASE—!”
In the corner, the white cat daughter and the white rabbit mother cling to each other, trembling and crying in panic:
“Dad, stop!!”
“This is too much!!”
The scene ends in full slapstick mayhem: overturned table, food everywhere, the bear still chasing the orange cat around the tiny room as everything collapses into absurd, explosive comedy.

#seedance #sd2 #CatsLover #aivideo

prompts.author: @tutututuulip
prompts.text: Shot 1 (00: 00–00:01) – MS, Dolly in + Whip Pan A white-haired sorceress stands in an ancient archive filled with hanging talismans and bells, painting a sigil. Dark mist erupts from the ground—she reacts instantly, dodging and countering with a sweeping brush strike. VFX: Distorted, pulsing shadow mist. SFX: Paper rustle, soft bells, low hum. Shot 2 (00: 01–00:02) – CU, Fast Push-in Her eyes glow. With a flick of her wrist, she draws sharp blue sigil strokes mid-air, forming blade-like trails. VFX: Intersecting cold-blue energy lines. SFX: Sharp air cuts, energy charge. Shot 3 (00: 02–00:03) – WS, Crane Up Talismans swirl violently. Layered circular sigils form beneath her feet. A shadow entity emerges but is blocked by the rotating barrier. VFX: Multi-layer rotating sigil rings, vortex of talismans. SFX: Deep resonance, swirling wind. Shot 4 (00: 03–00:04) – MFS, Orbit Tracking Scene shifts to a fractured sky. She steps on floating sigils; her brush extends into a glowing chain of runes that lashes toward the entity. VFX: Flickering rune-chain light. SFX: Air tearing, chain clinks. Shot 5 (00: 04–00:06) – LS, Chase Cam Amid storm clouds and a broken moon, she rides the rune chain through the air, pursuing the fleeing shadow. VFX: Rolling clouds, blue-white trails vs black mist. SFX: Roaring wind, distant thunder. Shot 6 (00: 06–00:07) – CU, Slide She taps nodes along the chain, activating hidden purple sigils that pulse with new energy. VFX: Sequential purple node illumination, pulse flow. SFX: Light clicks, energy hum. Shot 7 (00: 07–00:08) – MCU, Static She closes in and strikes the entity’s forehead. A burst of light—its body distorts, a complex seal appears on its chest. VFX: Purple-blue flash, rotating seal. SFX: Sharp burst, distorted screech. Shot 8 (00: 08–00:09) – WS, Dive Shot Both streak downward like meteors, piercing clouds toward an ancient stone altar. VFX: Comet-like light trails. SFX: Air screech, compression. Shot 9 (00: 09–00:10) – WS, Impact Static They crash. Dust erupts. She slams her hand down—radiating sigils crack across the ground. VFX: Glowing fractures spreading outward. SFX: Heavy impact, stone cracking. Shot 10 (00: 10–00:12) – LS, Pull Back A massive 3D sigil array rises, forming layered barriers that trap the entity at the center. She stands calmly outside. VFX: Expanding geometric barriers, drifting particles. SFX: Low steady resonance. Shot 11 (00: 12–00:13) – CU, Static She forms a hand seal and whispers: “Seal.” VFX: Light particles contract. SFX: Soft chant, energy tightening. Shot 12 (00: 13–00:15) – CU, Fade Out Eyes closed, she meditates as all light fades, leaving faint residual glow in silence. VFX: Light dissipates into darkness. SFX: Gentle wind, fading echo.

prompts.author: @SaniBulaAI
prompts.text: A vintage steam train from the 1920s moves through a dense Scottish Highland fog at midnight, its headlamp cutting a yellow cone through the grey. The camera begins in a wide exterior shot tracking alongside the train as it moves, the Highland landscape barely visible beyond the fog. Cut to inside: the passenger cars are fully lit with warm amber light but completely empty. Seats are set for passengers, cups of tea still steaming on fold-out tables, a newspaper open and held in place as if someone just set it down. The camera moves through the cars one by one, each identically abandoned mid-moment. In the last car, a single passenger sits facing away from the camera, a woman in period dress, completely still. The camera creeps forward down the aisle toward her. As it reaches the seat directly behind her, the train enters a tunnel and everything goes black. The train exits the other side of the tunnel. The last car is now empty. Her teacup steams on the table. The train continues into the fog. Cinematic gothic atmosphere, desaturated Highland palette with warm amber interior contrast, ultra-realistic fog simulation, silence punctuated only by train sounds, slow burn psychological horror aesthetic.

prompts.tweet_text:
What if a grand ballroom existed 10,000 feet above the clouds? One prompt 

"An impossibly grand Victorian ballroom floats suspended above the clouds at 10,000 feet, its walls made entirely of glass revealing an endless sky in every direction. Dozens of couples in formal evening wear waltz across a white marble floor as the sun sets on the horizon, the clouds below turning amber and violet. The camera enters through one of the glass walls in a slow glide, weaving between dancing couples without disrupting them, catching details, a diamond earring catching the last light, two gloved hands meeting for the first waltz, a champagne flute reflecting the sunset sky. The music swells and the entire ballroom begins to rise higher, the clouds falling away below, stars beginning to appear above. One couple stops dancing and walks hand in hand to the glass wall, pressing their fingertips to it and looking out at the universe around them. Camera holds on their reflection in the glass with infinite space behind them. Romantic cinematic epic aesthetic, golden hour transitioning to deep blue night, ultra-detailed period costume and architecture, sweeping orchestral score atmosphere, dreamlike weightless camera movement."

A world that cannot exist. One prompt made it real.

prompts.text: A high-stakes, 15-second cinematic sequence of a sorceress in a pale yellow silk gown performing a primal fire ritual on a cracked volcanic plain. The ritual culminates in the manifestation of a colossal fire lion that transcends the physical realm, turning the sky into an apocalyptic firestorm.Action Breakdown (0–15s)0–3s (The Manifestation): The shot opens with the woman slamming her hands toward the earth. The volcanic rock explodes as a 20-foot-tall lion made of roiling solar fire lunges from the fissures. Her gown whips violently in the resulting thermal blast.3–7s (The Synchronization): A rapid, low-angle orbital camera move circles the duo. The woman weaves her arms in a commanding dance; the lion mimics her movements, swiping a massive flaming paw at the camera and leaving a trail of intense heat haze and sparks across the lens.7–10s (The Compression): The woman pulls her hands together at her chest, drawing the lion’s mass inward. The beast recoils and condenses into a blinding, white-hot orb of pure energy between her palms. A dramatic snap-zoom focuses on her face, her eyes reflecting the swirling solar core.11–13s (The Shockwave): The orb detonates. A massive, golden circular shockwave ripples outward, disintegrating nearby rock pillars into dust. The lion re-emerges behind her, now three times its previous size—a gargantuan, translucent celestial titan that rears back and roars into the heavens.13–15s (The Firestorm): The celestial lion dissolves into a million falling stars. The camera pulls back into an epic wide shot, showing the woman’s tiny silhouette standing in a rain of golden embers as the storm clouds above ignite into a gargantuan, swirling fire-vortex.Technical & Atmospheric DetailsCharacter: The sorceress appears triumphant and powerful, her silhouette sharp against the blinding light. Her gown glows brilliantly, appearing almost translucent in the final explosion.The Elemental: Transitions from "liquid lava" textures (0-7s) to a "blinding star" (7-10s) and finally to a "nebula-like constellation" (11-15s).Lighting: High-contrast, cinematic lighting. The scene shifts from deep orange and black to a blinding white-out, ending in a warm, golden atmospheric glow.Sound Design: Begins with the "crunch" of earth and "roar" of fire, followed by a high-pitched ringing during the compression, and ending with a low-frequency "thoom" of the shockwave and the shimmering sound of falling embers. on @haimeta_ai

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 prompt share: Cinematic shot, HYPER-REALISTIC 8K rendering. The scene is governed by a single, unwavering rule: the SUN and SKY are photorealistic and real; EVERY OTHER ELEMENT, without exception, is a completely and consistently rendered, FULLY VOLUMETRIC, three-dimensional stained-glass art installation. The soundtrack contains NO MUSIC, only the rich, resonant, and diegetic sound effects of the environment and the characters' actions. The setting is a city street at dusk. The real sun has just set, but the sky is still filled with a deep orange and purple light. The street is made of volumetric glass cobblestones, and is flanked by towering, sculptural 3D stained-glass buildings. A Day Chaser, a bike messenger, is weaving through traffic at high speed. They are a living being, their body showing the focused, athletic posture of an experienced urban cyclist. They lean hard into a turn, their glass eyes scanning ahead for obstacles. Their bike is a functional, 3D sculpture of leaded glass and brass-toned glass fittings. As they ride, they are actively chasing the last usable light of the day, moving from the deep shadows of the buildings into the open intersections where the bright light of the real sky is still reflected on the wet glass streets. When they pass through these patches of reflected light, their body projects a fleeting, beautiful, and kinetic smear of caustics onto the 3D glass pavement. Key Visual Directives for Realism: Day Chaser Materiality (THE CORRECT LOOK): A masterpiece of stained-glass art, composed of multiple, individually crafted, stained-glass pieces, meticulously leaded together. They possess believable human features (hair, eyes, mouth) in intricate glasswork, with a sophisticated palette. Consistent 3D World: The buildings, the street, the bike, and other sculptural glass vehicles are all rendered as fully volumetric, 3D objects. Light Dynamics: The light is ambient and reflected from the sky, creating a moody, high-contrast urban scene. No mystical glowing or artificial CGI sparkles. Implied Sound (Diegetic Only): The whirring sound of the glass bike's chain and gears. The hiss of the glass tires on the wet glass cobblestones. The distant, echoing, resonant sounds of a stained-glass city at nightfall. Artistic Tone: Gritty, energetic, and cool. A scene about a living being's focused and skillful work, rigorously adhering to the core visual laws.

When they pass through these patches of reflected light, their body projects a fleeting, beautiful, and kinetic smear of caustics onto the 3D glass pavement. Key Visual Directives for Realism: Day Chaser Materiality (THE CORRECT LOOK): A masterpiece of stained-glass art, composed of multiple, individually crafted, stained-glass pieces, meticulously leaded together. prompts.text: High-quality anime style, 2D animation. Warm, cinematic lighting with sunlight filtering through blinds. A tiny man wearing a green hoodie and blue jeans runs across a wooden floor toward a giantess. He climbs up her massive foot and leg, which are covered in black fishnet stockings, using the fishnet holes to climb. Dynamic low-angle camera following his ascent, emphasizing the colossal scale of the giantess. He climbs past her black pleated skirt and white collared shirt, scaling up her dark blue ribbed sweater. The camera pans up to reveal the giantess looking down at him. She has long brown hair, a flower hair clip, and large brown eyes. She wears a highly surprised, wide-eyed expression with a slight blush. Background is a softly blurred bedroom with a music keyboard.

prompts.author: @ertanlabs
prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 Prompt 15s / 180 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 360 POV downhill longboard run, viral energy, max chaos. SUBJECTS: First-person downhill longboard rider, front foot, deck nose, and flickering trucks appearing low in frame during drops, slides, and stair gaps. Flower pots, café chairs, scooters, cats, delivery bikes, tourists, and laundry erupt around the rider as sudden obstacles. ENVIRONMENT: Dense Mediterranean cliffside town, whitewashed stair alleys, blue shutters, tiled landings, sea-glow at the horizon, hanging laundry, tangled wires, sun-faded murals, narrow terraces, umbrellas, puddles, warm late afternoon light, deep stone shadows, layered rooftops dropping toward the coast below. MOOD: Adrenaline, max chaos, nonstop downhill street speed. COLOR LOGIC: Hyperreal Pop Look with sun-bleached whites, cobalt accents, coral signage, golden flare. CAMERA DETAILS: 360 action-cam POV, horizon-stable but brutal, nonstop forward drive, minimal roll, heavy stair vibration, sharp side and rear parallax, full-sphere chaos, no release. 0:00–0:03: POV freefalls into a steep stone stairwell, board nose rattling low in frame as the rider lands into brutal vibrating descent. A café server yanks a tray away from the line while walls, balconies, plants, and faces whip past inches away. SFX: sea wind, wheel chatter, stair hits, breath, distant crowd. 0:03–0:05: POV slashes left across a tiny tiled landing, clips past stacked flower pots, then snaps into another stair drop as hanging laundry lashes across the front hemisphere and tourists recoil. SFX: cloth slap, ceramic clink, wheel scrape, crowd gasp. 0:05–0:08: POV hammers the next staircase as a cat darts center frame and pigeons burst upward from a side ledge. The rider speed-check slides, then threads between a parked scooter and iron handrail with almost no clearance. SFX: tire chirp, wings flapping, metal rattle, stair thuds. 0:08–0:10: POV blasts over a short cobblestone gap between stair sections, trucks clacking, then drops straight into the next descending run as delivery bikes streak through the side wrap. SFX: wheel buzz, curb thump, distant horn, crowd echo. 0:10–0:13: POV attacks two tight landings and another steep stepped lane, every hit jolting the sphere as rooftops, awnings, church bells, alley mouths, and flashes of sea curl around the viewer. SFX: air rush, heavy thump, stair chatter, wind buffeting. 0:13–0:15: POV rips to a cliff overlook and throws into a savage stand-up slide, dust and tiny pebbles spraying across the lower frame while the glowing sea-town skyline blooms around the full sphere. SFX: wheel screech, gravel spray, crowd roar. Hyperreal, continuous-shot chaos, no text, no logos.

prompts.text: Medieval cat master: cute first, survival later (created with Seedance 2.0 on @nemovideoai ) Prompt share Seedance 2 Prompt (15 seconds total, each shot ~0.6–1.2s) Cinematic fantasy dark-comedy action, medieval European castle bedroom, warm candlelight vs cold moonlight contrast, dramatic shadows, ultra-dynamic camera, exaggerated character animation, high-detail textures, fast-paced editing, humorous tone. S1 (0.9s) Wide shot: A chubby orange cat in full medieval European knight armor stands beside a luxurious canopy bed inside a castle bedroom, moonlight spilling through wooden windows. S2 (0.8s) Close-up: On the bed, a white cat princess sleeps messily, loudly snoring, one paw casually picking her nose in an unrefined, comedic manner. S3 (0.9s) Medium shot: The orange cat shakes her urgently, armor clanking, trying to wake her up, visibly frustrated. S4 (0.7s) Close-up: The princess continues snoring, completely unfazed, bubble forming from her nose. S5 (0.8s) Cut to window: Outside the wooden window, a pair of giant glowing eyes suddenly appears in the darkness. S6 (0.9s) Reveal shot: A pink fire-breathing dragon presses its face near the window, exhaling faint smoke, eyes wide and menacing. S7 (0.8s) Reaction shot: The orange cat freezes, then instantly turns serious, gripping his longsword. S8 (1.0s) Action burst: With a powerful kick, the orange cat smashes through the wooden window, splinters flying outward. S9 (1.0s) Balcony wide shot: The cat lands on the stone balcony, facing the hovering pink dragon under moonlight. S10 (1.0s) Combat: The cat lunges forward, slashing rapidly with the longsword, sparks and motion blur streaks. S11 (0.8s) Twist: The dragon suddenly opens its mouth and bites down, swallowing the sword whole. S12 (0.9s) Close-up: The orange cat pauses, then instantly switches expression, huge sparkling eyes, puffed cheeks, exaggerated ultra-cute innocent face. S13 (1.0s) Reaction: The dragon’s fierce expression melts into confusion and softness, flames dying down. S14 (1.0s) Punchline action: In a split-second, the orange cat snaps back to normal and kicks the dragon hard, sending it tumbling off the balcony into a deep abyss. S15 (1.2s) Final close-up: The orange cat turns to camera, smirks proudly, and gives a playful left-eye wink, armor gleaming in moonlight. Motion & Effects: Fast-paced comedic timing, strong motion blur, dynamic camera swings (orbit, low-angle, snap zooms), particle effects (wood splinters, smoke, sparks), expressive character animation, seamless flow, high-impact yet humorous finish. #sd2 #seedance #CatsLover #aivideo

prompts.text: You can make your videos here : http:// socialsight.ai Prompt A young man stands alone in a dimly lit urban alley at night, surrounded by a group of aggressive enemies closing in on him. The atmosphere is tense, with flickering streetlights and drifting smoke. As the fight begins, he skillfully dodges and counters, but becomes overwhelmed. Suddenly, he clenches his fist and activates a hidden power—his body is engulfed in a burst of glowing red energy. In a dramatic transformation sequence, sleek armor forms around him, resembling a futuristic red ranger suit with a glossy helmet and luminous accents, inspired by the style of SPD Red Power Ranger. The camera circles him as energy pulses outward. Now empowered, he moves with superhuman speed and precision, executing dynamic martial arts moves, acrobatic flips, and powerful strikes. Each enemy is defeated in a visually stunning sequence with slow-motion impacts, sparks, and cinematic lighting. After the fight, the energy fades. The armor dissolves back into light, and he returns to his normal appearance, calm and composed. Final scene: Early morning at a quiet street café. The same young man sits relaxed, sipping a cup of coffee as sunlight warms the scene. The chaos is gone—only peace remains. Cinematic contrast between action and calm, soft background music, smooth fade out.

prompts.text: One fearless female explorer in beige crop top, jungle shorts, rope belt, muddy skin, long dark hair loose. Swinging from giant vines above ancient forest. Main frame from rear. Small rectangular inset top-right shows front face and torso, and keeps the dual-view inset consistent. SCENE: Camera locked behind her as she is already mid-swing at high speed over massive jungle canyon. No cuts. Maintain one fluid take. Rear frame shows legs kicking, hair whipping, vine tension stretching realistically. Trees thousands of feet tall, waterfalls pouring through branches. Inset shows laughter, shock, intense focus, wind slamming cheeks. Route progression: giant swing over canyon → releases to next vine midair → swings through temple ruins → ducks under broken bridge → near miss with flock of giant birds → slides through waterfall curtain → lands onto moving tree branch rail → branch bends and launches her to another vine → final swing returns toward first canyon. Same momentum and shakes in both feeds. MOOD: Freedom, primal thrill, discovery. STYLE: Epic jungle realism.

prompts.text: | Premium Korean romance melodrama. Early night in the same modern apartment kitchen. Keep the acting intimate and volatile, with micro-expressions, trembling breath, and emotionally precise lip sync. The emotional tone is hurt, accusation, and unresolved longing. [00:00-00:04] Tight two-shot across the kitchen island, slight handheld sway. Ha-yoon steps into Joon-seo's space and forces eye contact. HA-YOON: "You don't ignore my words, Joon-seo. You ignore my feelings." [00:04-00:08] Reverse close-up on Joon-seo. He swallows hard, jaw tight, guilt flickering behind his eyes. JOON-SEO: "I've been trying to keep everything from falling apart." [00:08-00:15] Slow push-in on Ha-yoon, then settle into a tense two-shot with both faces sharp and the background soft. HA-YOON: "Then why was I always the first thing you let go when you got busy?" He cannot answer. Let the silence hit hard. Hold on the pain in both faces. end_frame_anchor: | Both stand less than a step apart, eyes locked. Ha-yoon's chin is lifted, tears contained but visible. Joon-seo is speechless, breathing shallowly, shoulders tense, unable to look away.

prompts.text: Prompt Studio: Alien Attack, with Seedance 2.0 fast in @dreamina_ai , text to video Ultra-fast FPV shot skimming the street through a burning city at night. Alien ships drop into frame from above, flying low between skyscrapers and staying directly ahead. Their cannons charge and fire, explosions erupt in sequence along the road. The camera tilts sharply upward mid-flight, bringing the ships into full view overhead. It then banks hard into a side angle, racing alongside them as they blast the street below. The camera whips into a backward tracking motion, ships pushing forward toward the lens, firing relentlessly, shockwaves chasing the camera. A final snap into a tight follow shot behind a ship locks the motion as it continues firing into the city. Continuous motion, no cuts, ships always visible, high tension. #DreaminaCPP

prompts.text: Static close-up shot. A realistic human hand interacts with a flat 2D animated character of Furina — a blue and white dress anime girl with long light blue hair — inside a clear glass cup placed on a wooden table. [0-2s] The hand pinches Furina by the head and lowers her into the glass; she grabs the rim with both arms and resists, refusing to go in, while the fingers keep pressing her down. [2-4s] She loses grip and slides down the glass wall, desperately kicking and clawing at the wall trying to climb back up, but keeps slipping back to the bottom, with a surprised yelp. [4-7s] She gives up and slumps at the bottom, eyes shut, two exaggerated wide noodle-tears streaming down her cheeks, crying dramatically. [7-9s] She suddenly leaps up, shaking both fists at her sides furiously, tears still on her face, yelling angrily upward in protest — expression both crying and fuming, super cute. [9-11s] The finger reaches in and gently pats her head; she immediately stops, sits still obediently, hands clasped on her chest, looking up at the finger with big teary puppy eyes. [11-13s] The fingers pinch her head again and lift her straight up out of the glass; halfway up she tilts her head slightly, eyes half-lidded, a small smug tsundere smile on her lips. [13-15s] Fully lifted out and suspended in the air, her eyes open wide and she breaks into a big bright energetic grin, hands spread open happily, frame holds steady. AR mixed-media style: flat 2D cartoon character with full physical interaction with a real 3D glass — sliding and climbing along the glass wall, realistic glass refractions, cast shadows, and wall contact all rendered naturally. Soft warm natural lighting, super cute and heartwarming mood. #furina #genshinimpact

prompts.text: Warhorse sprint on a cliff aqueduct (15 seconds, single continuous shot) A sweeping wide of ancient cliffs and a narrow aqueduct clinging to them. The camera dives to a tiny moving spark: a rider on a warhorse sprinting impossibly fast along the stone channel. Lock-on: hooves strike, water splashes, stone chips fly. The camera slingshots past, whips around, and drops tight to hoof-level: droplets and grit snapping off with each impact. The aqueduct cracks; sections tilt. The rider makes a last-second lateral leap across a broken span, and the camera roll-matches the jump, skimming the water’s surface below. A rockslide slams into the far side; the pair thread between falling blocks, then burst through a mist cloud from a cascading spillway. Final reveal: the camera rockets up to show the aqueduct pouring into a sunlit terraced oasis city, suddenly serene.

prompts.text: Prompt Studio: High-Speed Ship Descent with Seedance 2.0 in @runwayml , text to video High-speed descent into a massive gas giant, a ship diving deep into violent storm layers while something enormous moves within. Wide shot: ship entering the atmosphere at extreme speed, clouds igniting around it. Cockpit POV: visibility collapsing, instruments glitching under pressure and electromagnetic interference. Violent turbulence: ship jolting unpredictably, barely holding trajectory. Close external: lightning striking dangerously close, energy crawling across the hull. Near-loss: engines choke momentarily, ship dropping faster than intended before reigniting. Disturbance: a massive shape shifts beneath the clouds, displacing entire storm systems toward the ship. Blind evasive: pilot dodges based on movement alone, narrowly avoiding a rising mass. Close pass: something breaches near the ship, scale incomprehensible, forcing a violent course correction. Spiral descent: ship caught in a vortex, spinning, nearly unrecoverable. Breakthrough: sudden entry into a calm void, silence hitting instantly. Final moment: behind the ship, the storm closes and the colossal silhouette emerges into the cleared space. Constant environmental threat, no safe zone, repeated near-failure, unknown presence driving tension.

prompts.text: SUBJECT: A tired woman in @ image1 in a loose tank top and sleep shorts, slow habitual movement. Slightly smeared eyeliner, bare feet, heavy posture, detached face. ENVIRONMENT: A cramped cluttered apartment with an unmade mattress, scattered clothes, a narrow hallway, a damp bathroom with dim tile reflections, and a tiny kitchen crowded with dirty dishes and empty bottles. Warm practical lamps mix with sickly green neon leaking through blinds and door glass, turning the rooms into a humid late-night maze. MOOD: Detached routine turns quietly uncanny, as if an unseen presence is floating above her and waiting for her to notice. COLOR LOGIC: Matrix Green Look CAMERA: POV overhead follow in a strict bird's eye view, locked directly above the top of her head at all times, perfectly centered over her body from start to finish, floating smoothly with no shake, tilt, angle drift, or side offset, passing through ceilings and door frames as one uninterrupted camera event. 24mm wide, digital clean look, locked overhead tracking package throughout. SCENE: She wakes on the mattress. Sits up under the lens. Still centered under the lens, reaches to the floor. Picks up the cigarette and lighter. Places the cigarette between her lips. Lights it. Drops the lighter on the mattress. Stands up with the cigarette still with her. Under the same overhead lock, crosses the cluttered room. The lens tracks directly above her into the narrow hallway. Enters the bathroom. Still pinned overhead, keeps the cigarette in her right hand. Extends that arm away from the running water. Leans on the sink. Turns on the tap with her left hand. Splashes water onto her face with her left hand. The overhead follow carries her back out of the bathroom into the hallway. Moves along the hallway past the bathroom door. Turns into the tiny kitchen. Still centered under the camera, keeps the cigarette with her. Reaches across the dirty dishes with her free hand. Picks up a glass from the counter. Stops exactly under the lens. Holds the cigarette in her right hand and the glass in her left hand. The lens stays fixed above her. Freezes. Looks right. Looks left. Takes a drag from the cigarette. Snaps her head straight up into the lens. Blows smoke toward the camera. Locks eye contact. SFX: lighter flick, inhale, faint city hum, refrigerator buzz, soft bare footsteps, water run. Sodium amber particles, toxic green neon reflect off tile, smoke, bottles, and damp surface.

prompts.text: A 10-second cinematic scene inside the Colosseum at golden hour. A massive crowd fills the stone tiers, roaring with anticipation. The camera follows a group of gladiators entering the arena in a single continuous shot, walking slowly across the sand toward the imperial tribune. Each gladiator is distinct: a heavily armored murmillo with a crested helmet, a nimble retiarius holding a net and trident, a scarred veteran with worn leather armor, and a young fighter with a determined gaze. Dust rises under their feet as sunlight cuts through the arena, casting long dramatic shadows. The crowd cheers louder as they stop in formation and raise their weapons in salute. Caesar rises from his throne, draped in white and red robes, lifting his hand for silence. The sound of the crowd fades slightly as he speaks a short phrase in Latin with authority. The video is a single continuous shot. The characters speak Latin. When one speaks, the others keep their mouths closed. No character appears or disappears. All characters remain visible and consistent throughout the shot.

prompts.text: A small white mushroom-eared creature is hurled forward from outstretched hands. It tumbles toward the camera, its white body swelling until it fills the entire frame — white flash. Chase camera locks behind the mushroom-eared creature as it rockets forward and slams into a wall of red crystalline armor. On impact it explodes — cyan crystal shards and square pixel-particles burst radially. The creature splits into several identical copies that scatter in every direction. The camera pulls straight up, revealing a circular red arena from overhead. The copies ricochet off surfaces in erratic bouncing arcs, each landing triggering a magenta or blue starburst flash. A white variant joins mid-sequence, trailing blue beam lines. The bouncing grows chaotic with overlapping hit effects. One mushroom-eared creature arcs directly past the lens, its body blocking the frame — wipe to black. A character stands behind a large golden wheel covered in ornate engravings. Both hands grip the wheel's rim and push — the wheel spins. The character grins while watching it turn. The camera starts tight on the character's hands and the spinning wheel, then slowly widens. Red carnival lamps ring the stage. Gold sparkles drift upward. Small white and black mushroom-eared creatures sit in the foreground as an audience, arms raised. The spinning golden wheel glows brighter frame by frame, bleaching to searing white. All figures become silhouettes against the expanding light. The camera pushes IN toward the light source — total whiteout. White flash erupts. A warm-colored blast wave expands outward from center screen. Smaller mushroom-eared creatures launch outward from the center in every direction. The character strikes a double peace sign as multicolored confetti rains from above.

prompts.text: Mockumentary (Vlog Style) As long as it can be imagined and described accurately and clearly, I feel like Seedance 2.0 can generate it all Seedance 2.0 prompt Style: Mockumentary (Vlog Style), hyper-realism, fixed camera real-shot feel, natural light, suspense comedy vibe, mobile phone vertical screen shooting texture Duration: 15 seconds Scene: Ordinary family living room, in front of white walls, afternoon sidelight streaming in from the window, yoga mat on the floor, clear human shadows projected on the wall Characters: Female lead @image1 , wearing a sports tank top and yoga pants, ponytail, recording a dance video against a phone tripod [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Everyday Setup (Normalcy / Fixed Camera) Frame: Fixed camera medium shot, phone selfie perspective. Action: Female lead makes a heart gesture to the camera, then starts dancing a simple popular TikTok routine, movements a bit clumsy, occasionally glancing at the phone on the floor for cues. Key Details: At this point, the shadow on the wall is completely normal, perfectly in sync with her movements. Background is quiet, only the music from the Bluetooth speaker playing. Atmosphere: Utterly everyday, no hints of anything unusual. [00:05-00:11] Shot 2: BUG Emerges (The Glitch / Same Fixed Camera) Action: Female lead repeats the same dance segment, and midway through a turn— High-Energy Moment (Core Punch): The shadow on the wall suddenly **doesn't follow the turn**, instead switching on its own to a completely different set of high-difficulty street dance moves (Breaking Power Move), the shadow executing a flawless Thomas full spin on the wall, smooth and fluid. Female lead hasn't noticed yet, keeps dancing her simple steps, but the shadow has fully broken sync, going wild with a solo on the wall. Director's Note: The shadow's dance skills should clearly outclass the body. The bigger the contrast in their moves, the stronger the comedy—body doing the "I Love You" hand gesture dance, shadow pulling off windmill floor moves. [00:11-00:15] Shot 3: Comedy Reversal (The Punchline / Same Fixed Camera) Action: Female lead finishes dancing and looks back at the phone replay, spots the shadow's anomaly, whips her head around to glare at the wall. Result: The shadow has now reverted to normal—obediently mirroring every one of her movements. Female lead suspiciously raises her right hand slowly, shadow raises its right hand too. She quickly switches to left hand—shadow follows without a hitch. Final Freeze: Female lead with a "Am I losing my mind?" expression straight to the camera, but in the last 0.5 seconds before the frame ends, the shadow sneaks in a peace sign gesture the instant she looks at the lens. Frame freezes on this beat.

prompts.text: A massive, dark and fantastical underground slime manufacturing factory of the Demon Lord's army, shot in the style of a candy factory TV documentary, each process shown as an independent cut in sequence. Cut 1 (Main Line): A gigantic purple mana vat bubbles and churns, birthing countless super-squishy base slimes with big sparkling adorable eyes, dripping down with juicy jiggly sounds onto a long conveyor-belt mana line, flowing en masse. A glowing "Special Processing Gate" selects a portion of slimes with a beam of magical light and diverts them onto a branch line. Cut 2 (Dyeing Zone): Like a textile dye factory, base slimes are dunked into a huge vat of dye, then hoisted up vividly colored — pink, blue, red, purple, gold, rainbow — bouncing energetically down a drying rack. Cut 3 (Metal Plating Zone): A plating chamber blasts silver and gold metallic mist from all sides with a sharp "SHBOOSH!" — white slimes pass through and instantly transform into gleaming metallic slimes (looking hard but still jiggly and squishy). Cut 4 (Jellyfish Processing Zone): A tokoroten-style extruder ejects fluffy transparent tentacle parts with a "SPURT!", which stab straight into the lower half of slimes flowing on a parallel line, fusing on contact. Gracefully floating jellyfish slimes emerge. Cut 5 (Goblin Loading Zone): From an overhead chute, tiny cute goblins drop one by one — plop, plop — landing perfectly onto slime backs, wobbling gleefully as they ride down the line. Cut 6 (Snail Slime Zone): A stamping machine clamps a spiral shell onto each slime's back with a solid "CHUNK!" while antennae sprout instantly, producing laid-back crawling snail slimes. Cut 7 (Fusion Pool): Processed slimes plunge one after another into a giant transparent pool, melding and jiggling together, swelling larger and larger into a colossal jumbo slime. Cut 8 (Crowning): A lavish golden demon-lord-style crown descends slowly from the ceiling, settling gently onto the slime's head — a dignified yet extremely adorable Crown Slime is complete, sparkling with a finishing pose. Throughout: ultra-squishy soft motion, lively cute expressions, dark fantasy × extreme cuteness, factory documentary editing style (close-ups of machinery + slime reactions), cinematic lighting, high-quality animation, 8K, detailed textures, 15 seconds.

A massive, dark and fantastical underground slime manufacturing factory of the Demon Lord's army, shot in the style of a candy factory TV documentary, each process shown as an independent cut in sequence.

Cut 4 (Jellyfish Processing Zone): A tokoroten-style extruder ejects fluffy transparent tentacle parts with a "SPURT!", which stab straight into the lower half of slimes flowing on a parallel line, fusing on contact. Gracefully floating jellyfish slimes emerge.

Cut 5 (Goblin Loading Zone): From an overhead chute, tiny cute goblins drop one by one — plop, plop — landing perfectly onto slime backs, wobbling gleefully as they ride down the line.

prompts.text: Cat master offended the Pharaoh... can he escape? 🐱 (made by @nemovideoai Seedance 2) Prompt share (feel free to re-use it) 🤡👇 STORY FORMAT: 15s / 150 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D wuxia-action comedy / Shaw Brothers–style exaggerated historical fantasy TONE: tense royal confrontation → absurd misdirection → rapid-fire kung fu chaos → high-speed escape → playful victory SUBJECTS: Orange cat explorer (modern khaki outfit, shorts, binoculars hanging on chest); White tiger pharaoh (ornate ancient Egyptian headdress and robe, stern and arrogant); Hyena guards (ancient Egyptian servant outfits, armed); White cat maiden (ancient Egyptian palace attire, elegant but mischievous) PROPS: Throne, Egyptian weapons (spears, staffs), palace pillars, torchlight, horse carriage ENVIRONMENT: Grand ancient Egyptian palace interior with towering columns, gold decorations, torch-lit walls → transitions seamlessly to palace exterior desert courtyard COLOR: Warm gold and sand tones → dramatic shadow contrast → kinetic motion blur → bright sunlit escape CAMERA: Single continuous 24mm tracking shot, dramatic push-ins, whip pans, fast wuxia motion bursts, seamless interior-to-exterior transition, no cuts 1 (0–2s) THRONE ROOM TENSION Camera pushes forward across golden palace floor. White tiger pharaoh sits high on throne, imposing. Orange cat kneels below, head slightly lowered. Hyena guards flank him. DIALOGUE (Tiger): “You just stroll into my palace?” 2 (2–3.5s) CAT EXPLAINS Cat looks up, awkward but calm. DIALOGUE (Cat): “Hey, I was in a pyramid... took a wrong turn.” 3 (3.5–5s) TIGER ANGER Tiger leans forward, eyes sharp. DIALOGUE (Tiger): “Yeah. Sure.” He raises a paw. DIALOGUE (Tiger): “Grab him.” 4 (5–6.5s) GUARDS ADVANCE Hyenas step forward, weapons ready. Camera circles slightly as tension builds. 5 (6.5–7.5s) DISTRACTION TRICK Cat suddenly points upward. DIALOGUE (Cat): “Whoa—what IS that?!” Hyenas instinctively stop and look up at the ceiling. 6 (7.5–10s) WING CHUN BURST (CONTINUOUS ACTION) Instant shift— Cat explodes into motion with tight, efficient Wing Chun strikes. Close-range hand strikes → rapid blocks → low kicks → One hyena gets pushed back → another spun and kicked → A third sent sliding across the floor. All movements are fast, precise, slightly exaggerated wuxia speed. Camera stays tight and flowing, tracking every hit in one continuous motion. 7 (10–11.5s) LIGHT-FOOT ESCAPE Cat pivots and launches forward using light-footed wuxia movement. Runs along a pillar, rebounds, dashes toward exit. Camera follows in a fast forward tracking shot. 8 (11.5–13s) PALACE EXIT TRANSITION He bursts out of the palace into bright desert sunlight. A horse carriage is already waiting. White cat maiden holds the reins, calm and ready. DIALOGUE (White Cat): “Took you long enough.” 9 (13–14s) GETAWAY Cat jumps onto the back of the carriage in one smooth motion. DIALOGUE (Cat): “Traffic was crazy.” 10 (14–15s) ESCAPE FINALE Carriage speeds off across desert sands. Both cats grin proudly, wind blowing through their outfits. Cat throws a casual “YEAH” gesture toward camera. White cat smirks confidently. SFX: echoing palace ambiance, sharp command shout, weapon movement swishes, fast kung fu strikes, comedic impact beats, light-foot dash sounds, horse gallop acceleration, carriage rattle, ending with playful triumphant sting #sd2 #seedance #aivideo #CatsLover

prompts.text: This is the prompt I used with seedance2 model: Single continuous camera flying fast and low following an eagle through a massive pirate naval battle — never stopping, never cutting, weaving through chaos at reckless speed. Camera launches off the bow of a burning ship, skimming inches above the waterline, spray blasting past as it accelerates into the heart of the battle. Pirates locked in hand to hand combat on tilting decks flash past on both sides — cutlasses clashing, men grappling at the railings, cannon crews ramming powder and shot in frantic rhythm. Camera banks hard and climbs — threading between two massive ships locked together, grappling ropes thick as a man's arm straining between the hulls, pirates swinging across on ropes mid-air as camera rockets past them. CANNON BROADSIDE — a full gun deck erupts simultaneously to camera left, twelve cannons firing in one deafening rippling volley, muzzle blast and white smoke wall expanding outward, camera punching through the smoke cloud and emerging on the other side. The struck ship directly ahead taking the broadside — hull planking erupting outward in chunks, a mast cracking at the base and toppling in real time, rigging cascading down across the deck, fire erupting instantly at the impact points. Camera dives low again skimming the water between the two burning hulls, debris raining down from above, burning sail fragments falling past. Hard banking turn — camera accelerates toward a chaotic boarding action, pirates streaming across gangplanks between two ships, sword fights erupting across every inch of deck space, a pirate swinging from burning rigging directly overhead as camera passes beneath him. Camera climbs again threading through a forest of masts and tangled rigging, smoke everywhere, burning ships in every direction. AHEAD — a massive black-hulled pirate flagship at full sail, cannons run out on both sides, bearing down at ramming speed on a larger merchant galleon sitting dead in the water. Camera races alongside the flagship matching its speed — the gap closing fast, the merchant vessel growing enormous in frame. IMPACT — the flagship's iron-sheathed ram drives through the merchant hull at full speed, timber exploding outward in all directions, the struck vessel lurching violently, a shockwave rippling down both hulls, the flagship driving deeper through the wound it just opened, both ships locked together in grinding splintering ruin. Camera pulls back fast and wide revealing the full battle.

prompts.text: With Seedance 2.0, we've cranked the action intensity to the max. A 15-second cinematic spectacle set in an ancient temple, right in the heart of a storm. What struck me the most was how the rain isn't just background—it's acting like a full-fledged character in its own right. The water droplets flung about in the moments when swords clash, that flawless interactive rain physics lit up by lightning, and the fluid dynamics responding to the character's every move... Technically, pulling off a fight scene this fast and chaotic—while keeping character consistency intact and nailing that sharp sense of impact (weighty impact)—really showcases the mastery in Seedance 2.0's physics engine. Prompt

prompts.text: A young pearl diver kid with glowing coral armor, fluid hair drifting in water, and a shell-powered jet pack rockets into frame in the first two seconds, spiraling through a reef tunnel as a massive coral mech leviathan crashes through the ocean floor behind him, instantly creating the hook. The chase unfolds through a breathtaking underwater kingdom— swimming through glowing reefs, weaving between ancient submerged temples, diving into abyss trenches, and bursting through schools of bioluminescent fish. He fights back using: – pressure pulse blasts – spinning shell shields – ink decoys that distort vision – coral spike projectiles The leviathan constantly escalates—its विशाल body reshaping, tentacles splitting into mechanical arms, crushing ruins, and generating whirlpool currents that drag everything inward. Visual style: dreamlike aquatic fantasy—neon blues, glowing coral pinks, drifting particles, slow-motion water physics, cinematic light rays. Final moment: inside a sacred sunken pearl shrine, he launches a final charged strike— The leviathan fractures. Inside... a tiny lost sea creature is revealed, tangled in coral circuitry, glowing softly, frightened.

prompts.text: Seedance 2 vs Wan 2.7💫 Prompt Shared: ONE CONTINUOUS UNCUT SHOT — no cuts, no transitions, no fades. SPEED RAMP UP — fast, almost blurred speed through the drawing and coloring process: an artist's large real hand rapidly sketches, inks, and colors a tiny chibi anime girl on white paper. The entire drawing process is frenetic and fast — pen lines appear rapidly, markers slash color across her body in quick strokes: peach skin, brown hair with a round clip, rosy cheeks, white sailor uniform with a blue ribbon. She is tiny — her whole body fits inside the artist's palm, emphasizing the massive size difference between the real world and her. SPEED RAMP DOWN to near-freeze — the final marker stroke lands. The paper ripples like water, golden light pulses beneath her. Then SNAP — speed ramps back up as she tears free from the paper in a burst of confetti and golden sparks. She is now a living 3D chibi girl, only 10–12 cm tall. Everything around her is enormous. She lands on the vast wooden desk — pencils are like logs, the coffee mug is a tower. She looks around wide-eyed, then grins and BOLTS. SPEED RAMP UP — she sprints across the desk in a blur, leaps off the edge, freefalls, lands on the floor with a tiny thud, rolls, and keeps running. The bedroom floor stretches like a massive plain around her tiny body. She hops over a fallen pencil like a tree trunk, ducks under a chair like a tunnel, zigzags past a giant sneaker, shrieking and laughing with pure joy. SPEED RAMP DOWN — dreamy slow-motion glide: she runs in full stride, hair flowing, cheeks flushed, mouth open mid-laugh, confetti sparks trailing behind her. The bed looms like a building in the background. Then SPEED RAMP UP — she charges full speed toward the bed frame. She reaches the bed leg — thick as a tree trunk compared to her. She grabs it, spins around it once, and stops. SPEED RAMP DOWN to slow close-up push-in. She hides behind the massive bed leg, chest heaving, cheeks bright red, huge eyes half-closed with exhaustion. A tiny sweat drop rolls down her forehead. She exhales slowly — "haahhh~" — rests her cheek against the bed leg, wobbling legs, faint happy smile. Camera holds on her tiny exhausted face pressed against the enormous wood. Warm golden afternoon light. Heartwarming finale.

prompts.text: 無重力アクションシーン すごくいい感じに表現してくれます。 seedance2.0 @TopviewAIhq prompt 15-second continuous single-shot action sequence. No cuts. No scene transitions. Japanese-style anime action aesthetics, ultra-detailed, cinematic quality, with a cool color palette of cold whites, pale blues, and subtle neon reflections. Floating debris suspended in the air, dynamic motion, dramatic lighting, high-end anime film look. Character: A petite anime girl with long silver-white hair styled in twin low sections, soft layered strands flowing weightlessly, with subtle iridescent color streaks (cyan, magenta, yellow accents). Large teal-green eyes, calm and emotionless with a faint hint of softness. Wearing a black futuristic tactical jacket covered in multicolor glitch-like paint patterns (RGB splashes), high collar partially covering her mouth, multiple belts, pouches, and mechanical details. Equipped with sleek high-tech headphones with glowing accents. Slim build, delicate but precise movements. Weapon: A minimalist black katana with subtle reflective edge, clean and elegant design. Scene: Interior of a white, ethereal zero-gravity space. The environment is minimalistic and surreal, with soft glowing light, broken gravity, floating fragments of panels and geometric debris drifting slowly. The space feels silent, vast, and dreamlike. 0–3s — tension Camera drifts slowly in zero gravity. The girl floats in mid-air, hair and jacket drifting softly. She holds the katana loosely, body relaxed but ready. Tiny debris particles pass by in slow motion. 3–6s — ignition Enemy figures (abstract humanoid silhouettes, minimal detail) push off floating surfaces and rush toward her from multiple directions. She slightly tilts her head, eyes tracking movement precisely. 6–10s — chaos choreography Combat begins in full 360° zero-gravity space. She spins gracefully mid-air, body rotating fluidly while executing precise katana strikes. Each slash is clean and controlled, leaving faint neon trails (cool blue/purple). Camera follows her in a smooth tumbling motion, synchronized with her rotation, maintaining cinematic clarity. 10–13s — escalation She lightly touches a floating fragment with her foot, then forcefully launches herself forward. High-speed dash across multiple enemies in a straight, elegant line. Time slightly compresses, emphasizing speed and precision. 13–15s — final frame Motion slows down. Enemy bodies drift apart silently in zero gravity. She stabilizes her posture, floating upright. Hair and jacket settle gently. She lowers the katana slightly. Final frame holds on her calm expression in the white void. Freeze.

prompts.text: Inside the storm, a weather-research aircraft punches through violent turbulence Seedance 2.0 Text to video Prompt Start high above a massive supercell thunderstorm as the camera dives into the cloud wall in a steep descending spiral. Inside the storm, a weather-research aircraft punches through violent turbulence, riding the updrafts and downdrafts. Its design is rugged and beautiful: reinforced gunmetal fuselage covered in sensor arrays that glow amber, forward-swept wings built for extreme turbulence, a spinning atmospheric sampling drum on its belly, and lightning-rod antenna spines that actively attract and channel electrical discharge along glowing conduit lines down the fuselage. Rain hammers the hull in horizontal sheets while hail ricochets off the wings in white sparks. Without a cut, the camera drops from the wide storm-interior view into a tight chase through the turbulent cloud layers, revealing rain vaporizing on the hot sensor panels, hailstones shattering on the wing leading edges in slow-motion crystal explosions, and the lightning conduits channeling a strike down the fuselage in a branching blue-white river. It sweeps forward for a cockpit-level pass revealing the pilot gripping the controls against violent buffeting, then spirals to the belly as the sampling drum spins faster, pulling cloud matter into a glowing vortex. For the climax, the aircraft enters the storm's mesocyclone — the rotating heart of the supercell. A tornado is forming below, the funnel reaching down toward the earth. The pilot flies directly into the mesocyclone wall. The craft corkscrews with the rotation, lightning strikes it three times in rapid succession — each strike channeled perfectly, the conduits blazing like veins of electricity. It pierces through the wall of the rotation and bursts into the mesocyclone's calm eye — a surreal column of clear air surrounded by swirling black cloud. The camera spirals upward through the eye toward blue sky above, one final epic reveal — the tiny aircraft rising from the heart of the monster into golden sunlight.

Rain hammers the hull in horizontal sheets while hail ricochets off the wings in white sparks. 

Without a cut, the camera drops from the wide storm-interior view into a tight chase through the turbulent cloud layers, revealing rain vaporizing on the hot sensor panels, hailstones shattering on the wing leading edges in slow-motion crystal explosions, and the lightning conduits channeling a strike down the fuselage in a branching blue-white river. It sweeps forward for a cockpit-level pass revealing the pilot gripping the controls against violent buffeting, then spirals to the belly as the sampling drum spins faster, pulling cloud matter into a glowing vortex. 

For the climax, the aircraft enters the storm's mesocyclone — the rotating heart of the supercell. A tornado is forming below, the funnel reaching down toward the earth. The pilot flies directly into the mesocyclone wall. The craft corkscrews with the rotation, lightning strikes it three times in rapid succession — each strike channeled perfectly, the conduits blazing like veins of electricity. It pierces through the wall of the rotation and bursts into the mesocyclone's calm eye — a surreal column of clear air surrounded by swirling black cloud. The camera spirals upward through the eye toward blue sky above, one final epic reveal — the tiny aircraft rising from the heart of the monster into golden sunlight.

prompts.text: [SCENE SETUP] An open rugged landscape. Rocky ground, overcast sky, wide and cinematic. [CHARACTER INTRO] The character descends slowly from above, landing firmly on the ground. The impact of his landing sends a small natural shudder through the dirt and loose rocks around his feet. [THE CROUCH] He slowly crouches down, pressing one fist firmly into the earth. Still. Composed. Eyes forward. [ENERGY BUILD] The ground around his fist begins cracking and splintering outward. Dirt, small rocks and dust vibrate and tremble. The air around him distorts slightly. Everything shakes — loose stones, dust lifting naturally off the ground around him. [THE TAKEOFF] He launches violently straight up, leaving a crater where he knelt. Dirt and rocks scatter naturally from the force. He cuts through the low hanging clouds and disappears into the open sky above. [STYLE] Cinematic. Photoreal. 4K. Natural lighting. Grounded and raw. No energy beams, no glowing effects. Gravity and weight drive everything.
